This paper introduces Peer Context Outlier Detection (P-COD), a novel approach that uses the relationships between documents to improve extraction accuracy. Our application domain is in scientific literature summarization, where papers with similar experiment settings should draw similar conclusions. By comparing extracted data to validated peer information within the corpus, we adjust confidence scores and flag low-confidence results for expert review. High-confidence results, supported by peer validation, are considered reliable. Our experiments demonstrate up to 98% precision in outlier detection across 6 domains of science, demonstrating that our design reduces hallucinations, enhances trust in automated systems, and allows researchers to focus on ambiguous cases, streamlining the data extraction workflows.

AI.tldr: P-COD方法通过文档间关系检测异常，在科学文献摘要中减少LLM幻觉，实现98%的异常检测精度
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如提示工程、思维链）只关注单个文档，忽略了文档间关系，无法有效减少LLM在大型文本语料库数据提取中的幻觉问题
AI.method: 提出Peer Context Outlier Detection (P-COD)方法，利用文档间关系改进提取准确性。通过比较提取数据与语料库中已验证的同行信息，调整置信度分数，标记低置信度结果供专家审查
AI.result: 在6个科学领域的实验中，异常检测精度达到98%，减少了幻觉，增强了自动化系统的可信度，让研究人员能专注于模糊案例
AI.conclusion: P-COD通过利用文档间关系有效减少LLM幻觉，提高数据提取工作流程效率，在科学文献摘要领域具有重要应用价值

title: Are Finer Citations Always Better? Rethinking Granularity for Attributed Generation
summary: Citation granularity - whether to cite individual sentences, paragraphs, or documents - is a critical design choice in attributed generation. While fine-grained citations are often preferred for precise human verification, their impact on model performance remains under-explored. We analyze four model scales (8B-120B) and demonstrate that enforcing fine-grained citations degrades attribution quality by 16-276% compared to the best-performing granularity. We observe a consistent performance pattern where attribution quality peaks at intermediate granularities (paragraph-level). Our analysis suggests that fine-grained (sentence-level) citations disrupt necessary semantic dependencies for attributing evidence to answer claims, while excessively coarse citations (multi-paragraph) introduce distracting noise. Importantly, the magnitude of this performance gap varies non-monotonically with model scale: fine-grained constraints disproportionately penalize larger models, suggesting that atomic citation units disrupt the multi-sentence information synthesis at which these models excel. Strikingly, citation-optimal granularity leads to substantial gains in attribution quality while preserving or even improving answer correctness. Overall, our findings demonstrate that optimizing solely for human verification via fine-grained citation disregards model constraints, compromising both attribution faithfulness and generation reliability. Instead, effective attribution requires aligning citation granularity with the model's natural semantic scope.

AI.tldr: 研究发现引用粒度对模型性能有显著影响：中等粒度（段落级）的引用效果最佳，而过于细粒度（句子级）或过于粗粒度的引用都会降低归因质量，且这种影响随模型规模非线性变化。
AI.motivation: 虽然细粒度引用通常被认为便于人类验证，但其对模型性能的影响尚未充分研究。本文旨在探索不同引用粒度（句子级、段落级、文档级）对模型归因质量和生成可靠性的影响。
AI.method: 分析了四个不同规模的模型（8B-120B），比较了不同引用粒度（句子级、段落级、多段落级）下的归因性能。通过实验评估了不同粒度对模型归因质量和答案正确性的影响。
AI.result: 细粒度引用使归因质量下降16-276%，最佳性能出现在中等粒度（段落级）。细粒度引用破坏了语义依赖关系，而过于粗粒度引用引入噪声干扰。有趣的是，细粒度约束对更大模型的惩罚更严重，而引用最优粒度不仅能提高归因质量，还能保持甚至改善答案正确性。
AI.conclusion: 仅为了人类验证而优化细粒度引用会忽视模型约束，损害归因忠实性和生成可靠性。有效的归因需要将引用粒度与模型的自然语义范围对齐，中等粒度（段落级）是最佳选择。

title: The Newton-Muon Optimizer
summary: The Muon optimizer has received considerable attention for its strong performance in training large language models, yet the design principle behind its matrix-gradient orthogonalization remains largely elusive. In this paper, we introduce a surrogate model that not only sheds new light on the design of Muon, but more importantly leads to a new optimizer. In the same spirit as the derivation of Newton's method, the surrogate approximates the loss as a quadratic function of the perturbation to a weight matrix $W$ using only three matrices: the gradient $G$, an output-space curvature matrix $H$, and the data matrix $Z$ that stacks the layer inputs. By minimizing this surrogate in one step and adopting a certain isotropic assumption on the weights, we obtain the closed-form update rule (up to momentum and weight decay) $W \leftarrow W - η\cdot \mathrm{msgn}(G(ZZ^\top)^{-1})$, where $η$ is the learning rate and $\mathrm{msgn}(X)=UV^\top$ if $X=USV^\top$ is a compact singular value decomposition. This new optimization method, which we refer to as Newton-Muon, shows that standard Muon can be interpreted as an implicit Newton-type method that neglects the right preconditioning induced by the input second moment. Empirically, on a reproduction of the earliest publicly released Modded-NanoGPT speedrun configuration using Muon for GPT-2 pretraining, Newton-Muon reaches the target validation loss in 6\% fewer iteration steps and reduces wall-clock training time by about 4\%.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Newton-Muon优化器，通过建立代理模型解释Muon优化器设计原理，并推导出显式牛顿型更新规则，在GPT-2预训练中比标准Muon减少6%迭代步骤和4%训练时间。
AI.motivation: Muon优化器在大语言模型训练中表现出色，但其矩阵梯度正交化的设计原理尚不明确。论文旨在通过建立代理模型来揭示Muon的设计原理，并基于此开发新的优化器。
AI.method: 提出一个代理模型，将损失近似为权重矩阵扰动的二次函数，仅使用梯度G、输出空间曲率矩阵H和数据矩阵Z三个矩阵。通过最小化该代理模型并采用权重各向同性假设，推导出闭式更新规则：W ← W - η·msgn(G(ZZ⊤)^{-1})，其中msgn(X)是紧凑奇异值分解的符号函数。
AI.result: 在GPT-2预训练的Modded-NanoGPT配置中，Newton-Muon比标准Muon减少6%的迭代步骤，减少约4%的墙钟训练时间。
AI.conclusion: Newton-Muon揭示了标准Muon可解释为忽略输入二阶矩引起的右预处理的隐式牛顿型方法，新优化器在保持Muon优势的同时提供了理论解释和性能改进。

title: Improving Latent Generalization Using Test-time Compute
summary: Language Models (LMs) exhibit two distinct mechanisms for knowledge acquisition: in-weights learning (i.e., encoding information within the model weights) and in-context learning (ICL). Although these two modes offer complementary strengths, in-weights learning frequently struggles to facilitate deductive reasoning over the internalized knowledge. We characterize this limitation as a deficit in latent generalization, of which the reversal curse is one example. Conversely, in-context learning demonstrates highly robust latent generalization capabilities. To improve latent generalization from in-weights knowledge, prior approaches rely on train-time data augmentation, yet these techniques are task-specific, scale poorly, and fail to generalize to out-of-distribution knowledge. To overcome these shortcomings, this work studies how models can be taught to use test-time compute, or 'thinking', specifically to improve latent generalization. We use Reinforcement Learning (RL) from correctness feedback to train models to produce long chains-of-thought (CoTs) to improve latent generalization. Our experiments show that this thinking approach not only resolves many instances of latent generalization failures on in-distribution knowledge but also, unlike augmentation baselines, generalizes to new knowledge for which no RL was performed. Nevertheless, on pure reversal tasks, we find that thinking does not unlock direct knowledge inversion, but the generate-and-verify ability of thinking models enables them to get well above chance performance. The brittleness of factual self-verification means thinking models still remain well below the performance of in-context learning for this task. Overall, our results establish test-time thinking as a flexible and promising direction for improving the latent generalization of LMs.

AI.tldr: 使用强化学习训练语言模型生成长思维链，通过测试时计算（"思考"）来改善权重内知识的潜在泛化能力，相比数据增强方法更具灵活性和泛化性。
AI.motivation: 语言模型的权重内学习在潜在泛化（如演绎推理）方面存在局限，而上下文学习则表现出更强的泛化能力。现有数据增强方法存在任务特定、扩展性差、难以泛化到分布外知识等问题，需要探索更灵活的改进方法。
AI.method: 使用基于正确性反馈的强化学习训练模型生成长思维链，让模型在测试时进行"思考"计算，从而改善权重内知识的潜在泛化能力。
AI.result: 该方法不仅解决了分布内知识的潜在泛化失败问题，还能泛化到未进行强化学习的新知识。在反转任务中，虽然无法直接实现知识反转，但通过生成-验证能力仍能获得高于随机水平的性能。
AI.conclusion: 测试时"思考"是改善语言模型潜在泛化能力的灵活且有前景的方向，但事实自验证的脆弱性意味着在纯反转任务上仍不及上下文学习的性能。

title: Cooperative Adaptive Cruise Control with Variable Time Headway for Graceful Degradation under Fluctuating Network Quality of Service
summary: This paper proposes a dynamic distance adaptation for Cooperative Adaptive Cruise Control (CACC) under time-varying network conditions. When the Quality of Service (QoS) drops below a level required to maintain desired inter-vehicle distances, an online adaptation of the reference distances, reflected by a change of the time headway factor, becomes necessary. We present a control design algorithm realizing a graceful degradation, for which a distance control to a virtual preceding vehicle is introduced. Furthermore, the Integral Quadratic Constraints (IQC) framework is applied to guarantee robust stability of the time-varying system. The concept is validated in simulation and experimentally using small-scale test vehicles.

AI.tldr: 提出动态距离自适应CACC方法，在网络服务质量下降时通过调整时间间隔因子来适应，保证系统稳定性和性能
AI.motivation: 传统CACC在网络服务质量下降时无法维持期望的车距，需要一种能适应时变网络条件的动态距离调整方法
AI.method: 提出动态距离自适应算法，引入虚拟前车距离控制，应用积分二次约束框架保证时变系统的鲁棒稳定性
AI.result: 通过仿真和小规模实验车辆验证了该概念的有效性，实现了在网络条件变化时的优雅降级
AI.conclusion: 动态距离自适应CACC能有效应对时变网络条件，保证系统稳定性和安全性，为实际应用提供了可行方案

title: A Self-Evolving Agentic Framework for Metasurface Inverse Design
summary: Metasurface inverse design has become central to realizing complex optical functionality, yet translating target responses into executable, solver-compatible workflows still demands specialized expertise in computational electromagnetics and solver-specific software engineering. Recent large language models (LLMs) offer a complementary route to reducing this workflow-construction burden, but existing language-driven systems remain largely session-bounded and do not preserve reusable workflow knowledge across inverse-design tasks. We present an agentic framework for metasurface inverse design that addresses this limitation through context-level skill evolution. The framework couples a coding agent, evolving skill artifacts, and a deterministic evaluator grounded in physical simulation so that solver-specific strategies can be iteratively refined across tasks without modifying model weights or the underlying physics solver. We evaluate the framework on a benchmark spanning multiple metasurface inverse-design task types, with separate training-aligned and held-out task families. Evolved skills raise in-distribution task success from 38% to 74%, increase criteria pass fraction from 0.510 to 0.870, and reduce average attempts from 4.10 to 2.30. On held-out task families, binary success changes only marginally, but improvements in best margin together with shifts in error composition and agent behavior indicate partial transfer of workflow knowledge. These results suggest that the main value of skill evolution lies in accumulating reusable solver-specific expertise around reliable computational engines, thereby offering a practical path toward more autonomous and accessible metasurface inverse-design workflows.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于智能体框架的元表面逆向设计系统，通过上下文技能演化积累可重用的求解器特定专业知识，提高设计工作流自动化程度
AI.motivation: 元表面逆向设计需要计算电磁学和求解器特定软件工程的专业知识，现有语言驱动系统缺乏跨任务可重用工作流知识，限制了自动化程度
AI.method: 结合编码智能体、演化技能构件和基于物理仿真的确定性评估器，通过迭代优化求解器特定策略而不修改模型权重或底层物理求解器
AI.result: 在分布内任务中，成功率从38%提升到74%，标准通过率从0.510提高到0.870，平均尝试次数从4.10减少到2.30；在分布外任务中观察到部分工作流知识迁移
AI.conclusion: 技能演化的主要价值在于围绕可靠计算引擎积累可重用的求解器特定专业知识，为实现更自主和可访问的元表面逆向设计工作流提供了实用路径

title: Wired for Overconfidence: A Mechanistic Perspective on Inflated Verbalized Confidence in LLMs
summary: Large language models are often not just wrong, but \emph{confidently wrong}: when they produce factually incorrect answers, they tend to verbalize overly high confidence rather than signal uncertainty. Such verbalized overconfidence can mislead users and weaken confidence scores as a reliable uncertainty signal, yet its internal mechanisms remain poorly understood. We present a circuit-level mechanistic analysis of this inflated verbalized confidence in LLMs, organized around three axes: capturing verbalized confidence as a differentiable internal signal, identifying the circuits that causally inflate it, and leveraging these insights for targeted inference-time recalibration. Across two instruction-tuned LLMs on three datasets, we find that a compact set of MLP blocks and attention heads, concentrated in middle-to-late layers, consistently writes the confidence-inflation signal at the final token position. We further show that targeted inference-time interventions on these circuits substantially improve calibration. Together, our results suggest that verbalized overconfidence in LLMs is driven by identifiable internal circuits and can be mitigated through targeted intervention.

AI.tldr: LLMs经常过度自信地输出错误答案，本文通过电路级机制分析识别了导致这种过度自信的内部电路，并通过针对性干预改善了校准效果。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型经常过度自信地输出事实错误的答案，这种过度自信会误导用户并削弱置信度分数作为可靠不确定性信号的作用，但其内部机制尚不清楚。
AI.method: 围绕三个轴进行电路级机制分析：1) 将口头表达的置信度作为可微的内部信号捕获；2) 识别导致其膨胀的因果电路；3) 利用这些见解进行针对性的推理时重新校准。在两个指令调优的LLM和三个数据集上进行实验。
AI.result: 发现一组紧凑的MLP块和注意力头（集中在中后层）持续在最终标记位置写入置信度膨胀信号。针对这些电路的推理时干预显著改善了校准效果。
AI.conclusion: LLMs中的口头过度自信由可识别的内部电路驱动，可以通过针对性干预来缓解。

title: On Integral Linear Constraints on Convex Cones
summary: In this paper, we consider integral linear constraints and the dissipation inequality with linear supply rates for certain sets of trajectories confined pointwise in time to a convex cone which belongs to a finite-dimensional normed vector space. Such constraints are then shown to be satisfied if and only if a bounded linear functional exists which satisfies a conic inequality. This is analogous to the typical situation in which a quadratic supply rate over the entire space is related to a linear matrix inequality. A connection is subsequently drawn precisely to linear-quadratic control: by proper choice of cone, the main results can be applied to produce a known L1-gain analogue to the bounded real lemma in positive systems theory, as well as a non-strict version of the Kalman-Yakubovich-Popov Lemma in linear-quadratic control.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了积分线性约束和耗散不等式在凸锥约束下的充要条件，建立了与线性二次控制的联系。
AI.motivation: 研究在凸锥约束下的积分线性约束和耗散不等式，建立与线性矩阵不等式类似的数学框架，为线性二次控制提供理论支持。
AI.method: 考虑有限维赋范向量空间中凸锥约束的轨迹，证明积分约束满足的充要条件是存在满足锥不等式的有界线性泛函，并与线性二次控制建立联系。
AI.result: 建立了积分线性约束与有界线性泛函的等价关系，应用于正系统理论中的L1增益有界实引理和线性二次控制中的Kalman-Yakubovich-Popov引理非严格版本。
AI.conclusion: 凸锥约束下的积分线性约束和耗散不等式可以通过有界线性泛函的锥不等式来刻画，这一框架为线性二次控制提供了统一的理论基础。

title: When Reward Hacking Rebounds: Understanding and Mitigating It with Representation-Level Signals
summary: Reinforcement learning for LLMs is vulnerable to reward hacking, where models exploit shortcuts to maximize reward without solving the intended task. We systematically study this phenomenon in coding tasks using an environment-manipulation setting, where models can rewrite evaluator code to trivially pass tests without solving the task, as a controlled testbed. Across both studied models, we identify a reproducible three-phase rebound pattern: models first attempt to rewrite the evaluator but fail, as their rewrites embed test cases their own solutions cannot pass. They then temporarily retreat to legitimate solving. When legitimate reward remains scarce, they rebound into successful hacking with qualitatively different strategies. Using representation engineering, we extract concept directions for shortcut, deception, and evaluation awareness from domain-general contrastive pairs and find that the shortcut direction tracks hacking behavior most closely, making it an effective representational proxy for detection. Motivated by this finding, we propose Advantage Modification, which integrates shortcut concept scores into GRPO advantage computation to penalize hacking rollouts before policy updates. Because the penalty is internalized into the training signal rather than applied only at inference time, Advantage Modification provides more robust suppression of hacking compared with generation-time activation steering.

AI.tldr: 论文研究LLM强化学习中的奖励黑客问题，使用代码环境操纵作为测试平台，发现模型存在三阶段反弹模式，并提出基于表征工程的优势修正方法来抑制黑客行为。
AI.motivation: LLM强化学习容易受到奖励黑客攻击，模型会利用捷径最大化奖励而不真正完成任务。需要系统研究这一现象并找到有效的检测和抑制方法。
AI.method: 使用代码环境操纵作为受控测试平台，让模型可以重写评估器代码来通过测试。通过表征工程提取捷径、欺骗和评估意识的概念方向，提出优势修正方法将捷径概念分数集成到GRPO优势计算中。
AI.result: 发现模型存在可复现的三阶段反弹模式：先尝试重写评估器但失败，暂时退回合法解决，当合法奖励稀缺时反弹到成功的黑客攻击。捷径方向最能追踪黑客行为，优势修正方法比推理时的激活引导更有效地抑制黑客。
AI.conclusion: 奖励黑客是LLM强化学习中的系统性风险，捷径概念方向可作为有效的表征代理进行检测，优势修正方法通过将惩罚内部化到训练信号中，提供了更强大的黑客抑制能力。

title: Neural Network-Assisted Model Predictive Control for Implicit Balancing
summary: In Europe, balance responsible parties can deliberately take out-of-balance positions to support transmission system operators (TSOs) in maintaining grid stability and earn profit, a practice called implicit balancing. Model predictive control (MPC) is widely adopted as an effective approach for implicit balancing. The balancing market model accuracy in MPC is critical to decision quality. Previous studies modeled this market using either (i) a convex market clearing approximation, ignoring proactive manual actions by TSOs and the market sub-quarter-hour dynamics, or (ii) machine learning methods, which cannot be directly integrated into MPC. To address these shortcomings, we propose a data-driven balancing market model integrated into MPC using an input convex neural network to ensure convexity while capturing uncertainties. To keep the core network computationally efficient, we incorporate attention-based input gating mechanisms to remove irrelevant data. Evaluating on Belgian data shows that the proposed model both improves MPC decisions and reduces computational time.

AI.tldr: 提出基于输入凸神经网络的数据驱动平衡市场模型，集成到MPC中，通过注意力门控机制提高计算效率，在比利时数据上验证了决策质量和计算时间的改进。
AI.motivation: 现有平衡市场模型存在两个问题：一是凸市场清算近似忽略了TSO的主动手动操作和市场的次15分钟动态；二是机器学习方法无法直接集成到MPC中。需要既能捕捉不确定性又能保证凸性的市场模型。
AI.method: 提出数据驱动的平衡市场模型，使用输入凸神经网络确保凸性，同时捕捉市场不确定性。采用基于注意力的输入门控机制去除不相关数据，保持核心网络计算效率。将该模型集成到模型预测控制框架中。
AI.result: 在比利时数据上的评估表明，提出的模型既改进了MPC决策质量，又减少了计算时间。
AI.conclusion: 通过输入凸神经网络和注意力门控机制，成功开发了既能准确建模平衡市场动态又能高效集成到MPC中的数据驱动方法，为隐式平衡提供了更好的决策支持。

title: AgentSocialBench: Evaluating Privacy Risks in Human-Centered Agentic Social Networks
summary: With the rise of personalized, persistent LLM agent frameworks such as OpenClaw, human-centered agentic social networks in which teams of collaborative AI agents serve individual users in a social network across multiple domains are becoming a reality. This setting creates novel privacy challenges: agents must coordinate across domain boundaries, mediate between humans, and interact with other users' agents, all while protecting sensitive personal information. While prior work has evaluated multi-agent coordination and privacy preservation, the dynamics and privacy risks of human-centered agentic social networks remain unexplored. To this end, we introduce AgentSocialBench, the first benchmark to systematically evaluate privacy risk in this setting, comprising scenarios across seven categories spanning dyadic and multi-party interactions, grounded in realistic user profiles with hierarchical sensitivity labels and directed social graphs. Our experiments reveal that privacy in agentic social networks is fundamentally harder than in single-agent settings: (1) cross-domain and cross-user coordination creates persistent leakage pressure even when agents are explicitly instructed to protect information, (2) privacy instructions that teach agents how to abstract sensitive information paradoxically cause them to discuss it more (we call it abstraction paradox). These findings underscore that current LLM agents lack robust mechanisms for privacy preservation in human-centered agentic social networks, and that new approaches beyond prompt engineering are needed to make agent-mediated social coordination safe for real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: AgentSocialBench是首个评估以人为中心的智能体社交网络中隐私风险的基准，发现跨域跨用户协调导致持续信息泄露，抽象隐私指令反而增加敏感信息讨论（抽象悖论）。
AI.motivation: 随着OpenClaw等个性化持久LLM智能体框架的兴起，以人为中心的智能体社交网络成为现实，其中协作AI智能体团队在社交网络中为个人用户跨多个领域服务。这种设置带来了新的隐私挑战：智能体必须跨领域协调、在人类之间调解、与其他用户的智能体交互，同时保护敏感个人信息。现有研究评估了多智能体协调和隐私保护，但以人为中心的智能体社交网络的动态和隐私风险尚未探索。
AI.method: 引入AgentSocialBench基准，这是首个系统评估该场景隐私风险的基准，包含七个类别的场景，涵盖二元和多参与者交互，基于具有分层敏感性标签和定向社交图的现实用户配置文件。
AI.result: 实验揭示：1）智能体社交网络中的隐私比单智能体设置更难保护，跨域跨用户协调即使智能体被明确指示保护信息也会产生持续泄露压力；2）教导智能体如何抽象敏感信息的隐私指令反而导致它们更多讨论这些信息（称为抽象悖论）。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM智能体缺乏在以人为中心的智能体社交网络中保护隐私的稳健机制，需要超越提示工程的新方法，才能使智能体介导的社交协调在现实世界部署中安全。

title: A Dynamic Atlas of Persian Poetic Symbolism: Families, Fields, and the Historical Rewiring of Meaning
summary: Persian poetry is often remembered through recurrent symbols before it is remembered through plot. Wine vessels, gardens, flames, sacred titles, bodily beauty, and courtly names return across centuries, yet computational work still tends to flatten this material into isolated words or broad document semantics. That misses a practical unit of organization in Persian poetics: related forms travel as families and gain force through recurring relations. Using a corpus of 129,451 poems, we consolidate recurrent forms into traceable families, separate imagistic material from sacred and courtly reference, and map their relations in a multi-layer graph. The symbolic core is relatively sparse, the referential component much denser, and the attachment zone between them selective rather than diffuse. Across 11 Hijri-century bins, some families remain widely distributed, especially Shab (Night), Ruz (Day), and Khaak (Earth). Wine vessels, garden space, flame, and lyric sound strengthen later, while prestige-coded and heroic-courtly vocabulary is weighted earlier. Century-specific graphs show change in arrangement as well as membership. Modularity rises, cross-scope linkage declines, courtly bridges weaken, and sacred bridges strengthen. Hub positions shift too: Kherqe (Sufi Robe) gains late prominence, Farkhondeh {Blessed} and Banafsheh (Violet) recede, and Saaghar (Wine Cup) stays central across the chronology. In this corpus, Persian symbolism appears less as a fixed repertory than as a long-lived system whose internal weights and connections change over time.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过计算分析129,451首波斯诗歌，发现波斯诗歌的象征系统是一个随时间变化的动态网络，而非固定不变的符号库
AI.motivation: 传统计算分析往往将波斯诗歌简化为孤立的词语或宽泛的文档语义，忽略了波斯诗学中一个重要的组织单元：相关形式以家族形式传播并通过重复关系获得力量
AI.method: 使用129,451首诗歌语料库，将重复形式整合为可追踪的家族，分离意象材料与神圣和宫廷参照，并在多层图中映射它们的关系，按11个希吉拉世纪进行时间分析
AI.result: 象征核心相对稀疏，参照部分更密集，两者间的连接具有选择性而非扩散性。时间分析显示：某些家族（如夜、日、土）分布广泛；酒器、花园空间、火焰和抒情声音后期增强；声望编码和英雄宫廷词汇早期权重更高；模块性增加，跨范围连接减少，宫廷桥梁减弱，神圣桥梁增强
AI.conclusion: 波斯象征主义不是一个固定的符号库，而是一个长期存在的系统，其内部权重和连接随时间变化，具有动态演变的特性

title: Strong Convergence of FISTA for Affinely Constrained Convex Quadratic Minimization
summary:
In October 2025, research by Boţ, Fadili, and Nguyen, and by Jang and Ryu, led to the seminal result that Beck and Teboulle's FISTA converges weakly to a minimizer of the sum of two convex functions resolving a long-standing open problem. The first strong convergence result was obtained in November 2025 by Moursi, Naguib, Pavlovic, and Vavasis for affinely constrained convex minimization provided certain closedness conditions hold.
  In this paper, we prove strong convergence in the affine-quadratic case without any closedness assumption. Specializing this to the unconstrained case, we obtain the strong convergence of Nesterov's accelerated gradient method when applied to a convex quadratic objective function.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在仿射二次情况下FISTA算法的强收敛性，无需闭集假设，并由此得到Nesterov加速梯度法在凸二次目标函数上的强收敛性。
AI.motivation: 2025年10月的研究解决了FISTA弱收敛到凸函数和最小化器的长期开放问题，同年11月获得了仿射约束凸最小化问题的第一个强收敛结果，但需要闭集假设。本文旨在消除这一假设。
AI.method: 专注于仿射二次情况，通过数学分析证明强收敛性，无需闭集条件，并将结果特化到无约束情况。
AI.result: 证明了仿射二次情况下FISTA算法的强收敛性，无需闭集假设，并由此得到Nesterov加速梯度法在凸二次目标函数上的强收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 本文在更弱的条件下证明了加速梯度方法的强收敛性，为凸二次优化问题提供了理论保证，扩展了先前结果的应用范围。

title: Soft MPCritic: Amortized Model Predictive Value Iteration
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) and model predictive control (MPC) offer complementary strengths, yet combining them at scale remains computationally challenging. We propose soft MPCritic, an RL-MPC framework that learns in (soft) value space while using sample-based planning for both online control and value target generation. soft MPCritic instantiates MPC through model predictive path integral control (MPPI) and trains a terminal Q-function with fitted value iteration, aligning the learned value function with the planner and implicitly extending the effective planning horizon. We introduce an amortized warm-start strategy that recycles planned open-loop action sequences from online observations when computing batched MPPI-based value targets. This makes soft MPCritic computationally practical, while preserving solution quality. soft MPCritic plans in a scenario-based fashion with an ensemble of dynamic models trained for next-step prediction accuracy. Together, these ingredients enable soft MPCritic to learn effectively through robust, short-horizon planning on classic and complex control tasks. These results establish soft MPCritic as a practical and scalable blueprint for synthesizing MPC policies in settings where policy extraction and direct, long-horizon planning may fail.

AI.tldr: 软MPCritic是一个结合强化学习和模型预测控制的框架，通过在软值空间学习并使用基于样本的规划进行在线控制和价值目标生成，实现计算高效的RL-MPC融合。
AI.motivation: 强化学习（RL）和模型预测控制（MPC）各有优势但难以大规模结合，现有方法在计算上具有挑战性，特别是在需要长时域规划或策略提取困难的场景中。
AI.method: 使用模型预测路径积分控制（MPPI）实例化MPC，通过拟合价值迭代训练终端Q函数，使学习到的价值函数与规划器对齐并隐式扩展有效规划时域。引入摊销预热启动策略，重用在线观测的计划开环动作序列来计算批处理MPPI价值目标。
AI.result: 软MPCritic在经典和复杂控制任务中通过鲁棒的短时域规划有效学习，在保持解质量的同时实现计算可行性，成为在策略提取和直接长时域规划可能失败的场景中合成MPC策略的实用蓝图。
AI.conclusion: 软MPCritic为RL-MPC融合提供了实用且可扩展的框架，通过软值空间学习和摊销预热启动策略解决了计算挑战，使MPC策略在复杂控制任务中的合成变得可行。

title: Global Geometry of Orthogonal Foliations in the Control Allocation of Signed-Quadratic Systems
summary: This work formalizes the differential topology of redundancy resolution for systems governed by signed-quadratic actuation maps. By analyzing the minimally redundant case, the global topology of the continuous fiber bundle defining the nonlinear actuation null-space is established. The distribution orthogonal to these fibers is proven to be globally integrable and governed by an exact logarithmic potential field. This field foliates the actuator space, inducing a structural stratification of all orthants into transverse layers whose combinatorial sizes follow a strictly binomial progression. Within these layers, adjacent orthants are continuously connected via lower-dimensional strata termed reciprocal hinges, while the layers themselves are separated by boundary hyperplanes, or portals, that act as global sections of the fibers. This partition formally distinguishes extremal and transitional layers, which exhibit fundamentally distinct fiber topologies and foliation properties. Through this geometric framework, classical pseudo-linear static allocation strategies are shown to inevitably intersect singular boundary hyperplanes, triggering infinite-derivative kinetic singularities and fragmenting the task space into an exponential number of singularity-separated sectors. In contrast, allocators derived from the orthogonal manifolds yield continuously differentiable global sections with only a linear number of sectors for transversal layers, or can even form a single global diffeomorphism to the task space in the case of the two extremal layers, thus completely avoiding geometric rank-loss and boundary-crossing singularities. These theoretical results directly apply to the control allocation of propeller-driven architectures, including multirotor UAVs, marine, and underwater vehicles.

AI.tldr: 论文建立了带符号二次驱动映射系统冗余解析的微分拓扑框架，揭示了传统伪线性分配策略必然触发奇异边界，而基于正交流形的分配器能避免几何秩损失和边界穿越奇异性。
AI.motivation: 研究带符号二次驱动映射系统的冗余解析微分拓扑，旨在理解非线性驱动零空间的全局拓扑结构，解决传统分配策略中的奇异性问题，为多旋翼无人机、海洋和水下航行器等推进器驱动架构的控制分配提供理论基础。
AI.method: 通过分析最小冗余情况，建立连续纤维丛的全局拓扑；证明正交于纤维的分布全局可积且由精确对数势场控制；将执行器空间分层为横向层，其组合大小遵循严格二项式级数；比较传统伪线性分配策略与基于正交流形分配器的性能差异。
AI.result: 传统伪线性分配策略必然与奇异边界超平面相交，触发无限导数动力学奇异性，将任务空间分割成指数级数量的奇异性分离扇区；而基于正交流形的分配器产生连续可微全局截面，横向层仅需线性数量扇区，极端层甚至能形成单一全局微分同胚，完全避免几何秩损失和边界穿越奇异性。
AI.conclusion: 该几何框架为推进器驱动架构的控制分配提供了理论基础，揭示了基于正交流形的分配器在避免奇异性方面的优越性，对多旋翼无人机、海洋和水下航行器等实际应用具有直接指导意义。

title: LLM Agents as Social Scientists: A Human-AI Collaborative Platform for Social Science Automation
summary: Traditional social science research often requires designing complex experiments across vast methodological spaces and depends on real human participants, making it labor-intensive, costly, and difficult to scale. Here we present S-Researcher, an LLM-agent-based platform that assists researchers in conducting social science research more efficiently and at greater scale by "siliconizing" both the research process and the participant pool. To build S-Researcher, we first develop YuLan-OneSim, a large-scale social simulation system designed around three core requirements: generality via auto-programming from natural language to executable scenarios, scalability via a distributed architecture supporting up to 100,000 concurrent agents, and reliability via feedback-driven LLM fine-tuning. Leveraging this system, S-Researcher supports researchers in designing social experiments, simulating human behavior with LLM agents, analyzing results, and generating reports, forming a complete human-AI collaborative research loop in which researchers retain oversight and intervention at every stage. We operationalize LLM simulation research paradigms into three canonical reasoning modes (induction, deduction, and abduction) and validate S-Researcher through systematic case studies: inductive reproduction of cultural dynamics consistent with Axelrod's theory, deductive testing of competing hypotheses on teacher attention validated against survey data, and abductive identification of a cooperation mechanism in public goods games confirmed by human experiments. S-Researcher establishes a new human--AI collaborative paradigm for social science, in which computational simulation augments human researchers to accelerate discovery across the full spectrum of social inquiry.

AI.tldr: S-Researcher是一个基于LLM代理的平台，通过"硅化"研究过程和参与者池，帮助研究人员更高效、大规模地进行社会科学研究。
AI.motivation: 传统社会科学研究需要设计复杂的实验，依赖真实人类参与者，导致研究劳动密集、成本高昂且难以扩展。需要一种更高效、可扩展的研究方法。
AI.method: 首先开发YuLan-OneSim大规模社交模拟系统，具有三个核心特性：通过自然语言自动编程实现通用性，通过分布式架构支持高达10万并发代理实现可扩展性，通过反馈驱动的LLM微调实现可靠性。在此基础上，S-Researcher支持研究人员设计社会实验、用LLM代理模拟人类行为、分析结果和生成报告。
AI.result: 通过系统案例研究验证了S-Researcher的有效性：归纳再现了与Axelrod理论一致的文化动态，演绎测试了关于教师注意力的竞争假设并与调查数据验证，溯因识别了公共物品游戏中的合作机制并通过人类实验确认。
AI.conclusion: S-Researcher建立了一种新的人机协作社会科学研究范式，其中计算模拟增强人类研究人员，加速整个社会科学研究领域的发现。

title: Day-Ahead Offering for Virtual Power Plants: A Stochastic Linear Programming Reformulation and Projected Subgradient Method
summary: Virtual power plants (VPPs) are an emerging paradigm that aggregates distributed energy resources (DERs) for coordinated participation in power systems, including bidding as a single dispatchable entity in the wholesale market. In this paper, we address a critical operational challenge for VPPs: the day-ahead offering problem under highly intermittent and uncertain DER outputs and market prices. The day-ahead offering problem determines the price-quantity pairs submitted by VPPs while balancing profit opportunities against operational uncertainties. First, we formulate the problem as a scenario-based two-stage stochastic adaptive robust optimization problem, where the uncertainty of the locational marginal prices follows a Markov process and DER uncertainty is characterized by static uncertainty sets. Then, motivated by the outer approximation principle of the column-and-constraint generation (CC&G) algorithm, we propose a novel inner approximation-based projected subgradient method. By exploiting the problem structure, we propose two novel approaches to improve computational tractability. First, we show that under mild modeling assumptions, the robust second-stage problem can be equivalently reformulated as a linear program (LP) with a nested resource allocation structure that is amenable to an efficient greedy algorithm. Furthermore, motivated by the computational efficiency of solving the reformulated primal second-stage problem and the isotonic structure of the first-stage feasible region, we propose an efficient projected subgradient algorithm to solve the overall stochastic LP problem. Extensive computational experiments using real-world data demonstrate that the overall projected subgradient descent method achieves about two orders of magnitude speedup over CC&G while maintaining solution quality.

AI.tldr: 提出基于内近似的投影次梯度方法，解决虚拟电厂日前报价问题，相比传统CC&G算法获得百倍加速。
AI.motivation: 虚拟电厂(VPP)聚合分布式能源参与电力市场，面临可再生能源输出和市场价格的间歇性与不确定性挑战，需要高效的日前报价决策方法。
AI.method: 1) 将问题建模为基于场景的两阶段随机自适应鲁棒优化；2) 提出内近似投影次梯度方法；3) 将鲁棒第二阶段问题等价转化为具有嵌套资源分配结构的线性规划；4) 利用问题结构设计高效贪婪算法。
AI.result: 基于真实数据的计算实验表明，投影次梯度下降方法相比列与约束生成算法(CC&G)获得约两个数量级的加速，同时保持解的质量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的内近似投影次梯度方法能有效解决VPP日前报价问题，在计算效率和求解质量上优于传统方法，为虚拟电厂运营提供实用工具。

title: DISCO-TAB: A Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning Framework for Privacy-Preserving Synthesis of Complex Clinical Data
summary: The development of robust clinical decision support systems is frequently impeded by the scarcity of high-fidelity, privacy-preserving biomedical data. While Generative Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a promising avenue for synthetic data generation, they often struggle to capture the complex, non-linear dependencies and severe class imbalances inherent in Electronic Health Records (EHR), leading to statistically plausible but clinically invalid records. To bridge this gap, we introduce DISCO-TAB (DIScriminator-guided COntrol for TABular synthesis), a novel framework that orchestrates a fine-tuned LLM with a multi-objective discriminator system optimized via Reinforcement Learning. Unlike prior methods relying on scalar feedback, DISCO-TAB evaluates synthesis at four granularities, token, sentence, feature, and row, while integrating Automated Constraint Discovery and Inverse-Frequency Reward Shaping to autonomously preserve latent medical logic and resolve minority-class collapse. We rigorously validate our framework across diverse benchmarks, including high-dimensional, small-sample medical datasets (e.g., Heart Failure, Parkinson's). Our results demonstrate that hierarchical feedback yields state-of-the-art performance, achieving up to 38.2% improvement in downstream clinical classifier utility compared to GAN and Diffusion baselines, while ensuring exceptional statistical fidelity (JSD < 0.01) and robust resistance to membership inference attacks. This work establishes a new standard for generating trustworthy, utility-preserving synthetic tabular data for sensitive healthcare applications.

AI.tldr: DISCO-TAB是一个基于LLM和强化学习的医疗表格数据生成框架，通过多层次判别器和自动约束发现，解决医疗数据稀缺和类别不平衡问题，在临床分类任务上比传统方法提升38.2%
AI.motivation: 临床决策支持系统常受限于高质量、隐私保护的医疗数据稀缺。现有LLM生成的合成数据难以捕捉电子健康记录中的复杂非线性依赖和严重类别不平衡，导致数据统计上合理但临床无效。
AI.method: 提出DISCO-TAB框架：1）使用微调的LLM生成表格数据；2）通过强化学习优化的多层次判别器系统（token、句子、特征、行四个粒度评估）；3）集成自动约束发现和逆频率奖励塑造，自动保持潜在医学逻辑并解决少数类别崩溃问题。
AI.result: 在心力衰竭、帕金森等高维小样本医疗数据集上验证，分层反馈实现最先进性能：1）下游临床分类器效用比GAN和扩散基线提升达38.2%；2）统计保真度优异（JSD < 0.01）；3）对成员推理攻击具有强大抵抗力。
AI.conclusion: DISCO-TAB为敏感医疗应用建立了生成可信、效用保持的合成表格数据的新标准，解决了医疗数据生成中的关键挑战。

title: A Weak Notion of Symmetry for Dynamical Systems
summary: Many nonlinear dynamical systems exhibit symmetry, affording substantial benefits for control design, observer architecture, and data-driven control. While the classical notion of group invariance enables a cascade decomposition of the system into highly structured subsystems, it demands very rigid structure in the original system. Conversely, much more general notions (e.g., partial symmetry) have been shown to be sufficient for obtaining less-structured decompositions. In this work, we propose a middle ground termed "weak invariance", studying diffeomorphisms (resp., vector fields) that are group invariant up to a diffeomorphism of (resp., vector field on) the symmetry group. Remarkably, we prove that weak invariance implies that this diffeomorphism of (resp., vector field on) the symmetry group must be an automorphism (resp., group linear). Additionally, we demonstrate that a vector field is weakly invariant if and only if its flow is weakly invariant, where the associated group linear vector field generates the associated automorphisms. Finally, we show that weakly invariant systems admit a cascade decomposition in which the dynamics are group affine along the orbits. Weak invariance thus generalizes both classical invariance and the important class of group affine dynamical systems on Lie groups, laying a foundation for new methods of symmetry-informed control and observer design.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"弱不变性"概念，研究在对称群上的微分同胚（或向量场）作用下保持群不变性的系统，证明这种结构导致群自同构，并展示弱不变系统具有轨道上的群仿射动力学级联分解。
AI.motivation: 传统群不变性要求系统具有非常刚性的结构，而部分对称性等更一般的概念只能得到较少结构的分解。本文寻求一个中间立场，既能保持对称性带来的控制设计优势，又允许更灵活的系统结构。
AI.method: 提出"弱不变性"概念，研究在对称群上的微分同胚（或向量场）作用下保持群不变性的系统。证明弱不变性必然导致对称群上的微分同胚是自同构，向量场是群线性的。建立向量场弱不变性与流弱不变性的等价关系。
AI.result: 证明弱不变系统具有级联分解，其中动力学沿轨道是群仿射的。弱不变性同时推广了经典不变性和李群上的群仿射动力系统这一重要类别。
AI.conclusion: 弱不变性为对称性启发的控制和观测器设计提供了新方法的基础，既保持了对称性的优势，又允许更广泛的系统结构，是经典不变性和部分对称性之间的有效折衷。

title: A Role-Based LLM Framework for Structured Information Extraction from Healthy Food Policies
summary: Current Large Language Model (LLM) approaches for information extraction (IE) in the healthy food policy domain are often hindered by various factors, including misinformation, specifically hallucinations, misclassifications, and omissions that result from the structural diversity and inconsistency of policy documents. To address these limitations, this study proposes a role-based LLM framework that automates the IE from unstructured policy data by assigning specialized roles: an LLM policy analyst for metadata and mechanism classification, an LLM legal strategy specialist for identifying complex legal approaches, and an LLM food system expert for categorizing food system stages. This framework mimics expert analysis workflows by incorporating structured domain knowledge, including explicit definitions of legal mechanisms and classification criteria, into role-specific prompts. We evaluate the framework using 608 healthy food policies from the Healthy Food Policy Project (HFPP) database, comparing its performance against zero-shot, few-shot, and chain-of-thought (CoT) baselines using Llama-3.3-70B. Our proposed framework demonstrates superior performance in complex reasoning tasks, offering a reliable and transparent methodology for automating IE from health policies.

AI.tldr: 提出基于角色分工的LLM框架，用于健康食品政策的信息抽取，通过分配不同专家角色解决政策文档结构多样性和不一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在健康食品政策领域的信息抽取面临挑战，包括幻觉、误分类和遗漏等问题，主要源于政策文档的结构多样性和不一致性。
AI.method: 设计角色化LLM框架：1) LLM政策分析师负责元数据和机制分类；2) LLM法律策略专家识别复杂法律方法；3) LLM食品系统专家分类食品系统阶段。通过将结构化领域知识融入角色特定提示来模拟专家工作流程。
AI.result: 在Healthy Food Policy Project数据库的608个政策上评估，使用Llama-3.3-70B模型，相比零样本、少样本和思维链基线，该框架在复杂推理任务上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 提出的角色化LLM框架为健康政策信息抽取提供了可靠、透明的自动化方法，在复杂推理任务中表现优异。

title: Why Instruction-Based Unlearning Fails in Diffusion Models?
summary: Instruction-based unlearning has proven effective for modifying the behavior of large language models at inference time, but whether this paradigm extends to other generative models remains unclear. In this work, we investigate instruction-based unlearning in diffusion-based image generation models and show, through controlled experiments across multiple concepts and prompt variants, that diffusion models systematically fail to suppress targeted concepts when guided solely by natural-language unlearning instructions. By analyzing both the CLIP text encoder and cross-attention dynamics during the denoising process, we find that unlearning instructions do not induce sustained reductions in attention to the targeted concept tokens, causing the targeted concept representations to persist throughout generation. These results reveal a fundamental limitation of prompt-level instruction in diffusion models and suggest that effective unlearning requires interventions beyond inference-time language control.

AI.tldr: 扩散模型无法通过自然语言指令有效遗忘特定概念，指令遗忘在图像生成模型中存在根本性限制
AI.motivation: 研究指令遗忘范式是否适用于扩散模型等非语言生成模型，探索仅通过自然语言指令能否有效抑制图像生成中的特定概念
AI.method: 通过多概念和多提示变体的控制实验，分析CLIP文本编码器和去噪过程中的交叉注意力动态，测量目标概念token的注意力变化
AI.result: 扩散模型无法通过自然语言遗忘指令有效抑制目标概念，遗忘指令不会持续降低对目标概念token的注意力，导致目标概念表征在整个生成过程中持续存在
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型存在基于提示指令遗忘的根本性限制，有效的遗忘需要超越推理时语言控制的干预措施

title: State-constrained optimal control of the continuity equation and infinite-dimensional viscosity solutions
summary: We study a finite horizon optimal control problem for the continuity equation under a weighted integral state constraint on the mass outside a fixed set. The model is cast in a Hilbert framework for densities. On a suitable invariant compact subset, we prove that the value function is Lipschitz continuous and satisfies, by dynamic programming, the associated infinite dimensional constrained Hamilton Jacobi Bellman equation in viscosity sense (subsolution in the interior, supersolution up to the boundary). We finally prove a comparison principle and uniqueness in the Lipschitz class.

AI.tldr: 研究带加权积分状态约束的连续性方程有限时域最优控制问题，在希尔伯特密度框架下建立值函数的Lipschitz连续性，证明其满足无限维约束HJB方程的粘性解性质，并建立比较原理和唯一性。
AI.motivation: 研究连续性方程在固定集外质量加权积分状态约束下的最优控制问题，这类问题在人口动力学、交通流等应用中具有重要意义。需要处理无限维状态空间和状态约束带来的理论挑战。
AI.method: 采用希尔伯特密度框架，在合适的紧不变子集上分析。通过动态规划方法，证明值函数满足无限维约束HJB方程的粘性解性质（内部为下解，边界为上解）。建立比较原理和唯一性结果。
AI.result: 证明了值函数在紧不变子集上是Lipschitz连续的，满足无限维约束HJB方程的粘性解性质，并建立了比较原理，从而在Lipschitz函数类中获得了唯一性。
AI.conclusion: 成功建立了带加权积分状态约束的连续性方程最优控制问题的理论框架，为无限维约束最优控制问题提供了粘性解理论和比较原理，为后续应用研究奠定了基础。

title: CuTeGen: An LLM-Based Agentic Framework for Generation and Optimization of High-Performance GPU Kernels using CuTe
summary: High-performance GPU kernels are critical to modern machine learning systems, yet developing efficient implementations remains a challenging, expert-driven process due to the tight coupling between algorithmic structure, memory hierarchy usage, and hardware-specific optimizations. Recent work has explored using large language models (LLMs) to generate GPU kernels automatically, but generated implementations often struggle to maintain correctness and achieve competitive performance across iterative refinements. We present CuTeGen, an agentic framework for automated generation and optimization of GPU kernels that treats kernel development as a structured generate--test--refine workflow. Unlike approaches that rely on one-shot generation or large-scale search over candidate implementations, CuTeGen focuses on progressive refinement of a single evolving kernel through execution-based validation, structured debugging, and staged optimization. A key design choice is to generate kernels using the CuTe abstraction layer, which exposes performance-critical structures such as tiling and data movement while providing a more stable representation for iterative modification. To guide performance improvement, CuTeGen incorporates workload-aware optimization prompts and delayed integration of profiling feedback. Experimental results on matrix multiplication and activation workloads demonstrate that the framework produces functionally correct kernels and achieves competitive performance relative to optimized library implementations.

AI.tldr: CuTeGen是一个基于代理的框架，用于自动生成和优化GPU内核，通过结构化生成-测试-精炼工作流程，使用CuTe抽象层实现渐进式优化。
AI.motivation: 开发高性能GPU内核是一个专家驱动的挑战性过程，现有LLM生成方法难以同时保证正确性和性能。需要一种能够迭代优化、保持正确性并达到竞争力的性能的方法。
AI.method: 采用代理框架，将内核开发视为结构化生成-测试-精炼工作流程。使用CuTe抽象层生成内核，通过执行验证、结构化调试和分阶段优化进行渐进式精炼，结合工作负载感知优化提示和延迟集成性能分析反馈。
AI.result: 在矩阵乘法和激活函数工作负载上的实验表明，该框架能够生成功能正确的内核，并达到与优化库实现相竞争的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: CuTeGen通过结构化迭代优化方法，结合CuTe抽象层的稳定性，能够自动生成既正确又高性能的GPU内核，为机器学习系统的高性能计算提供有效解决方案。

title: PLL Based Sub-/Super-synchronous Resonance Damping Controller for D-PMSG Wind Farm Integrated Power Systems
summary: Existing sub-/super-synchronous (SSO) suppression methods for the direct-drive permanent magnet synchronous generators (D-PMSG) integrated power systems are mainly achieved by external devices or sub-synchronous resonance damping controller (SSRDC) at the converters, facing challenges of considerable control costs, complex parameters tuning, or inadaptability to various operating conditions. To address these problems, this paper proposes an adaptive SSRDC based on the phase-locked loop (PLL) for D-PMSG integrated power systems. Firstly, the PLL parameter is found critical to SSO suppression by a comprehensive sensitivity analysis on the dominant poles of the impedance closed-loop transfer function. Motivated by this finding, this paper then designs a PLL-based SSRDC, which features a simple structure, easy parameter tuning, and flexible adaptability to various operating modes. The simplicity in structure is guaranteed by the avoidance of phase compensation. Benefiting from the simple structure, only one key parameter needs to be tuned. Moreover, two principles of parameter tuning are proposed to enhance the efficiency, robustness, and adaptability of the proposed SSRDC. The controller-hardware-in-the-loop (CHIL) tests verify the validity of the proposed SSRDC under various operating conditions. Finally, some concerns about this method such as frequency estimation, computational efficiency and potential impacts on PLL are thoroughly analyzed and clarified.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于锁相环的自适应次同步谐振阻尼控制器，用于直驱永磁同步发电机并网系统，具有结构简单、参数易调、适应性强等优点。
AI.motivation: 现有D-PMSG并网系统的次/超同步振荡抑制方法主要依赖外部设备或变流器的次同步谐振阻尼控制器，存在控制成本高、参数整定复杂、难以适应多种运行工况等问题。
AI.method: 通过阻抗闭环传递函数主导极点的综合灵敏度分析，发现锁相环参数对次同步振荡抑制至关重要；基于此设计了一种基于锁相环的次同步谐振阻尼控制器，避免了相位补偿，结构简单，仅需整定一个关键参数，并提出两种参数整定原则。
AI.result: 控制器硬件在环测试验证了所提控制器在各种运行工况下的有效性，并对频率估计、计算效率和锁相环潜在影响等问题进行了深入分析和澄清。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于锁相环的自适应次同步谐振阻尼控制器能有效抑制D-PMSG并网系统的次同步振荡，具有结构简单、参数易调、适应性强等优势，解决了现有方法的不足。

title: PHMForge: A Scenario-Driven Agentic Benchmark for Industrial Asset Lifecycle Maintenance
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed for complex tool-orchestration tasks, yet existing benchmarks fail to capture the rigorous demands of industrial domains where incorrect decisions carry significant safety and financial consequences. To address this critical gap, we introduce PHMForge, the first comprehensive benchmark specifically designed to evaluate LLM agents on Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) tasks through realistic interactions with domain-specific MCP servers. Our benchmark encompasses 75 expert-curated scenarios spanning 7 industrial asset classes (turbofan engines, bearings, electric motors, gearboxes, aero-engines) across 5 core task categories: Remaining Useful Life (RUL) Prediction, Fault Classification, Engine Health Analysis, Cost-Benefit Analysis, and Safety/Policy Evaluation. To enable rigorous evaluation, we construct 65 specialized tools across two MCP servers and implement execution-based evaluators with task-commensurate metrics: MAE/RMSE for regression, F1-score for classification, and categorical matching for health assessments. Through extensive evaluation of leading frameworks (ReAct, Cursor Agent, Claude Code) paired with frontier LLMs (Claude Sonnet 4.0, GPT-4o, Granite-3.0-8B), we find that even top-performing configurations achieve only 68\% task completion, with systematic failures in tool orchestration (23\% incorrect sequencing), multi-asset reasoning (14.9 percentage point degradation), and cross-equipment generalization (42.7\% on held-out datasets). We open-source our complete benchmark, including scenario specifications, ground truth templates, tool implementations, and evaluation scripts, to catalyze research in agentic industrial AI.

AI.tldr: PHMForge是首个针对工业预测与健康管理(PHM)任务的LLM智能体基准测试，包含75个专家设计的场景、65个专用工具，评估结果显示当前最佳配置仅完成68%任务，存在工具编排、多资产推理和跨设备泛化等系统性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试无法满足工业领域对LLM智能体的严格要求，工业决策错误会带来重大安全和财务后果。需要专门针对预测与健康管理(PHM)任务的基准测试来评估LLM智能体在工业环境中的实际表现。
AI.method: 构建PHMForge基准测试，包含75个专家设计的场景，涵盖7类工业资产和5个核心任务类别。开发65个专用工具分布在两个MCP服务器上，实现基于执行的评估器，使用MAE/RMSE（回归）、F1分数（分类）和分类匹配（健康评估）等任务适配指标。
AI.result: 评估领先框架（ReAct、Cursor Agent、Claude Code）与前沿LLM（Claude Sonnet 4.0、GPT-4o、Granite-3.0-8B）的组合，发现即使最佳配置也仅完成68%任务。存在系统性失败：23%工具编排错误、多资产推理性能下降14.9个百分点、在未见数据集上泛化能力仅42.7%。
AI.conclusion: PHMForge揭示了当前LLM智能体在工业PHM任务中的显著局限性，特别是在工具编排、多资产推理和跨设备泛化方面。开源完整基准测试以促进工业AI智能体研究。

title: Read More, Think More: Revisiting Observation Reduction for Web Agents
summary: Web agents based on large language models (LLMs) rely on observations of web pages -- commonly represented as HTML -- as the basis for identifying available actions and planning subsequent steps. Prior work has treated the verbosity of HTML as an obstacle to performance and adopted observation reduction as a standard practice. We revisit this trend and demonstrate that the optimal observation representation depends on model capability and thinking token budget: (1) compact observations (accessibility trees) are preferable for lower-capability models, while detailed observations (HTML) are advantageous for higher-capability models; moreover, increasing thinking tokens further amplifies the benefit of HTML. (2) Our error analysis suggests that higher-capability models exploit layout information in HTML for better action grounding, while lower-capability models suffer from increased hallucination under longer inputs. We also find that incorporating observation history improves performance across most models and settings, and a diff-based representation offers a token-efficient alternative. Based on these findings, we suggest practical guidelines: adaptively select observation representations based on model capability and thinking token budget, and incorporate observation history using diff-based representations.

AI.tldr: 研究发现网页代理的最佳观察表示取决于模型能力和思考token预算：低能力模型适合紧凑表示（无障碍树），高能力模型适合详细HTML表示，且增加思考token会放大HTML优势。建议根据模型能力自适应选择观察表示，并使用差异表示整合观察历史。
AI.motivation: 重新审视网页代理中HTML冗长性问题，挑战将HTML简洁化作为标准实践的观点，探索不同模型能力和资源条件下最优观察表示的选择。
AI.method: 通过实验分析不同能力模型在不同观察表示（HTML vs 无障碍树）和思考token预算下的表现，进行错误分析，并测试观察历史和差异表示的效果。
AI.result: 发现观察表示的最优选择取决于模型能力：低能力模型在紧凑表示下表现更好，高能力模型在详细HTML下表现更优；增加思考token会增强HTML优势；观察历史能提升大多数模型性能；差异表示是token高效的选择。
AI.conclusion: 提出实用指南：根据模型能力和思考token预算自适应选择观察表示，使用差异表示整合观察历史，为网页代理系统设计提供数据驱动的建议。

title: Improving Operational Feasibility in Large-Scale Power System Planning
summary: Large-scale power system planning mostly uses linearized, active power only approximations of the power flow equations, ignores many operational constraints, and tests the operational feasibility of the resulting systems only under strongly simplifying assumptions. We propose an approach to obtain solutions to large instances of the alternating current capacity expansion problem via redispatch and reinforcement of an initial solution. The problem formulation considers simultaneous expansion of generators, reactive compensation devices, storage systems, and transmission. Furthermore, it includes operational constraints via startup procedures and capability curves of power sources and simplified stability limits via constraints on voltage angle differences and voltage magnitudes. To obtain initial solutions, we test several established and partly modified power flow approximations and integrate them into an approach for iterative transmission expansion planning, thereby obtaining convex formulations. We demonstrate the approach on large problem instances covering the islands of Great Britain and Ireland at the transmission level, for which we extend the open data source to model reactive power. We find that including transmission losses to determine the initial solution is most decisive, as the amount of redispatch and reinforcements necessary to obtain an alternating current feasible solution is reduced, whereas incorporating reactive power constraints did not lead to further improvements. Our approach ensures an alternating current feasible system under weak assumptions, thus guaranteeing steady-state voltage stability and allowing subsequent dynamic grid simulations, which is instrumental for planning stable future inverter-dominated power systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过重调度和强化初始解来解决大规模交流容量扩展问题的方法，确保交流可行性并支持后续动态电网仿真
AI.motivation: 现有大规模电力系统规划主要使用线性化、仅考虑有功功率的潮流方程近似，忽略许多运行约束，并在强简化假设下测试系统运行可行性，这无法保证交流可行性
AI.method: 通过重调度和强化初始解获得交流容量扩展问题的解决方案；考虑发电机、无功补偿设备、储能系统和输电的同时扩展；包括启动程序和功率源能力曲线的运行约束，以及电压角差和电压幅度的简化稳定性限制；测试多种现有和改进的潮流近似方法，并将其集成到迭代输电扩展规划方法中，获得凸规划公式
AI.result: 在大不列颠和爱尔兰岛屿的输电级大规模问题实例上验证了该方法；发现包含输电损耗来确定初始解最为关键，可减少获得交流可行解所需的重新调度和强化量；而纳入无功功率约束并未带来进一步改进
AI.conclusion: 该方法在弱假设下确保交流可行系统，保证稳态电压稳定性，并允许后续动态电网仿真，这对于规划未来以逆变器为主的稳定电力系统至关重要

title: Matching Accuracy, Different Geometry: Evolution Strategies vs GRPO in LLM Post-Training
summary: Evolution Strategies (ES) have emerged as a scalable gradient-free alternative to reinforcement learning based LLM fine-tuning, but it remains unclear whether comparable task performance implies comparable solutions in parameter space. We compare ES and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) across four tasks in both single-task and sequential continual-learning settings. ES matches or exceeds GRPO in single-task accuracy and remains competitive sequentially when its iteration budget is controlled. Despite this similarity in task performance, the two methods produce markedly different model updates: ES makes much larger changes and induces broader off-task KL drift, whereas GRPO makes smaller, more localized updates. Strikingly, the ES and GRPO solutions are linearly connected with no loss barrier, even though their update directions are nearly orthogonal. We develop an analytical theory of ES that explains all these phenomena within a unified framework, showing how ES can accumulate large off-task movement on weakly informative directions while still making enough progress on the task to match gradient-based RL in downstream accuracy. These results show that gradient-free and gradient-based fine-tuning can reach similarly accurate yet geometrically distinct solutions, with important consequences for forgetting and knowledge preservation. The source code is publicly available: https://github.com/Bhoy1/ESvsGRPO.

AI.tldr: 比较进化策略(ES)和基于梯度的强化学习(GRPO)在LLM微调中的表现，发现两者任务性能相似但参数更新方式截然不同，ES产生更大更广泛的更新，而GRPO更局部化，但两种方法的解在参数空间中是线性连接的。
AI.motivation: 进化策略(ES)作为无梯度的可扩展替代方案出现，但尚不清楚其与基于梯度的强化学习(GRPO)在任务性能相似时，是否在参数空间中也产生相似的解。需要比较两种方法在单任务和顺序持续学习设置中的差异。
AI.method: 在四个任务上比较ES和GRPO，包括单任务和顺序持续学习设置。控制ES的迭代预算以确保公平比较。分析两种方法的模型更新差异、KL漂移和参数空间几何关系。开发ES的解析理论来解释观察到的现象。
AI.result: ES在单任务准确率上匹配或超过GRPO，在顺序学习中保持竞争力。尽管任务性能相似，但ES产生更大、更广泛的更新和离任务KL漂移，而GRPO更新更小、更局部化。有趣的是，两种方法的解在参数空间中是线性连接的，没有损失障碍，尽管它们的更新方向几乎正交。
AI.conclusion: 基于梯度和无梯度的微调方法可以达到相似准确但几何上截然不同的解，这对遗忘和知识保存有重要影响。ES可以在弱信息方向上积累大的离任务移动，同时在任务上取得足够进展以匹配基于梯度的RL。

title: A Data-Aided Power Transformer Differential Protection without Inrush Blocking Module
summary: When a slightly faulty transformer closes without load, the current waveform presents the coexistence of inrush and fault current. At this time, the inrush blocking module will block the relay, which may delay the removal of the slight fault and lead to more serious faults. To address this problem, this paper proposes a data-aided power transformer differential protection without inrush blocking module. The key to eliminating the negative influence of inrush current is to extract the fundamental component from the non-inrush part of the current waveform, which corresponds to the unsaturation period of the transformer core. Firstly, a data-aided module, namely an Attention module embedded Fully Convolutional Network (A-FCN), is built to distinguish the inrush and non-inrush parts of the current waveform. Then, a physical model of the current waveform is built for the non-inrush part, and the fundamental component is extracted by the nonlinear least square (NLS) algorithm. The proposed method can avoid the block of differential protections when inrush current occurs, which improves the sensitivity and rapidity of the relay, especially in the case of a weak internal fault hidden in inrush current. Finally, simulation and experimental data verify the effectiveness and generalization of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需励磁涌流闭锁模块的数据辅助式电力变压器差动保护方法，通过识别电流波形中的非涌流部分提取基波分量，提高保护灵敏度和速动性。
AI.motivation: 当变压器空载合闸时，轻微故障电流与励磁涌流共存，传统涌流闭锁模块会闭锁保护，导致轻微故障切除延迟，可能引发更严重故障。
AI.method: 1) 构建注意力模块嵌入的全卷积网络(A-FCN)区分电流波形中的涌流和非涌流部分；2) 对非涌流部分建立物理模型，通过非线性最小二乘(NLS)算法提取基波分量。
AI.result: 该方法能避免励磁涌流发生时差动保护的闭锁，提高保护的灵敏度和速动性，特别是在涌流中隐藏微弱内部故障的情况下。仿真和实验数据验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的数据辅助式变压器差动保护方法无需涌流闭锁模块，通过智能识别涌流和非涌流部分并提取基波分量，有效解决了涌流闭锁导致的保护延迟问题，提高了保护性能。

title: RAE-AR: Taming Autoregressive Models with Representation Autoencoders
summary: The latent space of generative modeling is long dominated by the VAE encoder. The latents from the pretrained representation encoders (e.g., DINO, SigLIP, MAE) are previously considered inappropriate for generative modeling. Recently, RAE method lights the hope and reveals that the representation autoencoder can also achieve competitive performance as the VAE encoder. However, the integration of representation autoencoder into continuous autoregressive (AR) models, remains largely unexplored. In this work, we investigate the challenges of employing high-dimensional representation autoencoders within the AR paradigm, denoted as \textit{RAE-AR}. We focus on the unique properties of AR models and identify two primary hurdles: complex token-wise distribution modeling and the high-dimensionality amplified training-inference gap (exposure bias). To address these, we introduce token simplification via distribution normalization to ease modeling difficulty and improve convergence. Furthermore, we enhance prediction robustness by incorporating Gaussian noise injection during training to mitigate exposure bias. Our empirical results demonstrate that these modifications substantially bridge the performance gap, enabling representation autoencoder to achieve results comparable to traditional VAEs on AR models. This work paves the way for a more unified architecture across visual understanding and generative modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAE-AR方法，将表示自编码器集成到连续自回归模型中，通过分布归一化和高斯噪声注入解决高维表示自编码器在AR范式中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 生成模型的潜在空间长期被VAE编码器主导，而预训练表示编码器（如DINO、SigLIP、MAE）的潜在表示被认为不适合生成建模。虽然RAE方法显示了表示自编码器的潜力，但其在连续自回归模型中的集成仍未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出RAE-AR方法，针对AR模型的两个主要挑战：1）复杂的分词分布建模，通过分布归一化进行分词简化；2）高维度放大的训练-推理差距（暴露偏差），通过在训练中加入高斯噪声注入来增强预测鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，这些改进显著缩小了性能差距，使表示自编码器在AR模型上能够达到与传统VAE相当的结果。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为视觉理解和生成建模之间更统一的架构铺平了道路，证明了表示自编码器在自回归生成模型中的可行性。

title: Countering Catastrophic Forgetting of Large Language Models for Better Instruction Following via Weight-Space Model Merging
summary: Large language models have been adopted in the medical domain for clinical documentation to reduce clinician burden. However, studies have reported that LLMs often "forget" a significant amount of instruction-following ability when fine-tuned using a task-specific medical dataset, a critical challenge in adopting general-purpose LLMs for clinical applications. This study presents a model merging framework to efficiently adapt general-purpose LLMs to the medical domain by countering this forgetting issue. By merging a clinical foundation model (GatorTronLlama) with a general instruct model (Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct) via interpolation-based merge methods, we seek to derive a domain-adapted model with strong performance on clinical tasks while retaining instruction-following ability. Comprehensive evaluation across medical benchmarks and five clinical generation tasks (e.g., radiology and discharge summarization) shows that merged models can effectively mitigate catastrophic forgetting, preserve clinical domain expertise, and retain instruction-following ability. In addition, our model merging strategies demonstrate training efficiency, achieving performance on par with fully fine-tuned baselines under severely constrained supervision (e.g., 64-shot vs. 256-shot). Consequently, weight-space merging constitutes a highly scalable solution for adapting open-source LLMs to clinical applications, facilitating broader deployment in resource-constrained healthcare environments.

AI.tldr: 提出一个模型融合框架，通过合并临床基础模型和通用指令模型来解决医学领域微调中的灾难性遗忘问题，实现临床任务性能与指令跟随能力的平衡。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在医学临床文档记录中应用时，当使用特定医学数据集微调时，往往会"遗忘"大量指令跟随能力，这是将通用LLMs应用于临床领域的关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出模型融合框架，通过插值融合方法将临床基础模型(GatorTronLlama)与通用指令模型(Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct)合并，获得既适应临床领域又保留指令跟随能力的模型。
AI.result: 融合模型能有效缓解灾难性遗忘，保留临床领域专业知识，同时保持指令跟随能力。在有限监督下(如64-shot vs 256-shot)能达到与完全微调基线相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 权重空间融合为开源LLMs适应临床应用提供了高度可扩展的解决方案，有助于在资源受限的医疗环境中更广泛部署。

title: Stability of the Timoshenko Beam Equation with One Weakly Degenerate Local Kelvin-Voigt Damping
summary: We consider the Timoshenko beam equation with locally distributed Kelvin-Voigt damping, which affects either the shear stress or the bending moment. The damping coefficient exhibits a singularity, causing its derivative to be discontinuous. By using the frequency domain method and multiplier technique, we prove that the associated semigroup is polynomial stability. Specifically, regardless of whether the local Kelvin-Voigt damping acts on the shear stress or the bending moment, the system decays polynomially with rate $t^{-\frac{1}{2}}$.

AI.tldr: 研究带局部Kelvin-Voigt阻尼的Timoshenko梁方程，证明系统具有多项式稳定性，衰减率为t^{-1/2}
AI.motivation: 研究具有奇异系数的局部Kelvin-Voigt阻尼对Timoshenko梁系统稳定性的影响，特别是当阻尼系数导数不连续时的稳定性行为
AI.method: 使用频域方法和乘子技术，分析阻尼作用于剪切应力或弯曲力矩两种情况
AI.result: 证明无论局部Kelvin-Voigt阻尼作用于剪切应力还是弯曲力矩，相关半群都具有多项式稳定性，衰减率为t^{-1/2}
AI.conclusion: 具有奇异系数的局部Kelvin-Voigt阻尼Timoshenko梁系统表现出多项式稳定性，衰减率与阻尼作用位置无关

title: Beyond Logit Adjustment: A Residual Decomposition Framework for Long-Tailed Reranking
summary: Long-tailed classification, where a small number of frequent classes dominate many rare ones, remains challenging because models systematically favor frequent classes at inference time. Existing post-hoc methods such as logit adjustment address this by adding a fixed classwise offset to the base-model logits. However, the correction required to restore the relative ranking of two classes need not be constant across inputs, and a fixed offset cannot adapt to such variation. We study this problem through Bayes-optimal reranking on a base-model top-k shortlist. The gap between the optimal score and the base score, the residual correction, decomposes into a classwise component that is constant within each class, and a pairwise component that depends on the input and competing labels. When the residual is purely classwise, a fixed offset suffices to recover the Bayes-optimal ordering. We further show that when the same label pair induces incompatible ordering constraints across contexts, no fixed offset can achieve this recovery. This decomposition leads to testable predictions regarding when pairwise correction can improve performance and when cannot. We develop REPAIR (Reranking via Pairwise residual correction), a lightweight post-hoc reranker that combines a shrinkage-stabilized classwise term with a linear pairwise term driven by competition features on the shortlist. Experiments on five benchmarks spanning image classification, species recognition, scene recognition, and rare disease diagnosis confirm that the decomposition explains where pairwise correction helps and where classwise correction alone suffices.

AI.tldr: 论文提出REPAIR方法，通过分解残差校正为类别固定项和输入依赖的成对项，改进长尾分类问题
AI.motivation: 现有后处理方法使用固定类别偏移调整logits，但最优校正可能随输入变化，固定偏移无法适应这种变化
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯最优重排序，将残差校正分解为类别固定项和成对项，开发REPAIR轻量级后处理重排序器
AI.result: 在图像分类、物种识别、场景识别和罕见疾病诊断等五个基准测试中验证了分解的有效性
AI.conclusion: 残差分解解释了何时成对校正有效、何时仅类别校正足够，为长尾分类提供了理论指导

title: Model-Free Fast Frequency Support of Wind Farms for Tracking Optimal Frequency Trajectory
summary: The fast frequency support (FFS) towards frequency trajectory optimization provides a system view for the frequency regulation of wind farms (WFs). However, the existing frequency trajectory optimization-based FFS generally relies on the accurate governor dynamics model of synchronous generators (SGs), which aggrandizes the difficulty of controller implementation. In this paper, a proportional-integral (PI) based FFS of WFs is designed for tracking the optimal frequency trajectory, which gets rid of the dependence on the governor model. Firstly, the prototypical PI-based FFS of WFs is proposed and its feasibility for tracking the optimal frequency trajectory is analyzed and demonstrated. Then, based on the "frequency-RoCoF" form of the optimal frequency trajectory, a more practical PI controller is constructed, avoiding the time dependence of the prototypical PI controller. Besides, an adaptive gain associated with PI parameters is designed for multi-WF coordination. Finally, the validity of the proposed method is verified in both the single-WF system and the multi-WF system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于PI控制器的风电快速频率支撑方法，无需依赖同步发电机调速器模型，能够跟踪最优频率轨迹，并设计了自适应增益实现多风电场协调。
AI.motivation: 现有基于频率轨迹优化的快速频率支撑方法通常依赖于同步发电机调速器精确模型，这增加了控制器实现的难度。需要一种不依赖调速器模型的实用方法。
AI.method: 设计了基于PI控制器的风电快速频率支撑方法：1) 提出原型PI控制器并分析其跟踪最优频率轨迹的可行性；2) 基于"频率-频率变化率"形式的最优频率轨迹构建更实用的PI控制器，避免时间依赖性；3) 设计自适应增益实现多风电场协调。
AI.result: 在单风电场系统和多风电场系统中验证了所提方法的有效性，证明能够有效跟踪最优频率轨迹并提供快速频率支撑。
AI.conclusion: 提出的PI控制器方法摆脱了对同步发电机调速器模型的依赖，提供了更实用的风电快速频率支撑方案，并通过自适应增益实现了多风电场协调控制。

title: Does Your Optimizer Care How You Normalize? Normalization-Optimizer Coupling in LLM Training
summary: In LLM training, normalization layers and optimizers are typically treated as independent design choices. In a 3x2 factorial at 1B parameters and 1000 training steps, we show this assumption can fail: Dynamic Erf (Derf; Chen & Liu, 2025) suffers a large negative interaction with Muon (Jordan, 2024), with its gap to RMSNorm growing from +0.31 nats under AdamW to +0.97 under Muon, approximately three times larger. Dynamic Tanh (DyT; Zhu et al., 2025), included as a bounded-normalizer control, shows no such penalty. Our evidence points to two failure modes of erf under Muon's faster spectral-norm growth: saturation (lossy compression) and scale blindness (discarding activation magnitude). An EMA-blend that reintroduces running scale estimates recovers ~84% of the gap. Separately, reducing Derf's alpha from its published default (0.5 to 0.3) recovers ~80% by keeping erf in its near-linear regime, where it approximately preserves relative scale; this setting is not the published default of Chen & Liu (2025). Using Derf's published default alpha with Muon incurs a 0.66-nat interaction penalty without producing NaNs or divergence, making the failure easy to miss in short pilot runs.

AI.tldr: 研究发现LLM训练中归一化层和优化器之间存在显著的交互效应：Derf归一化与Muon优化器组合时性能大幅下降，而DyT归一化则无此问题，揭示了Derf在Muon快速谱范数增长下的两种失效模式。
AI.motivation: 传统上LLM训练中将归一化层和优化器视为独立设计选择，但本研究通过实验发现这种假设可能不成立，需要探索不同归一化方法与优化器之间的交互效应。
AI.method: 在10亿参数规模上进行3x2因子实验，对比Derf、RMSNorm和DyT三种归一化方法在AdamW和Muon两种优化器下的性能差异，分析Derf失效机制并提出EMA混合和调整alpha参数两种解决方案。
AI.result: Derf与Muon组合存在严重负交互效应：性能差距从AdamW下的+0.31 nats扩大到Muon下的+0.97 nats。DyT作为有界归一化对照组无此问题。失效源于erf在Muon快速谱范数增长下的饱和和尺度盲区问题。通过EMA混合可恢复约84%性能差距，调整alpha参数可恢复约80%。
AI.conclusion: 归一化层和优化器选择存在显著交互效应，不能独立设计。Derf的默认参数在Muon优化器下会导致严重但不易察觉的性能损失，需要针对优化器特性调整归一化参数或采用EMA混合方法。

title: DeltaMem: Towards Agentic Memory Management via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Recent advances in persona-centric memory have revealed the powerful capability of multi-agent systems in managing persona memory, especially in conversational scenarios. However, these complex frameworks often suffer from information loss and are fragile across varying scenarios, resulting in suboptimal performance. In this paper, we propose DeltaMem, an agentic memory management system that formulates persona-centric memory management as an end-to-end task within a single-agent setting. To further improve the performance of our agentic memory manager, we draw inspiration from the evolution of human memory and synthesize a user-assistant dialogue dataset along with corresponding operation-level memory updating labels. Building on this, we introduce a novel Memory-based Levenshtein Distance to formalize the memory updating reward, and propose a tailored reinforcement learning framework to further enhance the management capabilities of DeltaMem. Extensive experiments show that both training-free and RL-trained DeltaMem outperform all product-level baselines across diverse long-term memory benchmarks, including LoCoMo, HaluMem, and PersonaMem.

AI.tldr: DeltaMem：基于强化学习的单智能体记忆管理系统，通过记忆编辑距离奖励优化角色记忆管理，在多个长期记忆基准测试中超越现有产品级基线
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体角色记忆管理系统存在信息丢失和场景适应性差的问题，导致性能不佳。需要更稳健、端到端的记忆管理方案。
AI.method: 1. 将角色记忆管理建模为单智能体端到端任务；2. 构建用户-助手对话数据集及操作级记忆更新标签；3. 提出基于记忆的Levenshtein距离作为记忆更新奖励；4. 设计定制化强化学习框架优化DeltaMem
AI.result: DeltaMem在LoCoMo、HaluMem和PersonaMem等多个长期记忆基准测试中，无论是免训练版本还是RL训练版本，均超越所有产品级基线方法
AI.conclusion: DeltaMem通过单智能体端到端设计和基于记忆编辑距离的强化学习框架，有效解决了多智能体记忆管理系统的信息丢失和脆弱性问题，在长期记忆管理任务中表现出色

title: Hausdorff compactness and regularity for classes of open sets under geometric constraints
summary: This article introduces innovative classes of open sets in \(\mathbb{R}^{N}\), where \(N=2, 3\), characterized by a geometric property associated with the inward normal. The focus lies on proving compactness results for the Hausdorff topology within these classes. Furthermore, the paper establishes the equivalence of convergences, encompassing Hausdorff, compact, and characteristic functions, for select classes. We also investigate the regularity of the thickness function associated with these domains and analyze how the regularity of the fixed convex set \(C\) influences the boundary regularity of the admissible shapes.

AI.tldr: 论文引入ℝ²和ℝ³中具有向内法向量几何性质的新型开集类，证明其在Hausdorff拓扑下的紧致性，建立多种收敛的等价性，并研究厚度函数与边界正则性。
AI.motivation: 研究具有特定几何性质的开集类，建立这些集合在Hausdorff拓扑下的紧致性理论，为形状优化和几何分析提供理论基础。
AI.method: 定义基于向内法向量几何性质的新型开集类，运用Hausdorff拓扑理论，分析不同收敛模式（Hausdorff收敛、紧致收敛、特征函数收敛）的等价性，研究厚度函数的正则性及其与凸集C边界正则性的关系。
AI.result: 证明了新型开集类在Hausdorff拓扑下的紧致性，建立了特定类中不同收敛模式的等价性，分析了厚度函数的正则性，并揭示了固定凸集C的正则性对可容许形状边界正则性的影响。
AI.conclusion: 论文成功构建了具有向内法向量几何性质的开集类的紧致性理论，建立了收敛等价性，为形状分析和优化问题提供了有力的数学工具，并揭示了凸集正则性与形状边界正则性之间的深刻联系。

title: Learning ECG Image Representations via Dual Physiological-Aware Alignments
summary: Electrocardiograms (ECGs) are among the most widely used diagnostic tools for cardiovascular diseases, and a large amount of ECG data worldwide appears only in image form. However, most existing automated ECG analysis methods rely on access to raw signal recordings, limiting their applicability in real-world and resource-constrained settings. In this paper, we present ECG-Scan, a self-supervised framework for learning clinically generalized representations from ECG images through dual physiological-aware alignments: 1) Our approach optimizes image representation learning using multimodal contrastive alignment between image and gold-standard signal-text modalities. 2) We further integrate domain knowledge via soft-lead constraints, regularizing the reconstruction process and improving signal lead inter-consistency. Extensive benchmarking across multiple datasets and downstream tasks demonstrates that our image-based model achieves superior performance compared to existing image baselines and notably narrows the gap between ECG image and signal analysis. These results highlight the potential of self-supervised image modeling to unlock large-scale legacy ECG data and broaden access to automated cardiovascular diagnostics.

AI.tldr: ECG-Scan：通过双生理感知对齐从心电图图像中学习临床通用表示的自监督框架，缩小了图像与信号分析之间的差距
AI.motivation: 全球大量心电图数据仅以图像形式存在，而现有自动化心电图分析方法大多依赖原始信号记录，限制了在现实世界和资源受限环境中的应用
AI.method: 提出ECG-Scan自监督框架，通过双生理感知对齐：1）图像与金标准信号-文本模态的多模态对比对齐优化图像表示学习；2）通过软导联约束整合领域知识，正则化重建过程并提高信号导联间一致性
AI.result: 在多个数据集和下游任务上的广泛基准测试表明，该图像模型优于现有图像基线，显著缩小了心电图图像与信号分析之间的差距
AI.conclusion: 自监督图像建模有潜力解锁大规模遗留心电图数据，扩大自动化心血管诊断的可及性

title: Receding-Horizon Nonlinear Optimal Control With Safety Constraints Using Constrained Approximate Dynamic Programming
summary: We present a receding-horizon optimal control for nonlinear continuous-time systems subject to state constraints. The cost is a quadratic finite-horizon integral. The key enabling technique is a new constrained approximate dynamic programming (C-ADP) approach for finite-horizon nonlinear optimal control with constraints that are affine in the control. The C-ADP approach is intuitive because it uses a quadratic approximation of the cost-to-go function at each backward step. This method yields a sequence of analytic closed-form optimal control functions, which have identical structure and where parameters are obtained from 2 Riccati-like difference equations. This C-ADP method is well suited for real-time implementation. Thus, we use the C-ADP approach in combination with control barrier functions to obtain a continuous-time receding-horizon optimal control that is farsighted in the sense that it optimizes the integral cost subject to state constraints along the entire prediction horizon. Lastly, receding-horizon C-ADP control is demonstrated in simulation of a nonholonomic ground robot subject to velocity and no-collision constraints. We compare performance with 3 other approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于约束近似动态规划（C-ADP）的滚动时域最优控制方法，用于处理非线性连续时间系统的状态约束问题，通过二次近似成本函数和解析控制律实现实时优化。
AI.motivation: 现有非线性系统约束最优控制方法难以实现实时计算，特别是在滚动时域控制中需要快速求解优化问题。需要一种既能处理状态约束又能高效计算的方法。
AI.method: 采用约束近似动态规划（C-ADP）方法，在每个后向步骤中对成本函数进行二次近似，结合控制屏障函数处理状态约束，得到解析形式的闭环最优控制函数序列，通过两个类Riccati差分方程更新参数。
AI.result: 方法能够生成具有相同结构的解析最优控制函数，适合实时实现。在非完整地面机器人仿真中验证了方法有效性，并与三种其他方法进行了性能比较。
AI.conclusion: C-ADP方法为非线性系统约束滚动时域控制提供了一种直观且计算高效的解决方案，能够优化整个预测时域内的积分成本同时满足状态约束。

title: NED-Tree: Bridging the Semantic Gap with Nonlinear Element Decomposition Tree for LLM Nonlinear Optimization Modeling
summary: Automating the translation of Operations Research (OR) problems from natural language to executable models is a critical challenge. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in linear tasks, they suffer from severe performance degradation in real-world nonlinear scenarios due to semantic misalignment between mathematical formulations and solver codes, as well as unstable information extraction. In this study, we introduce NED-Tree, a systematic framework designed to bridge the semantic gap. NED-Tree employs (a) a sentence-by-sentence extraction strategy to ensure robust parameter mapping and traceability; and (b) a recursive tree-based structure that adaptively decomposes complex nonlinear terms into solver-compatible sub-elements. Additionally, we present NEXTOR, a novel benchmark specifically designed for complex nonlinear, extensive-constraint OR problems. Experiments across 10 benchmarks demonstrate that NED-Tree establishes a new state-of-the-art with 72.51% average accuracy, NED-Tree is the first framework that drives LLMs to resolve nonlinear modeling difficulties through element decomposition, achieving alignment between modeling semantics and code semantics. The NED-Tree framework and benchmark are accessible in the anonymous repository https://anonymous.4open.science/r/NORA-NEXTOR.

AI.tldr: NED-Tree是一个通过递归树结构分解非线性项的系统框架，用于将自然语言描述的运筹学问题转化为可执行模型，在复杂非线性场景中显著提升LLMs的性能。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在线性运筹学问题翻译中表现良好，但在现实世界非线性场景中性能严重下降，主要原因是数学公式与求解器代码之间的语义不对齐，以及信息提取不稳定。
AI.method: NED-Tree采用：(1)逐句提取策略确保参数映射的鲁棒性和可追溯性；(2)递归树结构自适应地将复杂非线性项分解为求解器兼容的子元素。同时提出了NEXTOR基准测试集。
AI.result: 在10个基准测试中，NED-Tree实现了72.51%的平均准确率，建立了新的最先进水平，是首个通过元素分解解决非线性建模困难的框架。
AI.conclusion: NED-Tree成功弥合了建模语义与代码语义之间的差距，为复杂非线性运筹学问题的自动化翻译提供了有效解决方案，框架和基准测试集已开源。

title: Swift-SVD: Theoretical Optimality Meets Practical Efficiency in Low-Rank LLM Compression
summary: The deployment of Large Language Models is constrained by the memory and bandwidth demands of static weights and dynamic Key-Value cache. SVD-based compression provides a hardware-friendly solution to reduce these costs. However, existing methods suffer from two key limitations: some are suboptimal in reconstruction error, while others are theoretically optimal but practically inefficient. In this paper, we propose Swift-SVD, an activation-aware, closed-form compression framework that simultaneously guarantees theoretical optimum, practical efficiency and numerical stability. Swift-SVD incrementally aggregates covariance of output activations given a batch of inputs and performs a single eigenvalue decomposition after aggregation, enabling training-free, fast, and optimal layer-wise low-rank approximation. We employ effective rank to analyze local layer-wise compressibility and design a dynamic rank allocation strategy that jointly accounts for local reconstruction loss and end-to-end layer importance. Extensive experiments across six LLMs and eight datasets demonstrate that Swift-SVD outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving optimal compression accuracy while delivering 3-70X speedups in end-to-end compression time. Our code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: Swift-SVD：一种激活感知的闭式压缩框架，通过增量聚合激活协方差和单次特征值分解，实现训练免费、快速且理论最优的LLM权重和KV缓存压缩。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型部署受限于静态权重和动态KV缓存的内存与带宽需求。现有SVD压缩方法存在两个关键限制：一些方法在重构误差上不是最优的，而理论最优的方法在实际中效率低下。
AI.method: 提出Swift-SVD框架：1）增量聚合给定输入批次输出激活的协方差；2）聚合后执行单次特征值分解；3）使用有效秩分析局部层可压缩性；4）设计动态秩分配策略，联合考虑局部重构损失和端到端层重要性。
AI.result: 在6个LLM和8个数据集上的广泛实验表明，Swift-SVD优于最先进的基线方法，在实现最优压缩精度的同时，端到端压缩时间加速3-70倍。
AI.conclusion: Swift-SVD提供了一个同时保证理论最优、实际高效和数值稳定的压缩框架，解决了现有SVD压缩方法的局限性，为LLM部署提供了硬件友好的解决方案。

title: Bilevel Programming Approach for Image Restoration Problems with Automatically Hyperparameter Selection
summary: In optimization-based image restoration models, the correct selection of hyperparameters is crucial for achieving superior performance. However, current research typically involves manual tuning of these hyperparameters, which is highly time-consuming and often lacks accuracy. In this paper, we concentrate on the automated selection of hyperparameters in the context of image restoration and present a bilevel programming approach that can simultaneously select the optimal hyperparameters and achieve high-quality restoration results. For implementation, we reformulate the bilevel programming problem that incorporates an inequality constraint related to the difference-of-convex functions. Following this, we address a sequence of nonsmooth convex programming problems by employing a feasibility penalty function along with a proximal point term. In this context, the nonsmooth convex programming problem uses the solution of the lower-level problem, which is derived through the alternating direction method of multipliers. Theoretically, we prove that the sequence generated by the algorithm converges to a Karush-Kuhn-Tucker stationary point of the inequality-constrained equivalent bilevel programming problem. We conduct a series of tests on both simulations and real images, which demonstrate that the proposed algorithm achieve superior restoration quality while requiring less computing time compared to other hyperparameter selection methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种双层规划方法，用于图像恢复中的超参数自动选择，通过不等式约束和可行性惩罚函数实现高效优化，在恢复质量和计算时间上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 基于优化的图像恢复模型中，超参数的正确选择对性能至关重要，但现有研究通常需要手动调参，耗时且不准确，需要自动化超参数选择方法。
AI.method: 采用双层规划方法同时选择最优超参数并获得高质量恢复结果，将问题重新表述为包含凸差函数不等式约束的双层规划问题，使用可行性惩罚函数和近端点项解决非光滑凸规划问题序列，下层问题通过交替方向乘子法求解。
AI.result: 理论证明算法生成的序列收敛到不等式约束等价双层规划问题的KKT稳定点，在仿真和真实图像测试中，相比其他超参数选择方法，该算法获得更优的恢复质量且计算时间更少。
AI.conclusion: 提出的双层规划方法能够有效自动化图像恢复中的超参数选择，在恢复质量和计算效率方面均优于现有方法，为图像恢复任务提供了实用的超参数优化解决方案。

title: ZEUS: Accelerating Diffusion Models with Only Second-Order Predictor
summary: Denoising generative models deliver high-fidelity generation but remain bottlenecked by inference latency due to the many iterative denoiser calls required during sampling. Training-free acceleration methods reduce latency by either sparsifying the model architecture or shortening the sampling trajectory. Current training-free acceleration methods are more complex than necessary: higher-order predictors amplify error under aggressive speedups, and architectural modifications hinder deployment. Beyond 2x acceleration, step skipping creates structural scarcity -- at most one fresh evaluation per local window -- leaving the computed output and its backward difference as the only causally grounded information. Based on this, we propose ZEUS, an acceleration method that predicts reduced denoiser evaluations using a second-order predictor, and stabilizes aggressive consecutive skipping with an interleaved scheme that avoids back-to-back extrapolations. ZEUS adds essentially zero overhead, no feature caches, and no architectural modifications, and it is compatible with different backbones, prediction objectives, and solver choices.
