Across image and video generation, ZEUS consistently improves the speed-fidelity performance over recent training-free baselines, achieving up to 3.2x end-to-end speedup while maintaining perceptual quality. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Ting-Justin-Jiang/ZEUS.

AI.tldr: ZEUS是一种无需训练的扩散模型加速方法，通过二阶预测器和交错采样方案实现高达3.2倍端到端加速，同时保持生成质量。
AI.motivation: 当前基于去噪的生成模型受限于推理延迟，需要多次迭代去噪器调用。现有无需训练加速方法在超过2倍加速时会产生结构稀缺性问题，且高阶预测器在激进加速下会放大误差，架构修改又影响部署。
AI.method: ZEUS采用二阶预测器减少去噪器评估次数，并通过交错采样方案稳定激进连续跳过，避免连续外推。该方法不增加额外开销、无需特征缓存、不修改架构，兼容不同骨干网络、预测目标和求解器选择。
AI.result: 在图像和视频生成任务中，ZEUS相比现有无需训练基线方法，在保持感知质量的同时，实现了高达3.2倍的端到端加速，显著提升了速度-保真度性能。
AI.conclusion: ZEUS提供了一种简单有效的扩散模型加速方案，通过二阶预测和交错采样策略解决了激进加速下的结构稀缺性问题，实现了高质量生成与低延迟的平衡。

title: Transformer-Accelerated Interpolated Data-Driven Reachability Analysis from Noisy Data
summary: Data-driven reachability analysis provides guaranteed outer approximations of reachable sets from input-state measurements, yet each propagation step requires a matrix-zonotope multiplication whose cost grows with the horizon length, limiting scalability. We observe that data-driven propagation is inherently step-size sensitive, in the sense that set-valued operators at different discretization resolutions yield non-equivalent reachable sets at the same physical time, a property absent in model-based propagation. Exploiting this multi-resolution structure, we propose Interpolated Reachability Analysis (IRA), which computes a sparse chain of coarse anchor sets sequentially and reconstructs fine-resolution intermediate sets in parallel across coarse intervals. We derive a fully data-driven coarse-noise over-approximation that removes the need for continuous-time system knowledge, prove deterministic outer-approximation guarantees for all interpolated sets, and establish conditional tightness relative to the fine-resolution chain. To replace the remaining matrix-zonotope multiplications in the fine phase, we further develop Transformer-Accelerated IRA (TA-IRA), where an encoder-decoder Transformer is calibrated via split conformal prediction to provide finite-sample pointwise and path-wise coverage certificates. Numerical experiments on a five-dimensional linear system confirm the theoretical guarantees and demonstrate significant computational savings.

AI.tldr: 提出Interpolated Reachability Analysis (IRA)方法，通过多分辨率结构减少数据驱动可达性分析的计算成本，并进一步开发Transformer加速版本TA-IRA。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动可达性分析在每一步传播都需要矩阵-zonotope乘法，计算成本随时域长度增长，限制了可扩展性。同时发现数据驱动传播具有步长敏感性，不同离散化分辨率会产生非等价的可达集。
AI.method: 利用多分辨率结构，提出IRA方法：先顺序计算稀疏的粗分辨率锚点集，然后在粗区间内并行重构细分辨率中间集。进一步开发TA-IRA，使用编码器-解码器Transformer并通过分裂共形预测校准，以提供有限样本点态和路径覆盖保证。
AI.result: 推导了完全数据驱动的粗噪声过近似，无需连续时间系统知识；证明了所有插值集的确定性外近似保证；建立了相对于细分辨率链的条件紧致性。在五维线性系统上的数值实验验证了理论保证并展示了显著的计算节省。
AI.conclusion: IRA方法通过利用数据驱动传播的步长敏感性，实现了计算效率的提升，而TA-IRA进一步用Transformer替代剩余计算，为数据驱动可达性分析提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: ThinkTwice: Jointly Optimizing Large Language Models for Reasoning and Self-Refinement
summary: We introduce ThinkTwice, a simple two-phase framework that jointly optimizes LLMs to solve reasoning problems and refine the answers, based on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). In each pair of training steps, ThinkTwice first optimizes the model on solving reasoning problems, then optimizes it on refining its own solutions to the same problems, using the same binary correctness reward in both phases without correctness signals or critique annotations. Across five mathematical reasoning benchmarks and two model families including Qwen3-4B and Olmo3-7B, ThinkTwice substantially improves both reasoning and refinement performance over competitive online policy optimization baselines. Specifically, on Qwen3-4B, ThinkTwice outperforms GRPO on AIME by 5 percentage points before refinement and by 11.5 points after one self-refinement step, measured by pass@4. Analysis of the training dynamics of ThinkTwice reveals an implicit rectify-then-fortify curriculum: refinement predominantly corrects errors early in training and naturally shifts toward preserving already-correct solutions as the model improves, yielding a more rectified reward signal. Our work establishes joint training of reasoning and self-refinement as a principled and effective methodology for RLVR.

AI.tldr: ThinkTwice是一个两阶段框架，通过GRPO联合优化LLM解决推理问题和精炼答案，无需正确性信号或批判标注，在数学推理基准上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常需要额外的正确性信号或批判标注来训练LLM的自我精炼能力，这限制了方法的可扩展性。ThinkTwice旨在开发一种无需这些额外信号的联合训练方法，让模型同时学习推理和精炼能力。
AI.method: ThinkTwice采用两阶段训练框架：第一阶段优化模型解决推理问题，第二阶段优化模型精炼自己的解决方案。两个阶段使用相同的二元正确性奖励，基于Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)进行优化，无需正确性信号或批判标注。
AI.result: 在五个数学推理基准和两个模型家族（Qwen3-4B和Olmo3-7B）上，ThinkTwice显著优于竞争性的在线策略优化基线。在Qwen3-4B上，ThinkTwice在AIME上比GRPO在精炼前提升5个百分点，一次自我精炼后提升11.5个百分点（pass@4）。
AI.conclusion: ThinkTwice展示了联合训练推理和自我精炼作为RLVR的原则性和有效方法。训练动态分析揭示了隐式的"纠正-强化"课程：早期精炼主要纠正错误，随着模型改进自然转向保护已正确的解决方案，产生更精确的奖励信号。

title: Grounding AI-in-Education Development in Teachers' Voices: Findings from a National Survey in Indonesia
summary: Despite emerging use in Indonesian classrooms, there is limited large-scale, teacher-centred evidence on how AI is used in practice and what support teachers need, hindering the development of context-appropriate AI systems and policies. To address this gap, we conduct a nationwide survey of 349 K-12 teachers across elementary, junior high, and senior high schools. We find increasing use of AI for pedagogy, content development, and teaching media, although adoption remains uneven. Elementary teachers report more consistent use, while senior high teachers engage less; mid-career teachers assign higher importance to AI, and teachers in Eastern Indonesia perceive greater value. Across levels, teachers primarily use AI to reduce instructional preparation workload (e.g., assessment, lesson planning, and material development). However, generic outputs, infrastructure constraints, and limited contextual alignment continue to hinder effective classroom integration.

AI.tldr: 针对印尼K-12教师的全国性调查显示，AI在教学中的应用正在增加，但存在使用不均衡、基础设施限制和情境适配不足等问题
AI.motivation: 印尼课堂中AI应用日益增多，但缺乏大规模、以教师为中心的实证研究，这阻碍了开发适合当地情境的AI系统和政策制定
AI.method: 对349名K-12教师（涵盖小学、初中、高中）进行全国性问卷调查
AI.result: 发现AI在教学法、内容开发和教学媒体方面的使用增加，但采用不均衡：小学教师使用更一致，高中教师参与较少；中年教师更重视AI，东部印尼教师感知价值更高；教师主要用AI减轻教学准备工作量
AI.conclusion: 通用输出、基础设施限制和情境适配不足阻碍了AI在课堂中的有效整合，需要针对性的支持和政策

title: Scaled Relative Graphs and Dynamic Integral Quadratic Constraints: Connections and Computations for Nonlinear Systems
summary: Scaled relative graphs (SRGs) enable graphical analysis and design of nonlinear systems. In this paper, we present a systematic approach for computing both soft and hard SRGs of nonlinear systems using dynamic integral quadratic constraints (IQCs). These constraints are exploited via application of the S-procedure to compute tractable SRG overbounds. In particular, we show that the multipliers associated with the IQCs define regions in the complex plane. Soft SRG computations are formulated through frequency-domain conditions, while hard SRGs are obtained via hard factorizations of multipliers and linear matrix inequalities. The overbounds are used to derive an SRG-based feedback stability result for Lur'e-type systems, providing a new graphical interpretation of classical IQC stability results with dynamic multipliers.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种使用动态积分二次约束（IQC）计算非线性系统软硬SRG的系统方法，通过S-过程获得可处理的SRG上界，并基于此推导了Lur'e型系统的SRG反馈稳定性结果。
AI.motivation: 虽然SRG能够实现非线性系统的图形化分析和设计，但需要系统化的计算方法。本文旨在通过动态IQC提供计算软硬SRG的统一框架。
AI.method: 利用动态IQC和S-过程计算SRG上界：软SRG通过频域条件计算，硬SRG通过乘子的硬分解和线性矩阵不等式获得。IQC乘子定义了复平面上的区域。
AI.result: 建立了计算非线性系统软硬SRG的系统方法，并推导了基于SRG的Lur'e型系统反馈稳定性结果，为经典IQC稳定性结果提供了新的图形化解释。
AI.conclusion: 该方法将动态IQC与SRG理论相结合，为非线性系统分析提供了统一的图形化框架，扩展了经典IQC稳定性理论的应用范围。

title: Care-Conditioned Neuromodulation for Autonomy-Preserving Supportive Dialogue Agents
summary: Large language models deployed in supportive or advisory roles must balance helpfulness with preservation of user autonomy, yet standard alignment methods primarily optimize for helpfulness and harmlessness without explicitly modeling relational risks such as dependency reinforcement, overprotection, or coercive guidance. We introduce Care-Conditioned Neuromodulation (CCN), a state-dependent control framework in which a learned scalar signal derived from structured user state and dialogue context conditions response generation and candidate selection. We formalize this setting as an autonomy-preserving alignment problem and define a utility function that rewards autonomy support and helpfulness while penalizing dependency and coercion. We also construct a benchmark of relational failure modes in multi-turn dialogue, including reassurance dependence, manipulative care, overprotection, and boundary inconsistency. On this benchmark, care-conditioned candidate generation combined with utility-based reranking improves autonomy-preserving utility by +0.25 over supervised fine-tuning and +0.07 over preference optimization baselines while maintaining comparable supportiveness. Pilot human evaluation and zero-shot transfer to real emotional-support conversations show directional agreement with automated metrics. These results suggest that state-dependent control combined with utility-based selection is a practical approach to multi-objective alignment in autonomy-sensitive dialogue.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Care-Conditioned Neuromodulation (CCN)框架，通过状态依赖的控制机制来平衡语言模型的有用性和用户自主权保护，避免产生依赖强化、过度保护等关系风险。
AI.motivation: 当前的语言模型对齐方法主要优化有用性和无害性，但忽视了关系风险，如依赖强化、过度保护、强制指导等，这些会损害用户自主权。需要一种能明确建模和平衡自主权保护与有用性的方法。
AI.method: 提出Care-Conditioned Neuromodulation (CCN)框架：1) 从结构化用户状态和对话上下文中学习标量信号；2) 该信号条件化响应生成和候选选择；3) 形式化为自主权保护对齐问题，定义奖励自主权支持和有用性、惩罚依赖和强制的效用函数；4) 结合基于效用的重排序。
AI.result: 在构建的多轮对话关系失败模式基准测试中，CCN框架比监督微调提高自主权保护效用+0.25，比偏好优化基线提高+0.07，同时保持相当的支持性。初步人工评估和零样本迁移到真实情感支持对话显示与自动指标方向一致。
AI.conclusion: 状态依赖控制结合基于效用的选择是处理自主权敏感对话中多目标对齐的实用方法，能够在保持有用性的同时更好地保护用户自主权。

title: Dynamic resource coordination can increase grid hosting capacity to support more renewables, storage, and electrified load growth
summary: We show that dynamic coordination of distributed energy resources (DERs) can increase the capacity of low- and medium-voltage grids, improve reliability and power quality, and reduce solar curtailment. We develop three approaches to compute hosting capacity on a representative distribution grid with realistic scenarios. A deterministic iterative method provides insight into how dynamic operation and DER interactions enhance capacity and affect power flows, demonstrating clear gains over static methods even with low-to-moderate levels of storage and flexible demand. A stochastic programming approach jointly optimizes DER siting and sizing, showing that nodal colocation and complementary effects expand the feasible region of solar, heat pump, and battery penetrations by over 22X. This enables up to 200% solar, 100% battery, and 90% heat pump penetration. Batteries emerge as the most critical technology, followed by heat pumps and electric vehicles. A Monte Carlo-based extension shows that uncertainty significantly impacts hosting capacity and grid metrics, with 46% higher volatility under dynamic operation.

AI.tldr: 分布式能源资源的动态协调可以显著提高配电网容量、可靠性和电能质量，减少太阳能弃电。通过三种方法计算承载能力，显示动态运行相比静态方法有明显优势，电池是最关键的技术。
AI.motivation: 研究分布式能源资源（DERs）动态协调对配电网承载能力的提升潜力，解决太阳能弃电问题，提高电网可靠性和电能质量。
AI.method: 开发了三种方法：1）确定性迭代方法分析动态运行和DER交互如何增强容量；2）随机规划方法联合优化DER选址和容量配置；3）蒙特卡洛扩展方法评估不确定性对承载能力的影响。
AI.result: 动态运行相比静态方法有明显优势，即使在中低水平的储能和灵活需求下。随机规划显示节点共置和互补效应将太阳能、热泵和电池渗透率的可行区域扩大了22倍以上，可实现200%太阳能、100%电池和90%热泵渗透率。电池是最关键技术，其次是热泵和电动汽车。不确定性显著影响承载能力，动态运行下波动性增加46%。
AI.conclusion: 分布式能源资源的动态协调能显著提高配电网承载能力，电池技术最为关键，不确定性管理对动态运行的成功实施至关重要。

title: Do Large Language Models Mentalize When They Teach?
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures. Workshop paper at ICML 2026
summary: How do LLMs decide what to teach next: by reasoning about a learner's knowledge, or by using simpler rules of thumb? We test this in a controlled task previously used to study human teaching strategies. On each trial, a teacher LLM sees a hypothetical learner's trajectory through a reward-annotated directed graph and must reveal a single edge so the learner would choose a better path if they replanned. We run a range of LLMs as simulated teachers and fit their trial-by-trial choices with the same cognitive models used for humans: a Bayes-Optimal teacher that infers which transitions the learner is missing (inverse planning), weaker Bayesian variants, heuristic baselines (e.g., reward based), and non-mentalizing utility models. In a baseline experiment matched to the stimuli presented to human subjects, most LLMs perform well, show little change in strategy over trials, and their graph-by-graph performance is similar to that of humans. Model comparison (BIC) shows that Bayes-Optimal teaching best explains most models' choices. When given a scaffolding intervention, models follow auxiliary inference- or reward-focused prompts, but these scaffolds do not reliably improve later teaching on heuristic-incongruent test graphs and can sometimes reduce performance. Overall, cognitive model fits provide insight into LLM tutoring policies and show that prompt compliance does not guarantee better teaching decisions.

AI.tldr: LLMs在教学中主要使用贝叶斯最优推理而非简单启发式，其教学策略与人类相似，但提示干预不一定能改善教学效果
AI.motivation: 研究LLMs在教学决策时是使用对学习者知识的推理，还是简单的经验法则，以理解其教学策略的本质
AI.method: 使用受控教学任务，让LLMs作为模拟教师，在奖励标注的有向图中为学习者揭示单一边缘。使用与人类研究相同的认知模型（贝叶斯最优教师、弱贝叶斯变体、启发式基线、非心智化效用模型）拟合LLMs的选择
AI.result: 在基线实验中，大多数LLMs表现良好，策略变化小，图间表现与人类相似。模型比较显示贝叶斯最优教学最能解释模型选择。脚手架干预能引导模型遵循推理或奖励导向的提示，但不会可靠改善教学效果，有时反而降低性能
AI.conclusion: LLMs的教学策略主要基于对学习者知识的贝叶斯推理，而非简单启发式。认知模型拟合能洞察LLMs的教学策略，但提示合规性不能保证更好的教学决策

title: Fragile Reasoning: A Mechanistic Analysis of LLM Sensitivity to Meaning-Preserving Perturbations
summary: Large language models demonstrate strong performance on mathematical reasoning benchmarks, yet remain surprisingly fragile to meaning-preserving surface perturbations. We systematically evaluate three open-weight LLMs, Mistral-7B, Llama-3-8B, and Qwen2.5-7B, on 677 GSM8K problems paired with semantically equivalent variants generated through name substitution and number format paraphrasing. All three models exhibit substantial answer-flip rates (28.8%-45.1%), with number paraphrasing consistently more disruptive than name swaps. To trace the mechanistic basis of these failures, we introduce the Mechanistic Perturbation Diagnostics (MPD) framework, combining logit lens analysis, activation patching, component ablation, and the Cascading Amplification Index (CAI) into a unified diagnostic pipeline. CAI, a novel metric quantifying layer-wise divergence amplification, outperforms first divergence layer as a failure predictor for two of three architectures (AUC up to 0.679). Logit lens reveals that flipped samples diverge from correct predictions at significantly earlier layers than stable samples. Activation patching reveals a stark architectural divide in failure localizability: Llama-3 failures are recoverable by patching at specific layers (43/60 samples), while Mistral and Qwen failures are broadly distributed (3/60 and 0/60). Based on these diagnostic signals, we propose a mechanistic failure taxonomy (localized, distributed, and entangled) and validate it through targeted repair experiments: steering vectors and layer fine-tuning recover 12.2% of localized failures (Llama-3) but only 7.2% of entangled (Qwen) and 5.2% of distributed (Mistral) failures.

AI.tldr: LLMs在数学推理中表现良好，但对语义等价的表面扰动（如名字替换和数字格式改写）非常脆弱。研究者通过Mechanistic Perturbation Diagnostics框架分析失败机制，发现不同架构的失败模式不同，并提出相应的修复方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在数学推理基准测试中表现强劲，但它们对保持语义不变的表面扰动（如名字替换和数字格式改写）表现出令人惊讶的脆弱性。研究者希望系统性地评估这种脆弱性，并深入理解其背后的机制原因。
AI.method: 研究评估了三个开源LLM（Mistral-7B、Llama-3-8B、Qwen2.5-7B）在677个GSM8K问题及其语义等价变体上的表现。引入了Mechanistic Perturbation Diagnostics（MPD）框架，结合logit lens分析、激活修补、组件消融和Cascading Amplification Index（CAI）指标。通过CAI量化层间差异放大，分析失败样本的早期分歧层，并验证不同架构的失败可修复性。
AI.result: 所有三个模型都表现出显著的答案翻转率（28.8%-45.1%），数字改写比名字替换更具破坏性。CAI作为失败预测指标优于首次分歧层（AUC最高达0.679）。失败样本在显著更早的层就与正确预测产生分歧。不同架构的失败模式不同：Llama-3的失败可通过特定层修补恢复（43/60样本），而Mistral和Qwen的失败分布广泛（3/60和0/60）。基于此提出了三种失败分类（局部化、分布式、纠缠），修复实验显示局部化失败修复率最高（12.2%）。
AI.conclusion: LLMs对语义等价的表面扰动具有显著的脆弱性，这种脆弱性在不同架构中表现出不同的机制模式。提出的MPD框架能有效诊断失败机制，CAI是有效的失败预测指标。不同架构的失败可修复性差异显著，这为未来开发更鲁棒的模型提供了重要见解。

title: When does learning pay off? A study on DRL-based dynamic algorithm configuration for carbon-aware scheduling
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has recently emerged as a promising tool for Dynamic Algorithm Configuration (DAC), enabling evolutionary algorithms to adapt their parameters online rather than relying on static tuned configurations. While DRL can learn effective control policies, training is computationally expensive. This cost may be justified if learned policies generalize, allowing the training effort to transfer across instance types and problem scales. Yet, for real-world optimization problems, it remains unclear whether this promise holds in practice and under which conditions the investment in learning pays off. In this work, we investigate this question in the context of the carbon-aware permutation flow-shop scheduling problem. We develop a DRL-based DAC framework and train it exclusively on small, simple instances. We then deploy the learned policy on both similar and more complex unseen instances and compare its performance against a static tuned baseline, which provides a fair point of comparison. Our findings show that the proposed method provides a strong dynamic algorithm control policy that can be effectively transferred to different unseen problem instances. Notably, on simple and cheap to compute instances, similar to those observed during training and tuning, DRL performs comparably with the statically tuned baseline. However, as instance characteristics diverge and computational complexities increase, the DRL-learned policy continuously outperforms static tuning. These results confirm that DRL can acquire robust and generalizable control policies which are effective beyond the training instance distributions. This ability to generalize across instance types makes the initial computational investment worthwhile, particularly in settings where static tuning struggles to adapt to changing problem scenarios.

AI.tldr: DRL-based动态算法配置框架在碳感知置换流水车间调度问题中表现出良好的泛化能力，训练于小规模简单实例，却能有效迁移到更复杂未见实例，超越静态调优基线。
AI.motivation: 虽然深度强化学习在动态算法配置中显示出潜力，但训练成本高昂。研究旨在验证DRL学习到的策略是否能在实际优化问题中泛化到不同实例类型和问题规模，以及这种学习投资是否值得。
AI.method: 开发基于DRL的DAC框架，专门在小型简单实例上进行训练，然后将学习到的策略部署到相似和更复杂的未见实例，并与静态调优基线进行公平比较。
AI.result: DRL学习到的策略能有效迁移到不同未见问题实例。在训练和调优相似的简单实例上，DRL与静态调优表现相当；但随着实例特征差异增大和计算复杂度增加，DRL策略持续优于静态调优。
AI.conclusion: DRL能够学习到鲁棒且可泛化的控制策略，这些策略在训练实例分布之外仍然有效。这种跨实例类型的泛化能力使得初始计算投资具有价值，特别是在静态调优难以适应变化问题场景的环境中。

title: Thinking While Listening: Fast-Slow Recurrence for Long-Horizon Sequential Modeling
summary: We extend the recent latent recurrent modeling to sequential input streams. By interleaving fast, recurrent latent updates with self-organizational ability between slow observation updates, our method facilitates the learning of stable internal structures that evolve alongside the input. This mechanism allows the model to maintain coherent and clustered representations over long horizons, improving out-of-distribution generalization in reinforcement learning and algorithmic tasks compared to sequential baselines such as LSTM, state space models, and Transformer variants.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合快速循环潜在更新与慢速观测更新的方法，用于学习随输入演化的稳定内部结构，在强化学习和算法任务中优于传统序列模型。
AI.motivation: 现有序列模型在处理长序列时难以维持连贯的内部表示，特别是在分布外泛化方面存在局限。需要一种能够学习稳定、可演化内部结构的方法来改善长期表示的一致性。
AI.method: 扩展了潜在循环建模，通过交错快速循环潜在更新（具有自组织能力）和慢速观测更新，使模型能够学习随输入演化的稳定内部结构，维持长期连贯和聚类的表示。
AI.result: 在强化学习和算法任务中，相比LSTM、状态空间模型和Transformer变体等序列基线，该方法在分布外泛化方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过交错不同时间尺度的更新机制，能够学习稳定且可演化的内部结构，有效改善序列模型在长期表示一致性和分布外泛化方面的性能。

title: Transformer-Enhanced Data-Driven Output Reachability with Conformal Coverage Guarantees
summary: This paper considers output reachability analysis for linear time-invariant systems with unknown state-space matrices and unknown observation map, given only noisy input-output measurements. The Cayley--Hamilton theorem is applied to eliminate the latent state algebraically, producing an autoregressive input-output model whose parameter uncertainty is enclosed in a matrix zonotope. Set-valued propagation of this model yields output reachable sets with deterministic containment guarantees under a bounded aggregated residual assumption. The conservatism inherent in the lifted matrix-zonotope product is then mitigated by a decoder-only Transformer trained on labels obtained through directional contraction of the formal envelope via an exterior non-reachability certificate. Split conformal prediction restores distribution-free coverage at both per-step and trajectory levels without access to the true reachable-set hull. The framework is validated on a five-dimensional system with multiple unknown observation matrices.

AI.tldr: 提出一个结合形式化方法与深度学习的框架，用于线性时不变系统的输出可达性分析，仅使用含噪声的输入输出测量数据，提供确定性包含保证并减少保守性。
AI.motivation: 传统可达性分析需要已知系统状态空间矩阵和观测映射，但在实际应用中这些参数往往未知。本文旨在解决仅通过含噪声的输入输出测量数据，对未知线性时不变系统进行输出可达性分析的挑战。
AI.method: 1) 应用Cayley-Hamilton定理代数消除隐状态，建立自回归输入输出模型；2) 使用矩阵zonotope封装参数不确定性；3) 通过集合值传播获得输出可达集；4) 使用仅解码器Transformer减少保守性，通过外部不可达性证书进行方向收缩；5) 采用分割保形预测恢复分布无关的覆盖率。
AI.result: 在五维系统上验证了该框架，能够处理多个未知观测矩阵的情况。方法提供了确定性包含保证，同时通过Transformer减少了形式化包络的保守性，并通过保形预测恢复了轨迹级覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功结合了形式化方法与深度学习，仅使用输入输出测量数据即可对未知线性时不变系统进行可达性分析，在保证安全性的同时减少了保守性，为数据驱动的形式化验证提供了新思路。

title: ByteRover: Agent-Native Memory Through LLM-Curated Hierarchical Context
summary: Memory-Augmented Generation (MAG) extends large language models with external memory to support long-context reasoning, but existing approaches universally treat memory as an external service that agents call into, delegating storage to separate pipelines of chunking, embedding, and graph extraction. This architectural separation means the system that stores knowledge does not understand it, leading to semantic drift between what the agent intended to remember and what the pipeline actually captured, loss of coordination context across agents, and fragile recovery after failures. In this paper, we propose ByteRover, an agent-native memory architecture that inverts the memory pipeline: the same LLM that reasons about a task also curates, structures, and retrieves knowledge. ByteRover represents knowledge in a hierarchical Context Tree, a file-based knowledge graph organized as Domain, Topic, Subtopic, and Entry, where each entry carries explicit relations, provenance, and an Adaptive Knowledge Lifecycle (AKL) with importance scoring, maturity tiers, and recency decay. Retrieval uses a 5-tier progressive strategy that resolves most queries at sub-100 ms latency without LLM calls, escalating to agentic reasoning only for novel questions. Experiments on LoCoMo and LongMemEval demonstrate that ByteRover achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on LoCoMo and competitive results on LongMemEval while requiring zero external infrastructure, no vector database, no graph database, no embedding service, with all knowledge stored as human-readable markdown files on the local filesystem.

AI.tldr: ByteRover提出了一种代理原生的内存架构，让LLM直接管理知识存储和检索，解决了传统外部内存服务中的语义漂移问题，实现了零外部基础设施的高效长上下文推理。
AI.motivation: 现有MAG方法将内存作为外部服务，导致存储系统不理解知识内容，产生语义漂移、跨代理协调上下文丢失以及故障恢复脆弱等问题。
AI.method: 提出ByteRover架构，让LLM直接管理知识：使用分层上下文树组织知识（域、主题、子主题、条目），包含显式关系、来源和自适应知识生命周期；采用5层渐进式检索策略，多数查询无需调用LLM。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo上达到SOTA准确率，在LongMemEval上获得有竞争力的结果，无需向量数据库、图数据库或嵌入服务，所有知识以可读markdown文件存储在本地文件系统。
AI.conclusion: ByteRover通过让LLM直接管理内存，解决了传统外部内存服务的语义漂移问题，实现了更高效、更可靠的长上下文推理，同时大幅简化了系统架构。

title: What Do Claim Verification Datasets Actually Test? A Reasoning Trace Analysis
summary: Despite rapid progress in claim verification, we lack a systematic understanding of what reasoning these benchmarks actually exercise. We generate structured reasoning traces for 24K claim-verification examples across 9 datasets using GPT-4o-mini and find that direct evidence extraction dominates, while multi-sentence synthesis and numerical reasoning are severely under-represented. A dataset-level breakdown reveals stark biases: some datasets almost exclusively test lexical matching, while others require information synthesis in roughly half of cases. Using a compact 1B-parameter reasoning verifier, we further characterize five error types and show that error profiles vary dramatically by domain -- general-domain verification is dominated by lexical overlap bias, scientific verification by overcautiousness, and mathematical verification by arithmetic reasoning failures. Our findings suggest that high benchmark scores primarily reflect retrieval-plus-entailment ability. We outline recommendations for building more challenging evaluation suites that better test the reasoning capabilities verification systems need.

AI.tldr: 论文分析了9个声明验证数据集的推理模式，发现现有基准主要测试证据提取能力，而多句合成和数值推理严重不足，高基准分数主要反映检索+蕴含能力而非复杂推理。
AI.motivation: 尽管声明验证领域进展迅速，但缺乏对现有基准实际测试推理能力的系统理解。需要分析这些基准真正测试的推理类型，以指导构建更具挑战性的评估套件。
AI.method: 使用GPT-4o-mini为9个数据集的24K声明验证示例生成结构化推理轨迹，分析推理模式分布。使用1B参数的推理验证器识别五种错误类型，并分析不同领域的错误特征。
AI.result: 发现直接证据提取占主导（约80%），多句合成和数值推理严重不足。数据集存在明显偏差：有些几乎只测试词汇匹配，有些约一半需要信息合成。错误模式因领域而异：通用领域受词汇重叠偏差主导，科学领域过度谨慎，数学领域算术推理失败。
AI.conclusion: 高基准分数主要反映检索+蕴含能力而非复杂推理。需要构建更挑战性的评估套件，更好地测试验证系统所需的推理能力，特别是多句合成和数值推理。

title: Output Corridor Impulsive Control of First-order Continuous System with Non-local Attractivity Analysis
summary: This paper addresses the design of an impulsive controller for a continuous scalar time-invariant linear plant that constitutes the simplest conceivable model of chemical kinetics. The model is ubiquitous in process control as well as pharmacometrics and readily generalizes to systems of Wiener structure. Given the impulsive nature of the feedback, the control problem formulation is particularly suited to discrete dosing applications in engineering and medicine, where both doses and inter-dose intervals are manipulated. Since the feedback controller acts at discrete time instants and employs both amplitude and frequency modulation, whereas the plant is continuous, the closed-loop system exhibits hybrid dynamics featuring complex nonlinear phenomena. The problem of confining the plant output to a predefined corridor of values is considered. The method at the heart of the proposed approach is to design a stable periodic solution, called a 1-cycle, whose one-dimensional orbit coincides with the predefined corridor. Conditions ensuring local and global attractivity of the 1-cycle are established. As a numerical illustration of the proposed approach, the problem of intravenous paracetamol dosing is considered.

AI.tldr: 设计脉冲控制器用于连续标量时不变线性系统，适用于离散给药应用，通过设计稳定的1周期轨道将输出限制在预定走廊内。
AI.motivation: 针对化学动力学简单模型（在过程控制和药代动力学中普遍存在）设计脉冲控制器，特别适用于工程和医学中的离散给药应用，其中需要同时操纵剂量和给药间隔。
AI.method: 设计一个稳定的周期解（称为1-cycle），其一维轨道与预定义走廊重合。建立确保1-cycle局部和全局吸引性的条件。通过静脉注射对乙酰氨基酚给药问题进行数值验证。
AI.result: 提出了将植物输出限制在预定走廊内的脉冲控制方法，建立了1-cycle的稳定性条件，并通过静脉注射对乙酰氨基酚给药问题验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为连续线性系统的离散脉冲控制提供了理论框架，特别适用于需要同时调节剂量和给药间隔的工程和医学应用，能够处理混合动力学系统中的复杂非线性现象。

title: Variational LSTM with Augmented Inputs: Nonlinear Response History Metamodeling with Aleatoric and Epistemic Uncertainty
summary: Uncertainty propagation in high-dimensional nonlinear dynamic structural systems is pivotal in state-of-the-art performance-based design and risk assessment, where uncertainties from both excitations and structures, i.e., the aleatoric uncertainty, must be considered. This poses a significant challenge due to heavy computational demands. Machine learning techniques are thus introduced as metamodels to alleviate this burden. However, the "black box" nature of Machine learning models underscores the necessity of avoiding overly confident predictions, particularly when data and training efforts are insufficient. This creates a need, in addition to considering the aleatoric uncertainty, of estimating the uncertainty related to the prediction confidence, i.e., epistemic uncertainty, for machine learning-based metamodels. We developed a probabilistic metamodeling technique based on a variational long short-term memory (LSTM) with augmented inputs to simultaneously capture aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties. Key random system parameters are treated as augmented inputs alongside excitation series carrying record-to-record variability to capture the full range of aleatoric uncertainty. Meanwhile, epistemic uncertainty is effectively approximated via the Monte Carlo dropout scheme. Unlike computationally expensive full Bayesian approaches, this method incurs negligible additional training costs while enabling nearly cost-free uncertainty simulation. The proposed technique is demonstrated through multiple case studies involving stochastic seismic or wind excitations. Results show that the calibrated metamodels accurately reproduce nonlinear response time histories and provide confidence bounds indicating the associated epistemic uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 提出基于变分LSTM的概率元建模技术，同时捕捉随机性和认知不确定性，用于高维非线性结构系统的可靠性分析
AI.motivation: 高维非线性结构系统的可靠性分析需要考虑激励和结构本身的随机性（偶然不确定性），但传统方法计算成本高昂。机器学习元模型虽然能减轻计算负担，但其"黑箱"特性在数据不足时容易产生过度自信的预测，因此需要同时估计预测置信度的不确定性（认知不确定性）。
AI.method: 开发基于变分长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的概率元建模技术，将关键随机系统参数作为增强输入与激励序列一起处理，捕捉偶然不确定性；同时采用蒙特卡洛dropout方案近似认知不确定性。该方法避免了计算昂贵的完全贝叶斯方法，训练成本几乎不增加。
AI.result: 通过随机地震或风激励的多个案例研究表明，校准后的元模型能够准确再现非线性响应时程，并提供表示相关认知不确定性的置信边界。
AI.conclusion: 提出的概率元建模技术能够有效同时处理偶然和认知不确定性，为基于性能的设计和风险评估提供可靠且计算高效的工具。

title: Computing the Exact Pareto Front in Average-Cost Multi-Objective Markov Decision Processes
summary: Many communication and control problems are cast as multi-objective Markov decision processes (MOMDPs). The complete solution to an MOMDP is the Pareto front. Much of the literature approximates this front via scalarization into single-objective MDPs. Recent work has begun to characterize the full front in discounted or simple bi-objective settings by exploiting its geometry. In this work, we characterize the exact front in average-cost MOMDPs. We show that the front is a continuous, piecewise-linear surface lying on the boundary of a convex polytope. Each vertex corresponds to a deterministic policy, and adjacent vertices differ in exactly one state. Each edge is realized as a convex combination of the policies at its endpoints, with the mixing coefficient given in closed form. We apply these results to a remote state estimation problem, where each vertex on the front corresponds to a threshold policy. The exact Pareto front and solutions to certain non-convex MDPs can be obtained without explicitly solving any MDP.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了平均成本多目标马尔可夫决策过程（MOMDP）的帕累托前沿，发现它是一个位于凸多面体边界上的连续分段线性曲面，每个顶点对应一个确定性策略，相邻顶点仅在一个状态上不同。
AI.motivation: 现有文献主要通过标量化方法近似处理MOMDP的帕累托前沿，或仅在折扣或简单双目标设置下研究其几何特性。本文旨在完整刻画平均成本MOMDP的精确帕累托前沿结构。
AI.method: 通过分析平均成本MOMDP的几何特性，证明帕累托前沿是位于凸多面体边界上的连续分段线性曲面。每个顶点对应确定性策略，相邻顶点仅在一个状态上不同，边缘是其端点策略的凸组合。
AI.result: 成功刻画了平均成本MOMDP的精确帕累托前沿结构，并应用于远程状态估计问题，发现前沿上的每个顶点对应阈值策略。无需显式求解任何MDP即可获得精确帕累托前沿和某些非凸MDP的解。
AI.conclusion: 本文完整描述了平均成本MOMDP的帕累托前沿几何结构，为多目标决策问题提供了新的理论框架，并在实际应用中展示了其有效性，能够直接获得精确解而无需传统MDP求解方法。

title: MM-ReCoder: Advancing Chart-to-Code Generation with Reinforcement Learning and Self-Correction
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently demonstrated promising capabilities in multimodal coding tasks such as chart-to-code generation. However, existing methods primarily rely on supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which requires the model to learn code patterns through chart-code pairs but does not expose the model to a code execution environment. Moreover, while self-correction through execution feedback offers a potential route to improve coding quality, even state-of-the-art MLLMs have been shown to struggle with effective self-correction. In this work, we introduce MM-ReCoder, a chart-to-code generation model trained with reinforcement learning (RL) and equipped with self-correction ability. We propose a two-stage multi-turn self-correction RL strategy based on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). The first stage enhances the model's self-correction ability via rolling out a shared first turn, while the second stage improves the coding capability with full-trajectory optimization. MM-ReCoder learns to produce more accurate and executable code through the interaction with the environment and by iteratively correcting its own outputs. Our results on three chart-to-code benchmarks demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of MM-ReCoder.

AI.tldr: MM-ReCoder：基于强化学习和自校正能力的图表到代码生成模型，通过两阶段多轮自校正策略提升代码生成质量
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型主要依赖监督微调进行图表到代码生成，但缺乏代码执行环境的暴露，且即使最先进的模型也难以有效进行自校正。需要一种能够通过执行反馈改进代码质量的方法。
AI.method: 提出MM-ReCoder模型，采用基于Group Relative Policy Optimization的两阶段多轮自校正强化学习策略：第一阶段通过共享首轮增强自校正能力，第二阶段通过全轨迹优化提升编码能力。
AI.result: 在三个图表到代码基准测试中取得了最先进的性能，能够生成更准确、可执行的代码。
AI.conclusion: 通过强化学习和自校正能力的结合，MM-ReCoder显著提升了多模态代码生成的质量，证明了环境交互和迭代自校正对改进图表到代码生成任务的有效性。

title: PRCCF: A Persona-guided Retrieval and Causal-aware Cognitive Filtering Framework for Emotional Support Conversation
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables. Submitted to Transactions of the Association for Computational Linguistics (TACL)
summary: Emotional Support Conversation (ESC) aims to alleviate individual emotional distress by generating empathetic responses. However, existing methods face challenges in effectively supporting deep contextual understanding. To address this issue, we propose PRCCF, a Persona-guided Retrieval and Causality-aware Cognitive Filtering framework. Specifically, the framework incorporates a persona-guided retrieval mechanism that jointly models semantic compatibility and persona alignment to enhance response generation. Furthermore, it employs a causality-aware cognitive filtering module to prioritize causally relevant external knowledge, thereby improving contextual cognitive understanding for emotional reasoning. Extensive experiments on the ESConv dataset demonstrate that PRCCF outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on both automatic metrics and human evaluations. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/YancyLyx/PRCCF.

AI.tldr: PRCCF是一个用于情感支持对话的框架，通过角色引导检索和因果感知认知过滤来提升上下文理解和情感推理能力，在ESConv数据集上超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有情感支持对话方法在深度上下文理解方面存在不足，无法有效支持用户的情感需求，需要更有效的机制来增强上下文认知和情感推理。
AI.method: 提出PRCCF框架，包含两个核心模块：1）角色引导检索机制，联合建模语义兼容性和角色对齐来增强响应生成；2）因果感知认知过滤模块，优先选择因果相关的外部知识来改善上下文认知理解。
AI.result: 在ESConv数据集上的大量实验表明，PRCCF在自动评估指标和人工评估上都超越了最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PRCCF通过结合角色引导检索和因果感知认知过滤，有效提升了情感支持对话中的上下文理解和情感推理能力，为解决现有方法的局限性提供了有效方案。

title: Balancing Morality and Economics: Population Games with Herding and Inertia
summary: The adoption of clean technologies (CTs) plays an important role in reducing carbon dioxide (CO$_2$) emissions. We study CT adoption in a large population of consumers with heterogeneous behavioral tendencies. We model the interaction among the agents as a multi-type mean-field game in which the agents choose between clean and polluting technology based products and may either behave as rationals (trading off price and moral incentives), herding agents (just follow the majority), or lethargic agents exhibiting inertia toward adopting the new technologies. We characterize equilibrium CT adoption levels using the recently introduced notion of $\boldsymbolα$-Rational Nash Equilibrium ($\boldsymbolα$-RNE) and its multi-type extension. We then identify a stable subset using the limits of a stochastic turn-by-turn behavioral dynamics. Our results highlight the role of population composition in determining CT adoption. In particular, widespread adoption requires either a sufficiently small price disadvantage for CTs or the presence of a sufficiently large herding population that can be influenced through social awareness programs. Surprisingly, we could prove that environmental damages do not provide sufficient incentives to increase CT adoption.

AI.tldr: 研究清洁技术采用的多类型均值场博弈模型，分析理性、从众和惰性三类消费者的技术选择行为，发现人口构成对清洁技术普及的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 研究清洁技术（CTs）采用对减少二氧化碳排放的重要作用，关注具有异质行为倾向的大规模消费者群体中清洁技术采用的动态过程。
AI.method: 建立多类型均值场博弈模型，消费者分为理性（权衡价格和道德激励）、从众（跟随多数）和惰性（对新技术有惯性）三类，使用α-理性纳什均衡及其多类型扩展分析均衡CT采用水平，通过随机轮换行为动态的极限识别稳定子集。
AI.result: 人口构成对CT采用起决定性作用：广泛采用需要CT价格劣势足够小，或存在足够大的从众群体可通过社会意识项目影响。令人惊讶的是，环境损害本身不足以激励增加CT采用。
AI.conclusion: 清洁技术普及的关键在于人口构成而非环境损害激励，政策应关注降低价格劣势或利用从众行为通过社会意识项目促进技术采用。

title: Optimizing EEG Graph Structure for Seizure Detection: An Information Bottleneck and Self-Supervised Learning Approach
comment: Accepted by IEEE 14th International Conference on Healthcare Informatics (ICHI)
summary: Seizure detection from EEG signals is highly challenging due to complex spatiotemporal dynamics and extreme inter-patient variability. To model them, recent methods construct dynamic graphs via statistical correlations, predefined similarity measures, or implicit learning, yet rarely account for EEG's noisy nature. Consequently, these graphs usually contain redundant or task-irrelevant connections, undermining model performance even with state-of-the-art architectures. In this paper, we present a new perspective for EEG seizure detection: jointly learning denoised dynamic graph structures and informative spatial-temporal representations guided by the Information Bottleneck (IB). Unlike prior approaches, our graph constructor explicitly accounts for the noisy characteristics of EEG data, producing compact and reliable connectivity patterns that better support downstream seizure detection. To further enhance representation learning, we employ a self-supervised Graph Masked AutoEncoder that reconstructs masked EEG signals based on dynamic graph context, promoting structure-aware and compact representations aligned with the IB principle. Bringing things together, we introduce Information Bottleneck-guided EEG SeizuRE DetectioN via SElf-Supervised Learning (IRENE), which explicitly learns dynamic graph structures and interpretable spatial-temporal EEG representations. IRENE addresses three core challenges: (i) Identifying the most informative nodes and edges; (ii) Explaining seizure propagation in the brain network; and (iii) Enhancing robustness against label scarcity and inter-patient variability. Extensive experiments on benchmark EEG datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in seizure detection and provides clinically meaningful insights into seizure dynamics. The source code is available at https://github.com/LabRAI/IRENE.

AI.tldr: 提出IRENE方法，通过信息瓶颈指导的图结构和自监督学习，解决EEG癫痫检测中的噪声、动态连接和患者间变异问题。
AI.motivation: EEG癫痫检测面临复杂时空动态和极端患者间变异性的挑战。现有方法构建的动态图通常包含冗余或任务无关的连接，未能充分考虑EEG的噪声特性，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 提出IRENE方法：1) 基于信息瓶颈原理联合学习去噪的动态图结构和信息丰富的时空表示；2) 使用自监督图掩码自编码器，基于动态图上下文重建掩码的EEG信号；3) 明确考虑EEG的噪声特性，生成紧凑可靠的连接模式。
AI.result: 在基准EEG数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法在癫痫检测方面优于最先进的基线方法，并为癫痫动态提供了临床有意义的见解。
AI.conclusion: IRENE通过信息瓶颈指导的图结构学习和自监督表示学习，有效解决了EEG癫痫检测中的三个核心挑战：识别信息节点和边、解释癫痫传播、增强对标签稀缺和患者间变异性的鲁棒性。

title: Stochastic Control for Organ Donations: A Review
summary: We review the literature on individual patient organ acceptance decision making by presenting a Markov Decision Process (MDP) model to formulate the organ acceptance decision process as a stochastic control problem. Under the umbrella of the MDP framework, we classify and summarize the major research streams and contributions. In particular, we focus on control limit-type policies, which are shown to be optimal under certain conditions and easy to implement in practice. Finally, we briefly discuss open problems and directions for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了器官移植中个体患者器官接受决策的文献，使用马尔可夫决策过程模型将器官接受决策过程表述为随机控制问题，重点讨论了控制极限型策略及其在实际中的易实施性。
AI.motivation: 器官移植中的器官接受决策是一个复杂的随机控制问题，需要系统性的理论框架来指导临床决策，提高移植效率和患者生存率。
AI.method: 使用马尔可夫决策过程模型来形式化器官接受决策过程，并在MDP框架下对现有研究进行分类和总结，特别关注控制极限型策略。
AI.result: 研究表明控制极限型策略在特定条件下是最优的，并且在实际中易于实施，为器官接受决策提供了有效的理论指导。
AI.conclusion: MDP框架为器官接受决策提供了有效的建模工具，控制极限型策略具有实际应用价值，未来研究需要解决更多开放性问题。

title: CRaFT: Circuit-Guided Refusal Feature Selection via Cross-Layer Transcoders
summary: As safety concerns around large language models (LLMs) grow, understanding the internal mechanisms underlying refusal behavior has become increasingly important. Recent work has studied this behavior by identifying internal features associated with refusal and manipulating them to induce compliance with harmful requests. However, existing refusal feature selection methods rely on how strongly features activate on harmful prompts, which tends to capture superficial signals rather than the causal factors underlying the refusal decision. We propose CRaFT, a circuit-guided refusal feature selection framework that ranks features by their influence on the model's refusal-compliance decision using prompts near the refusal boundary. On Gemma-3-1B-it, CRaFT improves attack success rate (ASR) from 6.7% to 48.2% and outperforms baseline methods across multiple jailbreak benchmarks. These results suggest that circuit influence is a more reliable criterion than activation magnitude for identifying features that causally mediate refusal behavior.

AI.tldr: CRaFT：基于电路引导的拒绝特征选择框架，通过边界附近提示评估特征对拒绝-合规决策的影响，相比基于激活强度的基线方法显著提升攻击成功率
AI.motivation: 现有拒绝特征选择方法依赖特征在有害提示上的激活强度，这往往捕捉的是表面信号而非拒绝决策的因果因素。需要更可靠的方法来识别因果介导拒绝行为的特征。
AI.method: 提出CRaFT框架，使用拒绝边界附近的提示来评估特征对模型拒绝-合规决策的影响，基于电路影响力而非激活强度来排名特征，从而识别因果性拒绝特征。
AI.result: 在Gemma-3-1B-it模型上，CRaFT将攻击成功率从6.7%提升到48.2%，在多个越狱基准测试中优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 电路影响力比激活强度更可靠，是识别因果介导拒绝行为特征的更好标准。CRaFT框架能有效识别和操作拒绝行为的内部机制。

title: PRISM: Probability Reallocation with In-Span Masking for Knowledge-Sensitive Alignment
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with token-level hard labels can amplify overconfident imitation of factually unsupported targets, causing hallucinations that propagate in multi-sentence generation. We study an augmented SFT setting in which training instances include coarse sentence-level factuality risk labels and inter-sentence dependency annotations, providing structured signals about where factual commitments are weakly supported. We propose \textbf{PRISM}, a differentiable risk-gated framework that modifies learning only at fact-critical positions. PRISM augments standard SFT with a lightweight, model-aware probability reallocation objective that penalizes high-confidence predictions on risky target tokens, with its scope controlled by span-level risk weights and model-aware gating. Experiments on hallucination-sensitive factual benchmarks and general evaluations show that PRISM improves factual aggregates across backbones while maintaining a competitive overall capability profile. Ablations further show that the auxiliary signal is most effective when used conservatively, and that knowledge masking and model-aware reallocation play complementary roles in balancing factual correction and capability preservation.

AI.tldr: PRISM：一种基于风险门控的微调框架，通过句子级事实性风险标签和句子间依赖标注来减少多句子生成中的幻觉问题，在保持模型整体能力的同时提升事实准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统监督微调使用token级硬标签会放大对事实不支持目标的过度自信模仿，导致幻觉在多句子生成中传播。需要一种方法能识别事实性风险位置并针对性调整学习。
AI.method: PRISM框架在训练实例中包含句子级事实性风险标签和句子间依赖标注，采用可微分风险门控机制，仅在事实关键位置修改学习。通过轻量级的模型感知概率重分配目标，对高风险目标token的高置信度预测进行惩罚，其范围由span级风险权重和模型感知门控控制。
AI.result: 在幻觉敏感的事实基准测试和一般评估中，PRISM改善了不同骨干模型的事实聚合度，同时保持了有竞争力的整体能力。消融实验显示辅助信号在保守使用时最有效，知识掩码和模型感知重分配在平衡事实校正和能力保持方面起互补作用。
AI.conclusion: PRISM通过结构化的事实性风险信号和风险门控机制，有效减少了语言模型生成中的幻觉问题，在提升事实准确性的同时保持了模型的整体能力，为控制生成质量提供了新方法。

title: Faster Symmetric Rendezvous on Four or More Locations
summary: In the symmetric rendezvous problem two players follow the same (randomized) strategy to visit one of $n$ locations in each time step $t=0,1,2,\dots$. Their goal is to minimize the expected time until they visit the same location and thus meet. Anderson and Weber [J. Appl. Prob., 1990] proposed a strategy that operates in rounds of $n-1$ steps: a player either remains in one location for $n-1$ steps or visits the other $n-1$ locations in random order; the choice between these two options is made with a probability that depends only on $n$. The strategy is known to be optimal for $n=2$ and $n=3$, and there is convincing evidence that it is not optimal for $n=4$. We show that it is not optimal for any $n\geq 4$, by constructing a strategy with a smaller expected meeting time.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明Anderson-Weber策略对于n≥4的对称约会问题不是最优的，通过构造具有更小期望相遇时间的策略来证明。
AI.motivation: 研究对称约会问题中Anderson-Weber策略的最优性。该策略已知在n=2和n=3时最优，但有证据表明在n=4时可能不是最优。需要验证该策略对于更大n值的最优性。
AI.method: 构造了一个新的策略，该策略具有比Anderson-Weber策略更小的期望相遇时间。通过理论分析和数学证明来比较两种策略的性能。
AI.result: 成功证明Anderson-Weber策略对于所有n≥4都不是最优的。构造的新策略在所有n≥4的情况下都实现了更小的期望相遇时间。
AI.conclusion: Anderson-Weber策略仅在n=2和n=3时是最优的，对于所有n≥4都存在更好的策略。这解决了对称约会问题中关于该策略最优性的长期疑问。

title: Learning from the Right Rollouts: Data Attribution for PPO-based LLM Post-Training
summary: Traditional RL algorithms like Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) typically train on the entire rollout buffer, operating under the assumption that all generated episodes provide a beneficial optimization signal. However, these episodes frequently contain noisy or unfaithful reasoning, which can degrade model performance and slow down training. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Influence-Guided PPO (I-PPO)}, a novel framework that integrates data attribution into the RL post-training loop. By calculating an influence score for each episode using a gradient-based approximation, I-PPO identifies and eliminates episodes that are anti-aligned with a validation gradient. Our experiments demonstrate that I-PPO consistently outperforms SFT and PPO baselines. We show that our filtering process acts as an intrinsic early stopping mechanism, accelerating training efficiency while effectively reducing unfaithful CoT reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出I-PPO框架，通过梯度影响分数筛选训练数据，消除与验证梯度不对齐的噪声推理片段，提升RL训练效率和模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统RL算法（如PPO）假设所有生成片段都提供有益优化信号，但实际上这些片段常包含噪声或不忠实的推理，会降低模型性能并减慢训练速度。
AI.method: 提出Influence-Guided PPO (I-PPO)框架，将数据归因整合到RL后训练循环中。通过基于梯度的近似计算每个片段的影响分数，识别并消除与验证梯度不对齐的片段。
AI.result: I-PPO在实验中持续优于SFT和PPO基线。筛选过程起到内在早停机制的作用，加速训练效率，同时有效减少不忠实的思维链推理。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据归因和影响分数引导的片段筛选，I-PPO能够提升RL训练效果，减少噪声推理的影响，实现更高效和忠实的模型训练。

title: Sensitivity analysis for stopping criteria with application to organ transplantations
summary: We consider a stopping problem and its application to the decision-making process regarding the optimal timing of organ transplantation for individual patients. At each decision period, the patient state is inspected and a decision is made whether to transplant. If the organ is transplanted, the process terminates; otherwise, the process continues until a transplant happens or the patient dies. Under suitable conditions, we show that there exists a control limit optimal policy. We propose a smoothed perturbation analysis (SPA) estimator for the gradient of the total expected discounted reward with respect to the control limit. Moreover, we show that the SPA estimator is asymptotically unbiased.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一个停止问题及其在器官移植最佳时机决策中的应用，证明了控制极限最优策略的存在性，并提出了用于估计梯度的高效SPA估计器。
AI.motivation: 为个体患者确定器官移植的最佳时机是一个关键的医疗决策问题。患者状态随时间变化，需要决定何时进行移植以最大化期望收益（如生存率或生活质量）。
AI.method: 将器官移植决策建模为停止问题，证明在适当条件下存在控制极限最优策略。提出平滑扰动分析（SPA）估计器来估计总期望折现收益相对于控制极限的梯度。
AI.result: 证明了控制极限最优策略的存在性，SPA估计器是渐近无偏的，能够有效估计梯度信息。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为器官移植时机决策提供了理论框架和实用工具，SPA估计器的渐近无偏性保证了梯度估计的可靠性，有助于优化移植决策策略。

title: From Multi-Agent to Single-Agent: When Is Skill Distillation Beneficial?
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) tackle complex tasks by distributing expertise, though this often comes at the cost of heavy coordination overhead, context fragmentation, and brittle phase ordering. Distilling a MAS into a single-agent skill can bypass these costs, but this conversion lacks a principled answer for when and what to distill. Instead, the empirical outcome is surprisingly inconsistent: skill lift ranges from a 28% improvement to a 2% degradation across metrics of the exact same task. In this work, we reveal that skill utility is governed not by the task, but by the evaluation metric. We introduce Metric Freedom ($F$), the first a priori predictor of skill utility. $F$ measures the topological rigidity of a metric's scoring landscape by quantifying how output diversity couples with score variance via a Mantel test. Guided by $F$, we propose a two-stage adaptive distillation framework. Stage 1 acts as a selective extraction mechanism, extracting tools and knowledge while discarding restrictive structures on "free" metrics to preserve exploration. Stage 2 targets computationally intensive iterative refinement exclusively toward "rigid" metrics ($F \lesssim 0.6$) to eliminate trajectory-local overfitting. Evaluating across 4 tasks, 11 datasets, and 6 metrics, $F$ strongly predicts skill utility ($ρ= -0.62$, $p < 0.05$). Strikingly, identical agent trajectories yield diametrically opposite skill lifts under rigid versus free metrics, demonstrating that skill utility is fundamentally a metric-level property. Driven by this signal, our adaptive agent matches or exceeds the original MAS while reducing cost up to 8$\times$ and latency by up to 15$\times$.

AI.tldr: 提出Metric Freedom (F)作为技能效用的先验预测指标，通过两阶段自适应蒸馏框架，在保持性能的同时显著降低多智能体系统的成本和延迟。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统虽然能处理复杂任务，但存在协调开销大、上下文碎片化和脆弱的阶段排序等问题。将MAS蒸馏为单智能体技能可以绕过这些成本，但缺乏关于何时蒸馏和蒸馏什么的原则性指导，导致技能提升效果在不同评估指标下差异巨大。
AI.method: 1) 提出Metric Freedom (F)指标，通过Mantel测试量化输出多样性与得分方差之间的耦合关系，衡量评分地形的拓扑刚性；2) 基于F的两阶段自适应蒸馏框架：第一阶段作为选择性提取机制，在"自由"指标上提取工具和知识同时丢弃限制性结构以保持探索性；第二阶段专门针对"刚性"指标(F ≤ 0.6)进行计算密集的迭代优化，消除轨迹局部过拟合。
AI.result: 在4个任务、11个数据集和6个指标上的评估显示，F能强预测技能效用(ρ=-0.62, p<0.05)。相同的智能体轨迹在刚性与自由指标下产生完全相反的性能提升。自适应智能体在匹配或超越原始MAS性能的同时，将成本降低最多8倍，延迟减少最多15倍。
AI.conclusion: 技能效用本质上是指标层面的属性，而非任务属性。Metric Freedom (F)作为第一个技能效用的先验预测指标，指导的自适应蒸馏框架能够有效平衡性能与效率，为多智能体系统向单智能体技能的转化提供了理论依据和实践方法。

title: On the Role of Reasoning Patterns in the Generalization Discrepancy of Long Chain-of-Thought Supervised Fine-Tuning
summary: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) on long Chain-of-Thought (CoT) trajectories has become a pivotal phase in building large reasoning models. However, how CoT trajectories from different sources influence the generalization performance of models remains an open question. In this paper, we conduct a comparative study using two sources of verified CoT trajectories generated by two competing models, \texttt{DeepSeek-R1-0528} and \texttt{gpt-oss-120b}, with their problem sets controlled to be identical. Despite their comparable performance, we uncover a striking paradox: lower training loss does not translate to better generalization. SFT on \texttt{DeepSeek-R1-0528} data achieves remarkably lower training loss, yet exhibits significantly worse generalization performance on reasoning benchmarks compared to those trained on \texttt{gpt-oss-120b}. To understand this paradox, we perform a multi-faceted analysis probing token-level SFT loss and step-level reasoning behaviors. Our analysis reveals a difference in reasoning patterns. \texttt{gpt-oss-120b} exhibits highly convergent and deductive trajectories, whereas \texttt{DeepSeek-R1-0528} favors a divergent and branch-heavy exploration pattern. Consequently, models trained with \texttt{DeepSeek-R1} data inherit inefficient exploration behaviors, often getting trapped in redundant exploratory branches that hinder them from reaching correct solutions. Building upon this insight, we propose a simple yet effective remedy of filtering out frequently branching trajectories to improve the generalization of SFT. Experiments show that training on selected \texttt{DeepSeek-R1-0528} subsets surprisingly improves reasoning performance by up to 5.1% on AIME25, 5.5% on BeyondAIME, and on average 3.6% on five benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 研究发现监督微调中思维链轨迹来源对模型泛化性能有重要影响：训练损失低不等于泛化好，DeepSeek-R1数据训练损失更低但泛化更差，因其发散式推理模式导致模型陷入冗余探索分支。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探究不同来源的思维链轨迹如何影响大语言模型的泛化性能，特别是当两个竞争模型在相同问题集上表现相当时，它们的思维链轨迹对监督微调效果的影响差异。
AI.method: 采用对比研究方法，使用DeepSeek-R1-0528和gpt-oss-120b生成的已验证思维链轨迹，控制问题集相同。进行多层面分析，包括词元级训练损失和步骤级推理行为分析，并提出过滤频繁分支轨迹的简单方法。
AI.result: 发现一个悖论：DeepSeek-R1数据训练损失更低但泛化性能显著更差。分析显示gpt-oss-120b采用收敛式演绎推理，而DeepSeek-R1偏好发散式分支探索。过滤频繁分支轨迹后，DeepSeek-R1子集训练在AIME25上提升5.1%，BeyondAIME上提升5.5%，五个基准平均提升3.6%。
AI.conclusion: 思维链轨迹的推理模式对模型泛化性能有重要影响，收敛式演绎推理优于发散式探索。通过过滤频繁分支轨迹可以显著提升监督微调的泛化能力，为高质量思维链数据选择提供了实用指导。

title: Fixed-time-stable ODE Representation of Lasso
summary: Lasso problems arise in many areas, including signal processing, machine learning, and control, and are closely connected to sparse coding mechanisms observed in neuroscience. A continuous-time ordinary differential equation (ODE) representation of the Lasso problem not only enables its solution on analog computers but also provides a framework for interpreting neurophysiological phenomena. This article proposes a fixed-time-stable ODE representation of the Lasso problem by first transforming it into a smooth nonnegative quadratic program (QP) and then designing a projection-free Newton-based ODE representation of the Lasso problem by first transforming it into a smooth nonnegative quadratic program (QP) and then designing a projection-free Newton-based fixed-time-stable ODE system for solving the corresponding Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) conditions. Moreover, the settling time of the ODE is independent of the problem data and can be arbitrarily prescribed. Numerical experiments verify that the trajectory reaches the optimal solution within the prescribed time.

AI.tldr: 提出一种固定时间稳定的ODE表示来解决Lasso问题，通过将其转化为光滑非负二次规划，并设计无投影的牛顿型ODE系统，收敛时间可任意设定且与问题数据无关。
AI.motivation: Lasso问题在信号处理、机器学习和控制等领域广泛应用，并与神经科学中的稀疏编码机制密切相关。连续时间ODE表示不仅能在模拟计算机上求解，还为解释神经生理现象提供框架。
AI.method: 首先将Lasso问题转化为光滑的非负二次规划问题，然后设计无投影的牛顿型固定时间稳定ODE系统来求解对应的KKT条件。
AI.result: ODE的收敛时间与问题数据无关且可任意设定，数值实验验证了轨迹能在规定时间内达到最优解。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为Lasso问题提供了固定时间稳定的ODE表示，具有收敛时间可预设且独立于问题数据的优势，在模拟计算和神经科学解释方面有应用潜力。

title: Training In-Context and In-Weights Mixtures Via Contrastive Context Sampling
summary:
We investigate training strategies that co-develop in-context learning (ICL) and in-weights learning (IWL), and the ability to switch between them based on context relevance. Although current LLMs exhibit both modes, standard task-specific fine-tuning often erodes ICL, motivating IC-Train - fine-tuning with in-context examples. Prior work has shown that emergence of ICL after IC-Train depends on factors such as task diversity and training duration.
  In this paper we show that the similarity structure between target inputs and context examples also plays an important role. Random context leads to loss of ICL and IWL dominance, while only similar examples in context causes ICL to degenerate to copying labels without regard to relevance. To address this, we propose a simple Contrastive-Context which enforces two types of contrasts: (1) mix of similar and random examples within a context to evolve a correct form of ICL, and (2) varying grades of similarity across contexts to evolve ICL-IWL mixtures. We present insights on the importance of such contrast with theoretical analysis of a minimal model. We validate with extensive empirical evaluation on four LLMs and several tasks. Diagnostic probes confirm that contrasted contexts yield stable ICL-IWL mixtures, avoiding collapse into pure ICL, IWL, or copying.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Contrastive-Context训练策略，通过混合相似和随机示例来促进ICL和IWL的协同发展，避免模型退化到纯ICL、IWL或简单复制标签的模式。
AI.motivation: 当前LLMs虽然同时具备上下文学习(ICL)和权重学习(IWL)能力，但标准任务特定微调往往会削弱ICL能力。现有的IC-Train方法中，上下文示例的相似性结构对ICL的涌现有重要影响：随机上下文会导致ICL丧失，而只有相似示例则会使ICL退化为简单复制标签。
AI.method: 提出Contrastive-Context训练策略，包含两种对比：(1)在单个上下文中混合相似和随机示例，促进正确形式的ICL发展；(2)在不同上下文中使用不同相似度等级的示例，促进ICL-IWL混合能力的发展。通过理论分析和实验验证。
AI.result: 在四个LLM和多个任务上的实验验证表明，对比上下文能产生稳定的ICL-IWL混合能力，避免模型退化到纯ICL、IWL或简单复制标签的模式。诊断探针确认了这种稳定混合状态。
AI.conclusion: 上下文示例的相似性结构对ICL-IWL协同发展至关重要，Contrastive-Context策略通过强制对比学习，能够有效促进模型在两种学习模式间的灵活切换，避免退化现象。

title: Data-Driven Koopman Predictive Control for Frequency Regulation of Power Systems using Black-Box IBRs
summary: Model uncertainty of inverter-based resources (IBRs) presents significant challenges for power system control and stability. This work studies secondary frequency regulation in inverter-based power systems using a Data-driven Koopman Predictive Control (DKPC) framework. The method employs Koopman theory to lift the nonlinear system dynamics into a higher-dimensional space where they can be approximated as linear. Based on Willems' fundamental lemma, a behavioral model is constructed directly from lifted input-output data. A receding-horizon predictive control formulation is then provided that operates entirely using observed data, without requiring a parametric model, while satisfying explicit constraints on the control input and system output. The proposed approach is particularly suited for IBRs with complex or uncertain dynamics. Numerical results demonstrate its effectiveness for frequency control as benchmarked against the Data-enabled Predictive Control (DeePC). The trade-off between tracking performance and control effort is illustrated through tuning of the weighting parameters.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于数据驱动Koopman预测控制（DKPC）的逆变器电力系统二次频率调节方法，无需参数模型，直接使用观测数据进行预测控制。
AI.motivation: 逆变器型资源（IBRs）的模型不确定性给电力系统控制和稳定性带来重大挑战，需要能够处理复杂或不确定动态的数据驱动控制方法。
AI.method: 结合Koopman理论和Willems基本引理：1）用Koopman理论将非线性系统动态提升到高维线性空间；2）基于提升的输入输出数据构建行为模型；3）设计满足约束的滚动时域预测控制框架。
AI.result: 数值结果表明该方法在频率控制方面有效，与数据驱动预测控制（DeePC）相比具有优势，并通过权重参数调整展示了跟踪性能与控制努力之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: DKPC框架特别适用于具有复杂或不确定动态的IBRs，提供了一种无需参数模型、完全基于观测数据的有效频率控制方法。

title: GraphWalk: Enabling Reasoning in Large Language Models through Tool-Based Graph Navigation
summary: The use of knowledge graphs for grounding agents in real-world Q&A applications has become increasingly common. Answering complex queries often requires multi-hop reasoning and the ability to navigate vast relational structures. Standard approaches rely on prompting techniques that steer large language models to reason over raw graph context, or retrieval-augmented generation pipelines where relevant subgraphs are injected into the context. These, however, face severe limitations with enterprise-scale KGs that cannot fit in even the largest context windows available today. We present GraphWalk, a problem-agnostic, training-free, tool-based framework that allows off-the-shelf LLMs to reason through sequential graph navigation, dramatically increasing performance across different tasks. Unlike task-specific agent frameworks that encode domain knowledge into specialized tools, GraphWalk equips the LLM with a minimal set of orthogonal graph operations sufficient to traverse any graph structure. We evaluate whether models equipped with GraphWalk can compose these operations into correct multi-step reasoning chains, where each tool call represents a verifiable step creating a transparent execution trace. We first demonstrate our approach on maze traversal, a problem non-reasoning models are completely unable to solve, then present results on graphs resembling real-world enterprise knowledge graphs. To isolate structural reasoning from world knowledge, we evaluate on entirely synthetic graphs with random, non-semantic labels. Our benchmark spans 12 query templates from basic retrieval to compound first-order logic queries. Results show that tool-based traversal yields substantial and consistent gains over in-context baselines across all model families tested, with gains becoming more pronounced as scale increases, precisely where in-context approaches fail catastrophically.

AI.tldr: GraphWalk：无需训练的工具化框架，让现成LLM通过图遍历操作进行多跳推理，解决大规模知识图谱无法放入上下文的问题
AI.motivation: 企业级知识图谱规模庞大，无法放入现有LLM的上下文窗口，传统基于提示或检索增强的方法在处理复杂多跳查询时面临严重限制
AI.method: 提供最小正交图操作工具集（如节点遍历、边查询），让LLM通过工具调用序列化导航图结构，形成可验证的执行轨迹
AI.result: 在所有测试模型家族中，基于工具的图遍历方法相比上下文基线都有显著提升，且随着模型规模增大，优势更加明显（上下文方法会完全失败）
AI.conclusion: GraphWalk框架证明，通过工具化图遍历操作，现成LLM能够进行复杂多步推理，解决大规模知识图谱的查询问题，且方法透明可验证

title: Development and multi-center evaluation of domain-adapted speech recognition for human-AI teaming in real-world gastrointestinal endoscopy
comment: Under review at npj Digital Medicine
summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) is a critical interface for human-AI interaction in gastrointestinal endoscopy, yet its reliability in real-world clinical settings is limited by domain-specific terminology and complex acoustic conditions. Here, we present EndoASR, a domain-adapted ASR system designed for real-time deployment in endoscopic workflows. We develop a two-stage adaptation strategy based on synthetic endoscopy reports, targeting domain-specific language modeling and noise robustness. In retrospective evaluation across six endoscopists, EndoASR substantially improves both transcription accuracy and clinical usability, reducing character error rate (CER) from 20.52% to 14.14% and increasing medical term accuracy (Med ACC) from 54.30% to 87.59%. In a prospective multi-center study spanning five independent endoscopy centers, EndoASR demonstrates consistent generalization under heterogeneous real-world conditions. Compared with the baseline Paraformer model, CER is reduced from 16.20% to 14.97%, while Med ACC is improved from 61.63% to 84.16%, confirming its robustness in practical deployment scenarios. Notably, EndoASR achieves a real-time factor (RTF) of 0.005, significantly faster than Whisper-large-v3 (RTF 0.055), while maintaining a compact model size of 220M parameters, enabling efficient edge deployment. Furthermore, integration with large language models demonstrates that improved ASR quality directly enhances downstream structured information extraction and clinician-AI interaction. These results demonstrate that domain-adapted ASR can serve as a reliable interface for human-AI teaming in gastrointestinal endoscopy, with consistent performance validated across multi-center real-world clinical settings.

AI.tldr: EndoASR是一个针对胃肠内窥镜场景优化的自动语音识别系统，通过领域自适应显著提升临床环境下的识别准确率和实时性能。
AI.motivation: 传统ASR系统在胃肠内窥镜临床环境中面临领域特定术语和复杂声学条件的挑战，限制了其在真实临床场景中的可靠性，需要专门针对内窥镜工作流程优化的ASR解决方案。
AI.method: 采用基于合成内窥镜报告的两阶段自适应策略，包括领域特定语言建模和噪声鲁棒性优化，设计紧凑模型架构（220M参数）实现边缘部署。
AI.result: 在回顾性评估中，字符错误率从20.52%降至14.14%，医学术语准确率从54.30%提升至87.59%；前瞻性多中心研究中，字符错误率从16.20%降至14.97%，医学术语准确率从61.63%提升至84.16%，实时因子仅0.005，显著优于Whisper-large-v3。
AI.conclusion: 领域自适应的ASR系统可作为胃肠内窥镜中人机协作的可靠接口，在多中心真实临床环境中验证了其一致性能，改进的ASR质量直接增强了下游结构化信息提取和临床医生-AI交互。

title: Safe Control of Feedback-Interconnected Systems via Singular Perturbations
summary: Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) have emerged as a powerful tool in the design of safety-critical controllers for nonlinear systems. In modern applications, complex systems often involve the feedback interconnection of subsystems evolving at different timescales, e.g., two parts from different physical domains (e.g., the electrical and mechanical parts of robotic systems) or a physical plant and an (optimization or control) algorithm. In these scenarios, safety constraints often involve only a portion of the overall system. Inspired by singular perturbations for stability analysis, we develop a formal procedure to lift a safety certificate designed on a reduced-order model to the overall feedback-interconnected system. Specifically, we show that under a sufficient timescale separation between slow and fast dynamics, a composite CBF can be designed to certify the forward invariance of the safe set for the interconnected system. As a result, the online safety filter only needs to be solved for the lower-dimensional, reduced-order model. We numerically test the proposed approach on: (i) a robotic arm with joint motor dynamics, and (ii) a physical plant driven by an optimization algorithm.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于时间尺度分离的复合控制屏障函数方法，将简化模型的安全证书扩展到反馈互联系统，降低在线安全滤波器的计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现代复杂系统通常包含不同时间尺度的反馈互联子系统，安全约束往往只涉及系统的一部分。需要一种方法将简化模型的安全证书扩展到整个互联系统，同时降低在线计算负担。
AI.method: 受奇异摄动稳定性分析启发，开发了将简化模型安全证书提升到整体反馈互联系统的形式化程序。在慢快动力学充分时间尺度分离条件下，设计复合控制屏障函数来保证互联系统安全集的前向不变性。
AI.result: 提出的方法允许在线安全滤波器只需在低维简化模型上求解，显著降低计算复杂度。在机器人臂关节电机动力学和优化算法驱动的物理系统两个案例中进行了数值验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功将简化模型的安全证书扩展到时间尺度分离的反馈互联系统，通过复合控制屏障函数设计实现了整体系统的安全保证，同时大幅减少了在线计算需求。

title: Pseudo-Quantized Actor-Critic Algorithm for Robustness to Noisy Temporal Difference Error
summary: In reinforcement learning (RL), temporal difference (TD) errors are widely adopted for optimizing value and policy functions. However, since the TD error is defined by a bootstrap method, its computation tends to be noisy and destabilize learning. Heuristics to improve the accuracy of TD errors, such as target networks and ensemble models, have been introduced so far. While these are essential approaches for the current deep RL algorithms, they cause side effects like increased computational cost and reduced learning efficiency. Therefore, this paper revisits the TD learning algorithm based on control as inference, deriving a novel algorithm capable of robust learning against noisy TD errors. First, the distribution model of optimality, a binary random variable, is represented by a sigmoid function. Alongside forward and reverse Kullback-Leibler divergences, this new model derives a robust learning rule: when the sigmoid function saturates with a large TD error probably due to noise, the gradient vanishes, implicitly excluding it from learning. Furthermore, the two divergences exhibit distinct gradient-vanishing characteristics. Building on these analyses, the optimality is decomposed into multiple levels to achieve pseudo-quantization of TD errors, aiming for further noise reduction. Additionally, a Jensen-Shannon divergence-based approach is approximately derived to inherit the characteristics of both divergences. These benefits are verified through RL benchmarks, demonstrating stable learning even when heuristics are insufficient or rewards contain noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于控制即推断的鲁棒TD学习算法，通过sigmoid函数建模最优性分布，利用KL散度实现梯度消失机制来抑制噪声TD误差，并通过多级最优性分解实现TD误差的伪量化。
AI.motivation: 传统TD误差由于自举方法计算容易产生噪声，导致学习不稳定。现有启发式方法（如目标网络、集成模型）虽然能提高准确性，但会增加计算成本并降低学习效率。因此需要一种能够鲁棒应对噪声TD误差的新算法。
AI.method: 基于控制即推断框架，使用sigmoid函数表示最优性二元随机变量的分布模型。通过前向和反向KL散度推导出鲁棒学习规则：当sigmoid函数因大TD误差（可能由噪声引起）而饱和时，梯度消失，从而隐式排除噪声样本。进一步将最优性分解为多个级别以实现TD误差的伪量化，并近似推导基于Jensen-Shannon散度的方法以继承两种散度的特性。
AI.result: 在强化学习基准测试中验证了方法的有效性，即使在启发式方法不足或奖励包含噪声的情况下，也能实现稳定的学习。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于控制即推断的鲁棒TD学习算法能够有效抑制噪声TD误差的影响，实现更稳定的强化学习，避免了传统启发式方法的副作用。

title: Selective State-Space Models for Koopman-based Data-driven Distribution System State Estimation
summary: Distribution System State Estimation (DSSE) plays an increasingly-important role in modern power grids due to the integration of distributed energy resources (DERs). The inherent characteristics of distribution systems make classical estimation methods struggle, and recent advancements in data-driven learning methods, although promising, exhibit systematic failure in generalization and scalability that limits their applicability. In this work, we propose MambaDSSE, a model-free data-driven framework that incorporates Koopman-theoretic probabilistic filtering with a selective state-space model that learn to infer the underlying time-varying behavior of the system from data. We evaluate the model across a variety of test systems and scenarios, and demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms machine learning baselines on scalability, resilience to DER penetration levels, and robustness to data sampling rate irregularities. We further highlight the Mamba-based SSM's ability to capture long range dependencies from data, improving performance on the DSSE task.

AI.tldr: 提出MambaDSSE框架，结合Koopman理论概率滤波与选择性状态空间模型，用于配电网状态估计，在可扩展性、DER渗透率适应性和数据采样不规则性方面优于机器学习基线方法。
AI.motivation: 配电网状态估计在现代电网中日益重要，但传统方法难以应对配电网固有特性，而现有数据驱动方法存在泛化性和可扩展性不足的问题，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出MambaDSSE框架，将Koopman理论概率滤波与选择性状态空间模型结合，从数据中学习系统时变行为，无需依赖物理模型。
AI.result: 在多种测试系统和场景中验证，该方法在可扩展性、DER渗透率适应性和数据采样不规则性方面优于机器学习基线，并能有效捕捉数据中的长程依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: MambaDSSE框架为配电网状态估计提供了有效的模型无关数据驱动解决方案，解决了现有方法的泛化和可扩展性问题，提升了状态估计性能。

title: Analysis of LLM Performance on AWS Bedrock: Receipt-item Categorisation Case Study
comment: Preprint. Accepted to the 19th International Conference on Evaluation of Novel Approaches to Software Engineering (ENASE 2026). Final version to be published by SCITEPRESS, http://www.scitepress.org
summary: This paper presents a systematic, cost-aware evaluation of large language models (LLMs) for receipt-item categorisation within a production-oriented classification framework. We compare four instruction-tuned models available through AWS Bedrock: Claude 3.7 Sonnet, Claude 4 Sonnet, Mixtral 8x7B Instruct, and Mistral 7B Instruct. The aim of the study was (1) to assess performance across accuracy, response stability, and token-level cost, and (2) to investigate what prompting methods, zero-shot or few-shot, are especially appropriate both in terms of accuracy and in terms of incurred costs. Results of our experiments demonstrated that Claude 3.7 Sonnet achieves the most favourable balance between classification accuracy and cost efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了四种LLM在收据项目分类中的性能与成本，发现Claude 3.7 Sonnet在准确性和成本效率方面表现最佳
AI.motivation: 在面向生产的分类框架中，需要系统评估不同大型语言模型在收据项目分类任务上的性能与成本效益，以确定最适合实际应用的模型和提示方法
AI.method: 使用AWS Bedrock提供的四种指令调优模型（Claude 3.7 Sonnet、Claude 4 Sonnet、Mixtral 8x7B Instruct、Mistral 7B Instruct），在收据项目分类任务上比较零样本和少样本提示方法，评估准确性、响应稳定性和令牌级成本
AI.result: 实验结果显示，Claude 3.7 Sonnet在分类准确性和成本效率之间取得了最有利的平衡
AI.conclusion: Claude 3.7 Sonnet是收据项目分类任务中性能与成本效益最佳的选择，研究为生产环境中的LLM选择提供了实用的成本意识评估框架

title: Memory in the LLM Era: Modular Architectures and Strategies in a Unified Framework
summary: Memory emerges as the core module in the large language model (LLM)-based agents for long-horizon complex tasks (e.g., multi-turn dialogue, game playing, scientific discovery), where memory can enable knowledge accumulation, iterative reasoning and self-evolution. A number of memory methods have been proposed in the literature. However, these methods have not been systematically and comprehensively compared under the same experimental settings. In this paper, we first summarize a unified framework that incorporates all the existing agent memory methods from a high-level perspective. We then extensively compare representative agent memory methods on two well-known benchmarks and examine the effectiveness of all methods, providing a thorough analysis of those methods. As a byproduct of our experimental analysis, we also design a new memory method by exploiting modules in the existing methods, which outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. Finally, based on these findings, we offer promising future research opportunities. We believe that a deeper understanding of the behavior of existing methods can provide valuable new insights for future research.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统比较了LLM智能体中的记忆方法，提出了统一框架，在基准测试上评估现有方法，并设计出超越SOTA的新记忆方法。
AI.motivation: 记忆是LLM智能体处理长时复杂任务（如多轮对话、游戏、科学发现）的核心模块，但目前各种记忆方法缺乏在相同实验设置下的系统比较。
AI.method: 1) 提出统一框架概括现有智能体记忆方法；2) 在两个知名基准上广泛比较代表性记忆方法；3) 基于实验分析，利用现有方法模块设计新的记忆方法。
AI.result: 1) 提供了对现有记忆方法的全面分析；2) 设计的新记忆方法超越了现有最先进方法；3) 识别出有前景的未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 对现有记忆方法的深入理解能为未来研究提供宝贵新见解，系统比较有助于推动LLM智能体记忆模块的发展。

title: Data-Driven Tube-Based Zonotopic Predictive Control With Nonconvex Layered Terminal Sets
summary: This paper presents a data-driven tube-based zonotopic predictive control (DTZPC) framework with nonconvex layered terminal sets. Existing DTZPC schemes with closed-loop guarantees typically rely on a single ellipsoidal terminal set, which can be conservative and thereby limit feasibility. We propose a layered terminal-set design that decouples stability certification, feasibility enlargement, and motion-region screening into three components with distinct roles. First, an offline-designed feedback gain together with a contractive constrained zonotope provides a terminal ingredient for stability certification, while avoiding probabilistic feedback synthesis in high-dimensional DTZPC. Second, we derive a data-driven characterization of the inverse admissible closed-loop model set, avoiding the conservatism of interval-matrix relaxation and inversion. Combined with exact set multiplication, this yields inner and outer approximations of the maximal robust positively invariant (MRPI) set under fixed closed-loop dynamics. The inner approximation serves as a nonconvex terminal set to enlarge feasibility, whereas the outer approximation provides certified motion-region descriptions for fast screening and monitoring. Numerical examples demonstrate tighter inverse-set enclosures and improved feasibility over existing convex-terminal DTZPC schemes.

AI.tldr: 提出数据驱动的管状zonotopic预测控制框架，采用非凸分层终端集设计，通过解耦稳定性验证、可行性扩展和运动区域筛选来改善现有方法的保守性
AI.motivation: 现有DTZPC方案通常依赖单个椭球终端集，这可能导致保守性并限制可行性，需要更灵活的设计来平衡稳定性保证和可行性扩展
AI.method: 提出分层终端集设计：1)离线设计反馈增益和收缩约束zonotope用于稳定性验证；2)推导逆容许闭环模型集的数据驱动表征；3)通过精确集合乘法获得MRPI集的内外近似，内近似作为非凸终端集扩展可行性，外近似用于快速筛选
AI.result: 数值实验表明，相比现有凸终端DTZPC方案，该方法能获得更紧的逆集包络和更好的可行性
AI.conclusion: 提出的分层终端集设计有效解耦了稳定性验证、可行性扩展和运动区域筛选，在保持闭环保证的同时显著改善了可行性

title: Expert-Choice Routing Enables Adaptive Computation in Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion language models (DLMs) enable parallel, non-autoregressive text generation, yet existing DLM mixture-of-experts (MoE) models inherit token-choice (TC) routing from autoregressive systems, leading to load imbalance and rigid computation allocation. We show that expert-choice (EC) routing is a better fit for DLMs: it provides deterministic load balancing by design, yielding higher throughput and faster convergence than TC. Building on the property that EC capacity is externally controllable, we introduce timestep-dependent expert capacity, which varies expert allocation according to the denoising step. We find that allocating more capacity to low-mask-ratio steps consistently achieves the best performance under matched FLOPs, and provide a mechanistic explanation: tokens in low-mask-ratio contexts exhibit an order-of-magnitude higher learning efficiency, so concentrating compute on these steps yields the largest marginal return. Finally, we show that existing pretrained TC DLMs can be retrofitted to EC by replacing only the router, achieving faster convergence and improved accuracy across diverse downstream tasks. Together, these results establish EC routing as a superior paradigm for DLM MoE models and demonstrate that computation in DLMs can be treated as an adaptive policy rather than a fixed architectural constant. Code is available at https://github.com/zhangshuibai/EC-DLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出专家选择路由（EC）作为扩散语言模型（DLM）混合专家（MoE）的更好范式，相比传统令牌选择路由（TC）具有确定性的负载均衡、更高吞吐量和更快收敛速度，并引入时间步依赖的专家容量分配策略。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散语言模型的混合专家模型继承了自回归系统的令牌选择路由机制，导致负载不均衡和计算分配僵化，需要更适合DLM特性的路由方案。
AI.method: 采用专家选择路由替代令牌选择路由，引入时间步依赖的专家容量分配策略，根据去噪步骤动态调整专家分配，将更多容量分配给低掩码比步骤。
AI.result: EC路由在匹配FLOPs下实现最佳性能，低掩码比上下文的令牌学习效率高一个数量级，通过仅替换路由器即可将现有TC DLM改造为EC，在多样化下游任务中实现更快收敛和更高准确率。
AI.conclusion: EC路由是DLM MoE模型的优越范式，证明DLM中的计算可以作为自适应策略而非固定架构常数，为高效扩散模型设计提供了新方向。

title: OSCAR: Orchestrated Self-verification and Cross-path Refinement
summary: Diffusion language models (DLMs) expose their denoising trajectories, offering a natural handle for inference-time control; accordingly, an ideal hallucination mitigation framework should intervene during generation using this model-native signal rather than relying on an externally trained hallucination classifier. Toward this, we formulate commitment uncertainty localization: given a denoising trajectory, identify token positions whose cross-chain entropy exceeds an unsupervised threshold before factually unreliable commitments propagate into self-consistent but incorrect outputs. We introduce a suite of trajectory-level assessments, including a cross-chain divergence-at-hallucination (CDH) metric, for principled comparison of localization methods. We also introduce OSCAR, a training-free inference-time framework operationalizing this formulation. OSCAR runs N parallel denoising chains with randomized reveal orders, computes cross-chain Shannon entropy to detect high-uncertainty positions, and then performs targeted remasking conditioned on retrieved evidence. Ablations confirm that localization and correction contribute complementary gains, robust across N in {4, 8, 16}. On TriviaQA, HotpotQA, RAGTruth, and CommonsenseQA using LLaDA-8B and Dream-7B, OSCAR enhances generation quality by significantly reducing hallucinated content and improving factual accuracy through uncertainty-guided remasking, which also facilitates more effective integration of retrieved evidence. Its native entropy-based uncertainty signal surpasses that of specialized trained detectors, highlighting an inherent capacity of diffusion language models to identify factual uncertainty that is not present in the sequential token commitment structure of autoregressive models. We are releasing the codebase1 to support future research on localization and uncertainty-aware generation in DLMs.

AI.tldr: OSCAR是一个无需训练的推理时框架，通过并行去噪链检测不确定性位置，并基于检索证据进行针对性重掩码，有效减少扩散语言模型中的幻觉内容。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型（DLMs）暴露其去噪轨迹，为推理时控制提供了自然接口。理想的幻觉缓解框架应利用这种模型原生信号进行干预，而不是依赖外部训练的幻觉分类器。
AI.method: 提出承诺不确定性定位：给定去噪轨迹，识别交叉链熵超过无监督阈值的token位置。引入OSCAR框架：运行N个并行去噪链（随机揭示顺序），计算交叉链香农熵检测高不确定性位置，然后基于检索证据进行针对性重掩码。
AI.result: 在TriviaQA、HotpotQA、RAGTruth和CommonsenseQA上使用LLaDA-8B和Dream-7B，OSCAR显著减少了幻觉内容并提高了事实准确性。其基于熵的不确定性信号超越了专门的训练检测器。
AI.conclusion: 扩散语言模型具有识别事实不确定性的内在能力，这种能力在自回归模型的顺序token承诺结构中不存在。OSCAR展示了利用去噪轨迹进行不确定性定位和证据整合的有效性。

title: Human-Guided Reasoning with Large Language Models for Vietnamese Speech Emotion Recognition
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures. Dataset of 2,764 Vietnamese speech samples across three emotion classes
summary: Vietnamese Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) remains challenging due to ambiguous acoustic patterns and the lack of reliable annotated data, especially in real-world conditions where emotional boundaries are not clearly separable. To address this problem, this paper proposes a human-machine collaborative framework that integrates human knowledge into the learning process rather than relying solely on data-driven models. The proposed framework is centered around LLM-based reasoning, where acoustic feature-based models are used to provide auxiliary signals such as confidence and feature-level evidence. A confidence-based routing mechanism is introduced to distinguish between easy and ambiguous samples, allowing uncertain cases to be delegated to LLMs for deeper reasoning guided by structured rules derived from human annotation behavior. In addition, an iterative refinement strategy is employed to continuously improve system performance through error analysis and rule updates. Experiments are conducted on a Vietnamese speech dataset of 2,764 samples across three emotion classes (calm, angry, panic), with high inter-annotator agreement (Fleiss Kappa = 0.8574), ensuring reliable ground truth. The proposed method achieves strong performance, reaching up to 86.59% accuracy and Macro F1 around 0.85-0.86, demonstrating its effectiveness in handling ambiguous and hard-to-classify cases. Overall, this work highlights the importance of combining data-driven models with human reasoning, providing a robust and model-agnostic approach for speech emotion recognition in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 提出人机协作框架，结合LLM推理与声学特征模型，通过置信度路由处理越南语语音情感识别中的模糊样本问题
AI.motivation: 越南语语音情感识别面临声学模式模糊和标注数据不足的挑战，特别是在真实场景中情感边界不清晰的情况下，需要结合人类知识而非仅依赖数据驱动模型
AI.method: 1) 基于LLM的推理框架，利用声学特征模型提供置信度和特征级证据；2) 置信度路由机制区分简单和模糊样本，将不确定案例委托给LLM进行基于人类标注行为的结构化规则推理；3) 迭代优化策略通过错误分析和规则更新持续改进系统
AI.result: 在包含2,764个样本的越南语语音数据集上（三类情感：平静、愤怒、恐慌，Fleiss Kappa=0.8574），达到86.59%准确率和0.85-0.86的Macro F1分数，有效处理模糊和难以分类的案例
AI.conclusion: 该工作强调了数据驱动模型与人类推理结合的重要性，为低资源环境下的语音情感识别提供了鲁棒且模型无关的方法

title: Explicit Distributed MPC: Reducing Computation and Communication Load by Exploiting Facet Properties
summary: Classical Distributed Model Predictive Control (DiMPC) requires multiple iterations to achieve convergence, leading to high computational and communication burdens. This work focuses on the improvement of an iteration-free distributed MPC methodology that minimizes computational effort and communication load. The aforementioned methodology leverages multiparametric programming to compute explicit control laws offline for each subsystem, enabling real-time control without iterative data exchanges between subsystems.
