We validate the ontology through a multi-layered approach: data-driven transformation of real-world AnIML files into knowledge graphs, competency question verification via SPARQL, and a novel validation protocol based on adversarial negative competency questions mapped to established ontological anti-patterns and enforced via SHACL constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AnIML本体，一个OWL 2本体，用于形式化AnIML（分析信息标记语言）的语义，并与Allotrope数据格式对齐，以解决XML模式表达性导致的语义不一致问题，提升跨系统、跨实验室的数据互操作性。
AI.motivation: 异构实验数据系统之间的语义互操作性仍然是数据驱动科学发现的主要障碍。AnIML作为分析化学和生物学中广泛使用的XML标准，其XML模式的表达性允许不同的利益相关者进行不同的解释，导致不一致性，破坏了AnIML模式原本设计的互操作性支持。
AI.method: 采用专家在环的方法，结合LLM辅助的需求获取与协作本体工程，开发了AnIML本体。通过多层验证方法：将真实AnIML文件转换为知识图谱的数据驱动转换、通过SPARQL进行能力问题验证，以及基于对抗性负面能力问题的新验证协议，映射到已建立的本体反模式并通过SHACL约束强制执行。
AI.result: 成功开发了AnIML本体，能够形式化AnIML的语义并与Allotrope数据格式对齐。通过多层验证方法证明了本体的有效性和可靠性，支持未来的跨系统和跨实验室互操作性。
AI.conclusion: AnIML本体通过形式化AnIML的语义并与其他标准对齐，有效解决了XML模式表达性导致的语义不一致问题，为提升分析化学和生物学领域的跨系统、跨实验室数据互操作性提供了重要基础。

title: How to measure the optimality of word or gesture order with respect to the principle of swap distance minimization
summary: The structure of all the permutations of a sequence can be represented as a permutohedron, a graph where vertices are permutations and two vertices are linked if a swap of adjacent elements in the permutation of one of the vertices produces the permutation of the other vertex. It has been hypothesized that word orders in languages minimize the swap distance in the permutohedron: given a source order, word orders that are closer in the permutohedron should be less costly and thus more likely. Here we explain how to measure the degree of optimality of word order variation with respect to swap distance minimization. We illustrate the power of our novel mathematical framework by showing that crosslinguistic gestures are at least $77\%$ optimal. It is unlikely that the multiple times where crosslinguistic gestures hit optimality are due to chance. We establish the theoretical foundations for research on the optimality of word or gesture order with respect to swap distance minimization in communication systems. Finally, we introduce the quadratic assignment problem (QAP) into language research as an umbrella for multiple optimization problems and, accordingly, postulate a general principle of optimal assignment that unifies various linguistic principles including swap distance minimization.

AI.tldr: 提出测量词序变异相对于交换距离最小化最优程度的方法，证明跨语言手势至少77%最优，引入二次分配问题作为语言优化问题的统一框架
AI.motivation: 研究语言词序是否遵循交换距离最小化原则，即词序变化是否倾向于选择在排列图中交换距离更小的排列，以降低认知成本
AI.method: 使用排列图（permutohedron）表示所有排列结构，测量词序变异相对于交换距离最小化的最优程度，引入二次分配问题作为统一框架
AI.result: 跨语言手势至少达到77%的最优性，这种最优性不太可能是偶然的，为研究通信系统中词序或手势顺序的最优性建立了理论基础
AI.conclusion: 提出了测量词序变异最优性的数学框架，证明跨语言手势高度最优，引入二次分配问题统一多种语言优化原则，包括交换距离最小化

title: Graph Neural Operator Towards Edge Deployability and Portability for Sparse-to-Dense, Real-Time Virtual Sensing on Irregular Grids
summary: Accurate sensing of spatially distributed physical fields typically requires dense instrumentation, which is often infeasible in real-world systems due to cost, accessibility, and environmental constraints. Physics-based solvers address this through direct numerical integration of governing equations, but their computational latency and power requirements preclude real-time use in resource-constrained monitoring and control systems. Here we introduce VIRSO (Virtual Irregular Real-Time Sparse Operator), a graph-based neural operator for sparse-to-dense reconstruction on irregular geometries, and a variable-connectivity algorithm, Variable KNN (V-KNN), for mesh-informed graph construction. Unlike prior neural operators that treat hardware deployability as secondary, VIRSO reframes inference as measurement: the combination of both spectral and spatial analysis provides accurate reconstruction without the high latency and power consumption of previous graph-based methodologies with poor scalability, presenting VIRSO as a potential candidate for edge-constrained, real-time virtual sensing. We evaluate VIRSO on three nuclear thermal-hydraulic benchmarks of increasing geometric and multiphysics complexity, across reconstruction ratios from 47:1 to 156:1. VIRSO achieves mean relative $L_2$ errors below 1%, outperforming other benchmark operators while using fewer parameters. The full 10-layer configuration reduces the energy-delay product (EDP) from ${\approx}206$ J$\cdot$ms for the graph operator baseline to $10.1$ J$\cdot$ms on an NVIDIA H200. Implemented on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, all configurations of VIRSO provide sub-10 W power consumption and sub-second latency. These results establish the edge-feasibility and hardware-portability of VIRSO and present compute-aware operator learning as a new paradigm for real-time sensing in inaccessible and resource-constrained environments.

AI.tldr: VIRSO是一种基于图的神经算子，用于不规则几何上的稀疏到密集重建，通过可变连接算法V-KNN构建网格感知图，在边缘设备上实现低延迟、低功耗的实时虚拟传感。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中密集仪器部署成本高且不可行，而传统物理求解器计算延迟和功耗大，无法在资源受限的边缘系统中实时使用。需要一种能在边缘设备上实时运行的高效虚拟传感方法。
AI.method: 提出VIRSO图神经算子和V-KNN可变连接算法，将推理重新定义为测量过程，结合频谱和空间分析，在网格感知图上进行稀疏到密集重建，特别优化硬件部署性。
AI.result: 在三个核热工水力基准测试中，重建比47:1到156:1，平均相对L2误差低于1%，参数更少。在NVIDIA H200上EDP从206J·ms降至10.1J·ms，在Jetson Orin Nano上功耗低于10W，延迟低于1秒。
AI.conclusion: VIRSO证明了边缘可行性和硬件可移植性，提出了计算感知算子学习作为资源受限环境中实时传感的新范式。

title: Solving the Two-dimensional single stock size Cuting Stock Problem with SAT and MaxSAT
summary: Cutting rectangular items from stock sheets to satisfy demands while minimizing waste is a central manufacturing task. The Two-Dimensional Single Stock Size Cutting Stock Problem (2D-CSSP) generalizes bin packing by requiring multiple copies of each item type, which causes a strong combinatorial blow-up. We present a SAT-based framework where item types are expanded by demand, each copy has a sheet-assignment variable and non-overlap constraints are activated only for copies assigned to the same sheet. We also introduce an infeasible-orientation elimination rule that fixes rotation variables when only one orientation can fit the sheet. For minimizing the number of sheets, we compare three approaches: non-incremental SAT with binary search, incremental SAT with clause reuse across iterations and weighted partial MaxSAT. On the Cui--Zhao benchmark suite, our best SAT configurations certify two to three times more instances as provably optimal and achieve lower optimality gaps than OR-Tools, CPLEX and Gurobi. The relative ranking among SAT approaches depends on rotation: incremental SAT is strongest without rotation, while non-incremental SAT is more effective when rotation increases formula size.

AI.tldr: 提出基于SAT的二维单尺寸切割库存问题求解框架，通过需求展开、板材分配变量和不可行方向消除规则，在Cui-Zhao基准测试中优于OR-Tools、CPLEX和Gurobi。
AI.motivation: 二维单尺寸切割库存问题（2D-CSSP）是制造业中的核心任务，需要从标准板材上切割矩形零件以满足需求并最小化浪费。该问题比装箱问题更复杂，因为每种零件类型需要多个副本，导致组合爆炸。
AI.method: 1. 基于SAT的框架：将每种零件类型按需求展开，每个副本都有板材分配变量，仅当副本分配到同一板材时才激活非重叠约束；2. 引入不可行方向消除规则：当只有一种方向能放入板材时固定旋转变量；3. 比较三种最小化板材数量的方法：非增量SAT+二分搜索、增量SAT+跨迭代子句重用、加权部分MaxSAT。
AI.result: 在Cui-Zhao基准测试中，最佳SAT配置比OR-Tools、CPLEX和Gurobi多证明2-3倍的实例达到最优，并获得更小的最优性间隙。SAT方法的相对性能取决于旋转：无旋转时增量SAT最强，旋转增加公式大小时非增量SAT更有效。
AI.conclusion: 基于SAT的方法在解决2D-CSSP问题上表现出色，特别是在证明最优性和减少最优性间隙方面优于传统优化工具。不同SAT方法的性能取决于问题特征，特别是旋转约束的影响。

title: Diagnosing Translated Benchmarks: An Automated Quality Assurance Study of the EU20 Benchmark Suite
summary: Machine-translated benchmark datasets reduce costs and offer scale, but noise, loss of structure, and uneven quality weaken confidence. What matters is not merely whether we can translate, but also whether we can measure and verify translation reliability at scale. We study translation quality in the EU20 benchmark suite, which comprises five established benchmarks translated into 20 languages, via a three-step automated quality assurance approach: (i) a structural corpus audit with targeted fixes; (ii) quality profiling using a neural metric (COMET, reference-free and reference-based) with translation service comparisons (DeepL / ChatGPT / Google); and (iii) an LLM-based span-level translation error landscape. Trends are consistent: datasets with lower COMET scores exhibit a higher share of accuracy/mistranslation errors at span level (notably HellaSwag; ARC is comparatively clean). Reference-based COMET on MMLU against human-edited samples points in the same direction. We release cleaned/corrected versions of the EU20 datasets, and code for reproducibility. In sum, automated quality assurance offers practical, scalable indicators that help prioritize review -- complementing, not replacing, human gold standards.

AI.tldr: 本文提出三步骤自动化质量保证方法，用于评估机器翻译基准数据集的质量，发现COMET分数与翻译错误率相关，并发布了清洗后的EU20数据集。
AI.motivation: 机器翻译基准数据集虽然降低成本并提供规模，但存在噪声、结构丢失和质量不均等问题，需要可扩展的翻译可靠性测量和验证方法。
AI.method: 采用三步自动化质量保证方法：1) 结构语料库审计与针对性修复；2) 使用神经度量COMET进行质量分析，并与DeepL/ChatGPT/Google翻译服务比较；3) 基于LLM的span级翻译错误分析。
AI.result: 趋势一致：COMET分数较低的数据集在span级别有更高的准确性/误译错误比例（特别是HellaSwag；ARC相对干净）。参考型COMET在MMLU上与人编辑样本结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 自动化质量保证提供实用、可扩展的指标，有助于优先审查工作——补充而非替代人工黄金标准，并发布了清洗/校正后的EU20数据集和可复现代码。

title: AeroTherm-GPT: A Verification-Centered LLM Framework for Thermal Protection System Engineering Workflows
summary: Integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) into hypersonic thermal protection system (TPS) design is bottlenecked by cascading constraint violations when generating executable simulation artifacts. General-purpose LLMs, treating generation as single-pass text completion, fail to satisfy the sequential, multi-gate constraints inherent in safety-critical engineering workflows. To address this, we propose AeroTherm-GPT, the first TPS-specialized LLM Agent, instantiated through a Constraint-Closed-Loop Generation (CCLG) framework. CCLG organizes TPS artifact generation as an iterative workflow comprising generation, validation, CDG-guided repair, execution, and audit. The Constraint Dependency Graph (CDG) encodes empirical co-resolution structure among constraint categories, directing repair toward upstream fault candidates based on lifecycle ordering priors and empirical co-resolution probabilities. This upstream-priority mechanism resolves multiple downstream violations per action, achieving a Root-Cause Fix Efficiency of 4.16 versus 1.76 for flat-checklist repair. Evaluated on HyTPS-Bench and validated against external benchmarks, AeroTherm-GPT achieves 88.7% End-to-End Success Rate (95% CI: 87.5-89.9), a gain of +12.5 pp over the matched non-CDG ablation baseline, without catastrophic forgetting on scientific reasoning and code generation tasks.

AI.tldr: AeroTherm-GPT：首个TPS专用LLM智能体，通过约束闭环生成框架解决高超声速热防护系统设计中LLM生成可执行仿真工件的约束违反问题
AI.motivation: 将大语言模型集成到高超声速热防护系统设计中面临瓶颈：通用LLM将生成视为单次文本完成，无法满足安全关键工程工作流程中固有的顺序多门约束，导致级联约束违反
AI.method: 提出AeroTherm-GPT TPS专用LLM智能体，采用约束闭环生成框架，将TPS工件生成组织为迭代工作流：生成、验证、CDG引导修复、执行和审计。约束依赖图编码约束类别间的经验共解结构，基于生命周期排序先验和经验共解概率指导修复
AI.result: AeroTherm-GPT在HyTPS-Bench上达到88.7%端到端成功率（95%置信区间：87.5-89.9），比非CDG消融基线提升12.5个百分点，根因修复效率达4.16（扁平清单修复为1.76），在科学推理和代码生成任务上无灾难性遗忘
AI.conclusion: 约束闭环生成框架通过约束依赖图指导的迭代修复，显著提升LLM在安全关键工程工作流程中的约束满足能力，为高超声速热防护系统设计等复杂工程领域提供了有效的LLM集成方案

title: SAFE: Stepwise Atomic Feedback for Error correction in Multi-hop Reasoning
summary: Multi-hop QA benchmarks frequently reward Large Language Models (LLMs) for spurious correctness, masking ungrounded or flawed reasoning steps. To shift toward rigorous reasoning, we propose SAFE, a dynamic benchmarking framework that replaces the ungrounded Chain-of-Thought (CoT) with a strictly verifiable sequence of grounded entities. Our framework operates across two phases: (1) train-time verification, where we establish an atomic error taxonomy and a Knowledge Graph (KG)-grounded verification pipeline to eliminate noisy supervision in standard benchmarks, identifying up to 14% of instances as unanswerable, and (2) inference-time verification, where a feedback model trained on this verified dataset dynamically detects ungrounded steps in real-time. Experimental results demonstrate that SAFE not only exposes the critical flaws of existing benchmarks at train-time, but also significantly outperforms standard baselines, achieving an average accuracy gain of 8.4 pp while guaranteeing verifiable trajectories at inference-time.

AI.tldr: SAFE框架通过可验证的实体序列替代无根据的思维链，在训练时消除基准噪声，在推理时动态检测无根据步骤，显著提升多跳问答性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多跳问答基准经常奖励大型语言模型的虚假正确性，掩盖了无根据或有缺陷的推理步骤，需要转向更严谨的推理评估。
AI.method: 提出SAFE动态基准框架：1) 训练时验证：建立原子错误分类和知识图谱验证管道，消除基准中的噪声监督；2) 推理时验证：基于验证数据集训练反馈模型，实时检测无根据推理步骤。
AI.result: 识别出高达14%的实例为不可回答，平均准确率提升8.4个百分点，同时保证推理时可验证的轨迹。
AI.conclusion: SAFE不仅暴露了现有基准的关键缺陷，还能在保证可验证推理轨迹的同时，显著超越标准基线方法。

title: CANDI: Curated Test-Time Adaptation for Multivariate Time-Series Anomaly Detection Under Distribution Shift
summary: Multivariate time-series anomaly detection (MTSAD) aims to identify deviations from normality in multivariate time-series and is critical in real-world applications. However, in real-world deployments, distribution shifts are ubiquitous and cause severe performance degradation in pre-trained anomaly detector. Test-time adaptation (TTA) updates a pre-trained model on-the-fly using only unlabeled test data, making it promising for addressing this challenge. In this study, we propose CANDI (Curated test-time adaptation for multivariate time-series ANomaly detection under DIstribution shift), a novel TTA framework that selectively identifies and adapts to potential false positives while preserving pre-trained knowledge. CANDI introduces a False Positive Mining (FPM) strategy to curate adaptation samples based on anomaly scores and latent similarity, and incorporates a plug-and-play Spatiotemporally-Aware Normality Adaptation (SANA) module for structurally informed model updates. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CANDI significantly improves the performance of MTSAD under distribution shift, improving AUROC up to 14% while using fewer adaptation samples.

AI.tldr: CANDI是一个用于多元时间序列异常检测的测试时自适应框架，通过选择性识别和适应潜在假阳性来应对分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中多元时间序列异常检测面临分布偏移问题，导致预训练模型性能严重下降。测试时自适应（TTA）仅使用未标记测试数据在线更新模型，为解决这一挑战提供了可能。
AI.method: 提出CANDI框架，包含：1）假阳性挖掘（FPM）策略，基于异常分数和潜在相似性筛选适应样本；2）即插即用的时空感知正态性适应（SANA）模块，实现结构化模型更新。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，CANDI显著提升了分布偏移下多元时间序列异常检测的性能，AUROC提升高达14%，同时使用更少的适应样本。
AI.conclusion: CANDI通过选择性适应潜在假阳性并保留预训练知识，有效解决了多元时间序列异常检测中的分布偏移问题，是一种高效实用的测试时自适应框架。

title: Domain-constrained knowledge representation: A modal framework
summary: Knowledge graphs store large numbers of relations efficiently, but they remain weak at representing a quieter difficulty: the meaning of a concept often shifts with the domain in which it is used. A triple such as Apple, instance-of, Company may be acceptable in one setting while being misleading or unusable in another. In most current systems, domain information is attached as metadata, qualifiers, or graph-level organization. These mechanisms help with filtering and provenance, but they usually do not alter the formal status of the assertion itself. This paper argues that domain should be treated as part of knowledge representation rather than as supplementary annotation. It introduces the Domain-Contextualized Concept Graph (DCG), a framework in which domain is written into the relation and interpreted as a modal world constraint. In the DCG form (C, R at D, C'), the marker at D identifies the world in which the relation holds. Formally, the relation is interpreted through a domain-indexed necessity operator, so that truth, inference, and conflict checking are all scoped to the relevant world. This move has three consequences: ambiguous concepts can be disambiguated at the point of representation; invalid assertions can be challenged against their domain; cross-domain relations can be connected through explicit predicates. The paper develops this claim through a Kripke-style semantics, a compact predicate system, a Prolog implementation, and mappings to RDF, OWL, and relational databases. The contribution is a representational reinterpretation of domain itself. The central claim is that many practical failures in knowledge systems begin when domain is treated as external to the assertion. DCG addresses that by giving domain a structural and computable role inside the representation.

AI.tldr: 论文提出领域情境化概念图（DCG），将领域作为知识表示的内在部分而非外部标注，通过模态世界约束来处理概念在不同领域中的意义变化。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱能高效存储大量关系，但难以处理概念意义随领域变化的问题。现有系统将领域信息作为元数据、限定符或图级组织，这些机制只帮助过滤和溯源，不改变断言的形式状态，导致知识系统在实际应用中经常失败。
AI.method: 引入领域情境化概念图（DCG）框架，将领域写入关系中并解释为模态世界约束。形式化表示为(C, R at D, C')，其中at D标识关系成立的世界。采用克里普克式语义学、紧凑谓词系统、Prolog实现，并映射到RDF、OWL和关系数据库。
AI.result: DCG框架使模糊概念能在表示时消歧，无效断言可根据其领域进行挑战，跨领域关系可通过显式谓词连接。领域在表示中获得结构和可计算的角色。
AI.conclusion: 领域应被视为知识表示的一部分而非补充标注。DCG通过将领域纳入表示结构内部，解决了知识系统中因领域处理不当导致的许多实际问题，实现了对领域本身的表示重新解释。

title: $k$NNProxy: Efficient Training-Free Proxy Alignment for Black-Box Zero-Shot LLM-Generated Text Detection
summary: LLM-generated text (LGT) detection is essential for reliable forensic analysis and for mitigating LLM misuse. Existing LGT detectors can generally be categorized into two broad classes: learning-based approaches and zero-shot methods. Compared with learning-based detectors, zero-shot methods are particularly promising because they eliminate the need to train task-specific classifiers. However, the reliability of zero-shot methods fundamentally relies on the assumption that an off-the-shelf proxy LLM is well aligned with the often unknown source LLM, a premise that rarely holds in real-world black-box scenarios. To address this discrepancy, existing proxy alignment methods typically rely on supervised fine-tuning of the proxy or repeated interactions with commercial APIs, thereby increasing deployment costs, exposing detectors to silent API changes, and limiting robustness under domain shift. Motivated by these limitations, we propose the $k$-nearest neighbor proxy ($k$NNProxy), a training-free and query-efficient proxy alignment framework that repurposes the $k$NN language model ($k$NN-LM) retrieval mechanism as a domain adapter for a fixed proxy LLM. Specifically, a lightweight datastore is constructed once from a target-reflective LGT corpus, either via fixed-budget querying or from existing datasets. During inference, nearest-neighbor evidence induces a token-level predictive distribution that is interpolated with the proxy output, yielding an aligned prediction without proxy fine-tuning or per-token API outputs. To improve robustness under domain shift, we extend $k$NNProxy into a mixture of proxies (MoP) that routes each input to a domain-specific datastore for domain-consistent retrieval. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong detection performance of our method.

AI.tldr: 提出kNNProxy框架，无需训练即可对齐代理LLM，用于检测LLM生成文本，通过kNN检索机制和混合代理提升跨域鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有零-shot检测方法依赖代理LLM与未知源LLM对齐的假设，这在真实黑盒场景中很少成立。现有代理对齐方法需要监督微调或频繁API调用，增加成本且易受API变化影响。
AI.method: 提出kNNProxy框架：1) 构建轻量级数据存储（来自目标反射的LGT语料）；2) 推理时通过最近邻证据诱导token级预测分布，与代理输出插值对齐；3) 扩展为混合代理（MoP）路由输入到特定领域数据存储。
AI.result: 大量实验证明该方法具有强大的检测性能，在保持零-shot优势的同时解决了代理对齐问题。
AI.conclusion: kNNProxy提供了一种无需训练、查询高效的代理对齐框架，通过kNN-LM检索机制作为领域适配器，显著提升了LLM生成文本检测的可靠性和跨域鲁棒性。

title: Not All Tokens See Equally: Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: While Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has advanced reasoning in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), prevailing frameworks suffer from a foundational methodological flaw: by distributing identical advantages across all generated tokens, these methods inherently dilute the learning signals essential for optimizing the critical, visually-grounded steps of multimodal reasoning. To bridge this gap, we formulate \textit{Token Visual Dependency}, quantifying the causal information gain of visual inputs via the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence between visual-conditioned and text-only predictive distributions. Revealing that this dependency is highly sparse and semantically pivotal, we introduce Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization (PGPO), which is a novel fine-grained credit assignment framework that dynamically reshapes advantages at the token level. Through a threshold-gated, mass-conserving mechanism, PGPO actively amplifies learning signals for visually-dependent tokens while suppressing gradient noise from linguistic priors. Extensive experiments based on the Qwen2.5-VL series across seven challenging multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that PGPO boosts models by 18.7% on average. Both theoretical and empirical analyses confirm that PGPO effectively reduces gradient variance, prevents training collapse, and acts as a potent regularizer for robust, perception-grounded multimodal reasoning. Code will be published on https://github.com/Yzk1114/PGPO.

AI.tldr: PGPO提出了一种细粒度的信用分配框架，通过量化token级别的视觉依赖性来增强多模态推理中视觉关键步骤的学习信号，相比传统RLVR方法平均提升18.7%
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR框架存在根本性方法缺陷：将所有生成token分配相同优势值，稀释了多模态推理中视觉关键步骤的学习信号，阻碍了感知基础推理的优化
AI.method: 提出Token Visual Dependency概念，通过KL散度量视觉输入的信息增益；设计Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization (PGPO)，使用阈值门控、质量守恒机制动态重塑token级优势值，放大视觉依赖token的学习信号，抑制语言先验的梯度噪声
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL系列模型和七个挑战性多模态推理基准上，PGPO平均提升18.7%；理论和实证分析证实PGPO能有效降低梯度方差、防止训练崩溃，并作为强大的正则化器
AI.conclusion: PGPO通过细粒度信用分配解决了RLVR中的信号稀释问题，实现了更稳健、感知基础的多模态推理，为视觉语言模型的强化学习提供了新方向

title: Why Gaussian Diffusion Models Fail on Discrete Data?
summary: Diffusion models have become a standard approach for generative modeling in continuous domains, yet their application to discrete data remains challenging. We investigate why Gaussian diffusion models with the DDPM solver struggle to sample from discrete distributions that are represented as a mixture of delta-distributions in the continuous space. Using a toy Random Hierarchy Model, we identify a critical sampling interval in which the density of noisified data becomes multimodal. In this regime, DDPM occasionally enters low-density regions between modes producing out-of-distribution inputs for the model and degrading sample quality. We show that existing heuristics, including self-conditioning and a solver we term q-sampling, help alleviate this issue. Furthermore, we demonstrate that combining self-conditioning with switching from DDPM to q-sampling within the critical interval improves generation quality on real data. We validate these findings across conditional and unconditional tasks in multiple domains, including text, programming code, and proteins.

AI.tldr: 论文发现高斯扩散模型在离散数据上采样困难的原因是在临界采样区间内数据密度变为多模态，导致DDPM采样器进入低密度区域产生分布外样本，提出结合自条件和q-sampling的方法改善生成质量。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在连续域生成建模中已成为标准方法，但在离散数据上的应用仍然具有挑战性。本文旨在探究为什么使用DDPM求解器的高斯扩散模型难以从在连续空间中表示为δ分布混合的离散分布中采样。
AI.method: 使用玩具随机层次模型识别临界采样区间，在该区间内噪声化数据的密度变为多模态。分析DDPM在该区间内进入低密度区域的问题，评估现有启发式方法（包括自条件和q-sampling求解器）的效果，并提出结合自条件并在临界区间内从DDPM切换到q-sampling的方法。
AI.result: 在临界采样区间内，噪声化数据的密度变为多模态，DDPM偶尔会进入模态之间的低密度区域，产生分布外输入并降低样本质量。自条件和q-sampling能缓解此问题，结合两者并在临界区间切换采样方法能显著改善真实数据的生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 高斯扩散模型在离散数据上的采样困难源于临界区间内的多模态密度问题，通过识别这一区间并采用自条件与q-sampling相结合的策略，可以有效提升在文本、编程代码和蛋白质等多个领域的生成质量。

title: Robust Graph Representation Learning via Adaptive Spectral Contrast
summary: Spectral graph contrastive learning has emerged as a unified paradigm for handling both homophilic and heterophilic graphs by leveraging high-frequency components. However, we identify a fundamental spectral dilemma: while high-frequency signals are indispensable for encoding heterophily, our theoretical analysis proves they exhibit significantly higher variance under spectrally concentrated perturbations. We derive a regret lower bound showing that existing global (node-agnostic) spectral fusion is provably sub-optimal: on mixed graphs with separated node-wise frequency preferences, any global fusion strategy incurs non-vanishing regret relative to a node-wise oracle. To escape this bound, we propose ASPECT, a framework that resolves this dilemma through a reliability-aware spectral gating mechanism. Formulated as a minimax game, ASPECT employs a node-wise gate that dynamically re-weights frequency channels based on their stability against a purpose-built adversary, which explicitly targets spectral energy distributions via a Rayleigh quotient penalty. This design forces the encoder to learn representations that are both structurally discriminative and spectrally robust. Empirical results show that ASPECT achieves new state-of-the-art performance on 8 out of 9 benchmarks, effectively decoupling meaningful structural heterophily from incidental noise.

AI.tldr: 论文提出ASPECT框架，通过可靠性感知的谱门控机制解决谱图对比学习中的谱困境，在混合图上实现节点级频率自适应融合，在9个基准中的8个达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有谱图对比学习在处理同质性和异质性图时面临谱困境：高频信号对编码异质性至关重要，但理论分析表明其在谱集中扰动下具有更高方差。全局谱融合策略在具有分离节点频率偏好的混合图上存在固有局限。
AI.method: 提出ASPECT框架，采用可靠性感知的谱门控机制。通过极小极大博弈，使用节点级门控动态重加权频率通道，基于其对抗专门构建的对抗攻击的稳定性。对抗攻击通过瑞利商惩罚明确针对谱能量分布，迫使编码器学习既具有结构判别性又具有谱鲁棒性的表示。
AI.result: 在9个基准测试中的8个上实现了新的最先进性能，有效解耦了有意义的结构异质性和偶然噪声。
AI.conclusion: ASPECT通过节点级谱门控机制解决了谱图对比学习中的谱困境，为处理混合图提供了更优的解决方案，能够自适应地平衡不同频率信号的重要性，提高模型的鲁棒性和性能。

title: Retrieval-aligned Tabular Foundation Models Enable Robust Clinical Risk Prediction in Electronic Health Records Under Real-world Constraints
summary: Clinical prediction from structured electronic health records (EHRs) is challenging due to high dimensionality, heterogeneity, class imbalance, and distribution shift. While tabular in-context learning (TICL) and retrieval-augmented methods perform well on generic benchmarks, their behavior in clinical settings remains unclear. We present a multi-cohort EHR benchmark comparing classical, deep tabular, and TICL models across varying data scale, feature dimensionality, outcome rarity, and cross-cohort generalization. PFN-based TICL models are sample-efficient in low-data regimes but degrade under naive distance-based retrieval as heterogeneity and imbalance increase. We propose AWARE, a task-aligned retrieval framework using supervised embedding learning and lightweight adapters. AWARE improves AUPRC by up to 12.2% under extreme imbalance, with gains increasing with data complexity. Our results identify retrieval quality and retrieval-inference alignment as key bottlenecks for deploying tabular in-context learning in clinical prediction.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了AWARE框架，通过监督嵌入学习和轻量级适配器改进表格上下文学习在临床预测中的表现，特别是在数据异质性、类别不平衡和分布偏移的挑战下。
AI.motivation: 临床电子健康记录预测面临高维度、异质性、类别不平衡和分布偏移等挑战。现有的表格上下文学习和检索增强方法在通用基准上表现良好，但在临床环境中的表现尚不明确。
AI.method: 提出了AWARE框架，包含任务对齐的检索机制，使用监督嵌入学习和轻量级适配器。通过多队列EHR基准比较了经典方法、深度表格方法和表格上下文学习方法。
AI.result: AWARE在极端不平衡情况下将AUPRC提高了12.2%，且随着数据复杂性的增加，改进效果更加明显。PFN基础的TICL模型在低数据量情况下样本效率高，但在异质性和不平衡增加时，基于朴素距离的检索会退化。
AI.conclusion: 检索质量和检索-推理对齐是部署表格上下文学习于临床预测的关键瓶颈。AWARE框架通过任务对齐的检索机制有效解决了这些问题，为临床预测提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: Tracking the emergence of linguistic structure in self-supervised models learning from speech
summary: Self-supervised speech models learn effective representations of spoken language, which have been shown to reflect various aspects of linguistic structure. But when does such structure emerge in model training? We study the encoding of a wide range of linguistic structures, across layers and intermediate checkpoints of six Wav2Vec2 and HuBERT models trained on spoken Dutch. We find that different levels of linguistic structure show notably distinct layerwise patterns as well as learning trajectories, which can partially be explained by differences in their degree of abstraction from the acoustic signal and the timescale at which information from the input is integrated. Moreover, we find that the level at which pre-training objectives are defined strongly affects both the layerwise organization and the learning trajectories of linguistic structures, with greater parallelism induced by higher-order prediction tasks (i.e. iteratively refined pseudo-labels).

AI.tldr: 研究自监督语音模型训练过程中语言结构何时出现，分析不同语言结构在模型层间和学习轨迹上的差异
AI.motivation: 自监督语音模型能学习有效的语音表征，但这些语言结构在训练过程中何时出现尚不清楚。研究旨在探索不同语言结构在模型训练中的演化过程
AI.method: 分析六个Wav2Vec2和HuBERT模型在荷兰语训练中的中间检查点，研究多种语言结构在不同层间的编码模式和学习轨迹
AI.result: 发现不同语言结构在层间模式和学习轨迹上有显著差异，这些差异部分可由其与声学信号的抽象程度和输入信息整合的时间尺度解释。预训练目标定义层级强烈影响语言结构的层间组织
AI.conclusion: 语言结构的编码模式和学习轨迹受其抽象程度和时间尺度影响，高阶预测任务（迭代精炼伪标签）能诱导更大的并行性

title: Efficient Constraint Generation for Stochastic Shortest Path Problems
summary: Stochastic Shortest Path problems (SSPs) are traditionally solved by computing each state's cost-to-go by applying Bellman backups. A Bellman backup updates a state's cost-to-go by iterating through every applicable action, computing the cost-to-go after applying each one, and selecting a minimal action's cost-to-go. State-of-the-art algorithms use heuristic functions; these give an initial estimate of costs-to-go, and lets the algorithm apply Bellman backups only to promising states, determined by low estimated costs-to-go. However, each Bellman backup still considers all applicable actions, even if the heuristic tells us that some of these actions are too expensive, with the effect that such algorithms waste time on unhelpful actions. To address this gap we present a technique that uses the heuristic to avoid expensive actions, by reframing heuristic search in terms of linear programming and introducing an efficient implementation of constraint generation for SSPs. We present CG-iLAO*, a new algorithm that adapts iLAO* with our novel technique, and considers only 40% of iLAO*'s actions on many problems, and as few as 1% on some. Consequently, CG-iLAO* computes on average 3.5x fewer costs-to-go for actions than the state-of-the-art iLAO* and LRTDP, enabling it to solve problems faster an average of 2.8x and 3.7x faster, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出CG-iLAO*算法，通过线性规划和约束生成技术，利用启发式信息避免考虑昂贵动作，显著减少计算量，比现有算法快2.8-3.7倍。
AI.motivation: 传统SSP算法使用启发式函数指导搜索，但Bellman备份仍需考虑所有可用动作，即使启发式显示某些动作代价过高，导致计算资源浪费。
AI.method: 将启发式搜索重新表述为线性规划问题，引入针对SSP的高效约束生成技术，开发CG-iLAO*算法，在iLAO*基础上集成该技术。
AI.result: CG-iLAO*仅考虑iLAO* 40%的动作（某些问题低至1%），平均减少3.5倍动作代价计算，比iLAO*快2.8倍，比LRTDP快3.7倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用启发式信息避免昂贵动作的约束生成技术，能显著提升SSP求解效率，CG-iLAO*在多种问题上表现出优越性能。

title: BidirLM: From Text to Omnimodal Bidirectional Encoders by Adapting and Composing Causal LLMs
summary: Transforming causal generative language models into bidirectional encoders offers a powerful alternative to BERT-style architectures. However, current approaches remain limited: they lack consensus on optimal training objectives, suffer from catastrophic forgetting at scale, and fail to flexibly integrate the vast ecosystem of specialized generative models. In this work, through systematic ablations on the Gemma3 and Qwen3 families, we identify the key factors driving successful adaptation, highlighting the critical role of an often-omitted prior masking phase. To scale this process without original pre-training data, we introduce a dual strategy combining linear weight merging with a lightweight multi-domain data mixture that mitigates catastrophic forgetting. Finally, we augment our encoders by merging them with specialized causal models, seamlessly transferring modality- and domain-specific capabilities. This open-source recipe, designed for any causal decoder LLM, yields BidirLM, a family of five encoders that outperform alternatives on text, vision, and audio representation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出BidirLM方法，将因果生成语言模型转化为双向编码器，通过权重合并和多领域数据混合解决灾难性遗忘问题，在文本、视觉和音频表示基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前将因果生成语言模型转化为双向编码器的方法存在三个主要问题：缺乏最优训练目标的共识、大规模应用时出现灾难性遗忘、难以灵活整合专业化的生成模型生态系统。
AI.method: 1. 通过系统消融实验确定成功适应的关键因素，强调常被忽略的先验掩码阶段的重要性；2. 提出双重策略：线性权重合并与轻量级多领域数据混合，在不依赖原始预训练数据的情况下缓解灾难性遗忘；3. 通过合并专业因果模型来增强编码器，实现模态和领域特定能力的无缝转移。
AI.result: 开发出BidirLM系列（五个编码器），在文本、视觉和音频表示基准测试中表现优于现有替代方案，为任何因果解码器LLM提供了开源实现方案。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种通用、可扩展的将因果生成语言模型转化为高性能双向编码器的方法，解决了现有方法的局限性，实现了跨模态能力的有效整合。

title: LI-DSN: A Layer-wise Interactive Dual-Stream Network for EEG Decoding
summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) provides a non-invasive window into brain activity, offering high temporal resolution crucial for understanding and interacting with neural processes through brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). Current dual-stream neural networks for EEG often process temporal and spatial features independently through parallel branches, delaying their integration until a final, late-stage fusion. This design inherently leads to an "information silo" problem, precluding intermediate cross-stream refinement and hindering spatial-temporal decompositions essential for full feature utilization. We propose LI-DSN, a layer-wise interactive dual-stream network that facilitates progressive, cross-stream communication at each layer, thereby overcoming the limitations of late-fusion paradigms. LI-DSN introduces a novel Temporal-Spatial Integration Attention (TSIA) mechanism, which constructs a Spatial Affinity Correlation Matrix (SACM) to capture inter-electrode spatial structural relationships and a Temporal Channel Aggregation Matrix (TCAM) to integrate cosine-gated temporal dynamics under spatial guidance. Furthermore, we employ an adaptive fusion strategy with learnable channel weights to optimize the integration of dual-stream features. Extensive experiments across eight diverse EEG datasets, encompassing motor imagery (MI) classification, emotion recognition, and steady-state visual evoked potentials (SSVEP), consistently demonstrate that LI-DSN significantly outperforms 13 state-of-the-art (SOTA) baseline models, showcasing its superior robustness and decoding performance. The code will be publicized after acceptance.

AI.tldr: LI-DSN：一种层间交互的双流网络，通过逐层跨流通信解决传统双流网络中的"信息孤岛"问题，显著提升EEG信号解码性能
AI.motivation: 当前EEG双流神经网络通常独立处理时间和空间特征，仅在最后阶段进行融合，导致"信息孤岛"问题，阻碍了时空特征的充分利用
AI.method: 提出LI-DSN网络，引入时空集成注意力机制（TSIA），包含空间亲和相关矩阵（SACM）和时间通道聚合矩阵（TCAM），采用自适应融合策略优化双流特征集成
AI.result: 在8个不同的EEG数据集（包括运动想象分类、情绪识别和稳态视觉诱发电位）上，LI-DSN显著优于13个最先进的基线模型
AI.conclusion: LI-DSN通过逐层跨流交互克服了传统晚期融合范式的局限性，在EEG解码任务中展现出卓越的鲁棒性和性能优势

title: Bayesian Elicitation with LLMs: Model Size Helps, Extra "Reasoning" Doesn't Always
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have been proposed as alternatives to human experts for estimating unknown quantities with associated uncertainty, a process known as Bayesian elicitation. We test this by asking eleven LLMs to estimate population statistics, such as health prevalence rates, personality trait distributions, and labor market figures, and to express their uncertainty as 95\% credible intervals. We vary each model's reasoning effort (low, medium, high) to test whether more "thinking" improves results. Our findings reveal three key results. First, larger, more capable models produce more accurate estimates, but increasing reasoning effort provides no consistent benefit. Second, all models are severely overconfident: their 95\% intervals contain the true value only 9--44\% of the time, far below the expected 95\%. Third, a statistical recalibration technique called conformal prediction can correct this overconfidence, expanding the intervals to achieve the intended coverage. In a preliminary experiment, giving models web search access degraded predictions for already-accurate models, while modestly improving predictions for weaker ones. Models performed well on commonly discussed topics but struggled with specialized health data. These results indicate that LLM uncertainty estimates require statistical correction before they can be used in decision-making.

AI.tldr: LLMs作为贝叶斯启发替代人类专家存在严重过度自信问题，95%置信区间实际覆盖率仅9-44%，需要统计校准才能用于决策
AI.motivation: 测试LLMs是否可以作为人类专家的替代，用于估计未知数量及其不确定性（贝叶斯启发），特别是在人口统计、健康数据等领域
AI.method: 使用11个LLMs估计人口统计数据（健康患病率、人格特质分布、劳动力市场数据），要求提供95%可信区间；通过改变推理努力程度（低、中、高）测试"思考"是否改善结果；应用保形预测进行统计校准
AI.result: 1. 更大、更强大的模型产生更准确估计，但增加推理努力无一致改善；2. 所有模型严重过度自信：95%区间实际包含真值仅9-44%；3. 保形预测可校正过度自信，扩展区间达到预期覆盖率；4. 网络搜索访问对准确模型反而降低预测质量，对较弱模型略有改善；5. 模型在常见话题表现良好，但在专业健康数据上表现不佳
AI.conclusion: LLMs的不确定性估计需要统计校正才能用于决策制定，当前模型存在系统性过度自信问题，保形预测是有效的校正方法

title: Goose: Anisotropic Speculation Trees for Training-Free Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates large language model inference by drafting multiple candidate tokens and verifying them in a single forward pass. Candidates are organized as a tree: deeper trees accept more tokens per step, but adding depth requires sacrificing breadth (fallback options) under a fixed verification budget. Existing training-free methods draft from a single token source and shape their trees without distinguishing candidate quality across origins. We observe that two common training-free token sources - n-gram matches copied from the input context, and statistical predictions from prior forward passes - differ dramatically in acceptance rate (~6x median gap, range 2-18x across five models and five benchmarks). We prove that when such a quality gap exists, the optimal tree is anisotropic (asymmetric): reliable tokens should form a deep chain while unreliable tokens spread as wide branches, breaking through the depth limit of balanced trees. We realize this structure in GOOSE, a training-free framework that builds an adaptive spine tree - a deep chain of high-acceptance context-matched tokens with wide branches of low-acceptance alternatives at each node. We prove that the number of tokens accepted per step is at least as large as that of either source used alone. On five LLMs (7B-33B) and five benchmarks, GOOSE achieves 1.9-4.3x lossless speedup, outperforming balanced-tree baselines by 12-33% under the same budget.

AI.tldr: GOOSE提出了一种训练自由的推测解码框架，通过构建自适应脊柱树（深链+宽分支）来优化不同质量token源的利用，实现1.9-4.3倍无损加速。
AI.motivation: 现有训练自由方法在构建推测解码树时，没有区分不同token源的质量差异（如n-gram匹配和统计预测），导致树结构不够优化。研究发现这两种源的接受率存在显著差异（中位数差距约6倍），需要设计能适应这种质量差异的树结构。
AI.method: GOOSE构建自适应脊柱树：将高接受率的上下文匹配token形成深链（脊柱），在每个节点上为低接受率的替代token创建宽分支。这种各向异性（不对称）结构突破了平衡树的深度限制。
AI.result: 在5个LLM（7B-33B）和5个基准测试上，GOOSE实现了1.9-4.3倍无损加速，在相同预算下比平衡树基线提升12-33%。
AI.conclusion: 通过识别和利用不同token源的质量差异，构建各向异性的自适应树结构可以显著提升推测解码效率，GOOSE框架为训练自由推测解码提供了新的优化方向。

title: Enhancing the Reliability of Medical AI through Expert-guided Uncertainty Modeling
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems accelerate medical workflows and improve diagnostic accuracy in healthcare, serving as second-opinion systems. However, the unpredictability of AI errors poses a significant challenge, particularly in healthcare contexts, where mistakes can have severe consequences. A widely adopted safeguard is to pair predictions with uncertainty estimation, enabling human experts to focus on high-risk cases while streamlining routine verification. Current uncertainty estimation methods, however, remain limited, particularly in quantifying aleatoric uncertainty, which arises from data ambiguity and noise. To address this, we propose a novel approach that leverages disagreement in expert responses to generate targets for training machine learning models. These targets are used in conjunction with standard data labels to estimate two components of uncertainty separately, as given by the law of total variance, via a two-ensemble approach, as well as its lightweight variant. We validate our method on binary image classification, binary and multi-class image segmentation, and multiple-choice question answering. Our experiments demonstrate that incorporating expert knowledge can enhance uncertainty estimation quality by $9\%$ to $50\%$ depending on the task, making this source of information invaluable for the construction of risk-aware AI systems in healthcare applications.

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用专家意见分歧来改进医疗AI不确定性估计的新方法，通过双集成模型分别量化认知和偶然不确定性，在多个任务上提升9%-50%的估计质量。
AI.motivation: 医疗AI系统作为第二意见系统加速医疗流程并提高诊断准确性，但AI错误的不可预测性在医疗环境中具有严重后果。现有不确定性估计方法在量化数据模糊和噪声引起的偶然不确定性方面存在局限。
AI.method: 利用专家响应的分歧生成训练目标，结合标准数据标签，通过双集成方法（及其轻量变体）根据总方差定律分别估计不确定性的两个组成部分。
AI.result: 在二值图像分类、二值和多类图像分割、多项选择题回答等任务上验证，实验表明融入专家知识可将不确定性估计质量提升9%到50%。
AI.conclusion: 专家知识信息对于构建医疗应用中的风险感知AI系统具有宝贵价值，能显著提升不确定性估计质量。

title: BraiNCA: brain-inspired neural cellular automata and applications to morphogenesis and motor control
summary: Most of the Neural Cellular Automata (NCAs) defined in the literature have a common theme: they are based on regular grids with a Moore neighborhood (one-hop neighbour). They do not take into account long-range connections and more complex topologies as we can find in the brain. In this paper, we introduce BraiNCA, a brain-inspired NCA with an attention layer, long-range connections and complex topology. BraiNCAs shows better results in terms of robustness and speed of learning on the two tasks compared to Vanilla NCAs establishing that incorporating attention-based message selection together with explicit long-range edges can yield more sample-efficient and damage-tolerant self-organization than purely local, grid-based update rules. These results support the hypothesis that, for tasks requiring distributed coordination over extended spatial and temporal scales, the choice of interaction topology and the ability to dynamically route information will impact the robustness and speed of learning of an NCA. More broadly, BraiNCA provides brain-inspired NCA formulation that preserves the decentralized local update principle while better reflecting non-local connectivity patterns, making it a promising substrate for studying collective computation under biologically-realistic network structure and evolving cognitive substrates.

AI.tldr: BraiNCA是一种受大脑启发的神经细胞自动机，通过引入注意力层、长程连接和复杂拓扑结构，相比传统基于规则网格的NCA在鲁棒性和学习速度上表现更好。
AI.motivation: 现有神经细胞自动机大多基于规则网格和摩尔邻域，忽略了大脑中的长程连接和复杂拓扑结构，这限制了NCA在需要分布式协调的任务中的表现。
AI.method: 提出BraiNCA模型，包含注意力层、长程连接和复杂拓扑结构，保留了分散式局部更新原则，同时更好地反映非局部连接模式。
AI.result: 在两个任务上，BraiNCA相比传统NCA在鲁棒性和学习速度方面表现更好，表明基于注意力的消息选择和显式长程连接能产生更高效和损伤容忍的自组织。
AI.conclusion: 交互拓扑的选择和动态路由信息的能力会影响NCA的鲁棒性和学习速度。BraiNCA为研究生物现实网络结构和演化认知基质下的集体计算提供了有前景的基础。

title: Optimizing RAG Rerankers with LLM Feedback via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Rerankers play a pivotal role in refining retrieval results for Retrieval-Augmented Generation. However, current reranking models are typically optimized on static human annotated relevance labels in isolation, decoupled from the downstream generation process. This isolation leads to a fundamental misalignment: documents identified as topically relevant by information retrieval metrics often fail to provide the actual utility required by the LLM for precise answer generation. To bridge this gap, we introduce ReRanking Preference Optimization (RRPO), a reinforcement learning framework that directly aligns reranking with the LLM's generation quality. By formulating reranking as a sequential decision-making process, RRPO optimizes for context utility using LLM feedback, thereby eliminating the need for expensive human annotations. To ensure training stability, we further introduce a reference-anchored deterministic baseline. Extensive experiments on knowledge-intensive benchmarks demonstrate that RRPO significantly outperforms strong baselines, including the powerful list-wise reranker RankZephyr. Further analysis highlights the versatility of our framework: it generalizes seamlessly to diverse readers (e.g., GPT-4o), integrates orthogonally with query expansion modules like Query2Doc, and remains robust even when trained with noisy supervisors.

AI.tldr: RRPO：基于强化学习的重排序偏好优化框架，通过LLM反馈直接对齐重排序与生成质量，无需人工标注
AI.motivation: 当前重排序模型基于静态人工标注的相关性标签进行优化，与下游生成过程脱节，导致检索到的文档虽然主题相关但无法为LLM提供生成精确答案所需的实际效用
AI.method: 提出ReRanking Preference Optimization (RRPO)强化学习框架，将重排序建模为序列决策过程，使用LLM反馈优化上下文效用，并引入参考锚定的确定性基线确保训练稳定性
AI.result: 在知识密集型基准测试中，RRPO显著优于包括强大的列表式重排序器RankZephyr在内的强基线，并能泛化到不同读者模型，与查询扩展模块正交集成，在噪声监督下保持鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: RRPO通过直接对齐重排序与LLM生成质量，解决了传统重排序模型与下游生成过程脱节的问题，提供了一种无需昂贵人工标注的有效优化框架

title: The Rank and Gradient Lost in Non-stationarity: Sample Weight Decay for Mitigating Plasticity Loss in Reinforcement Learning
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) suffers from plasticity loss severely due to the nature of non-stationarity, which impairs the ability to adapt to new data and learn continually. Unfortunately, our understanding of how plasticity loss arises, dissipates, and can be dissolved remains limited to empirical findings, leaving the theoretical end underexplored.To address this gap, we study the plasticity loss problem from the theoretical perspective of network optimization. By formally characterizing the two culprit factors in online RL process: the non-stationarity of data distributions and the non-stationarity of targets induced by bootstrapping, our theory attributes the loss of plasticity to two mechanisms: the rank collapse of the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) Gram matrix and the $Θ(\frac{1}{k})$ decay of gradient magnitude. The first mechanism echoes prior empirical findings from the theoretical perspective and sheds light on the effects of existing methods, e.g., network reset, neuron recycle, and noise injection. Against this backdrop, we focus primarily on the second mechanism and aim to alleviate plasticity loss by addressing the gradient attenuation issue, which is orthogonal to existing methods. We propose Sample Weight Decay -- a lightweight method to restore gradient magnitude, as a general remedy to plasticity loss for deep RL methods based on experience replay. In experiments, we evaluate the efficacy of \methodName upon TD3, \myadded{Double DQN} and SAC with SimBa architecture in MuJoCo, \myadded{ALE} and DeepMind Control Suite tasks. The results demonstrate that \methodName effectively alleviates plasticity loss and consistently improves learning performance across various configurations of deep RL algorithms, UTD, network architectures, and environments, achieving SOTA performance on challenging DMC Humanoid tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论角度研究深度强化学习中的可塑性损失问题，提出样本权重衰减方法来解决梯度衰减问题，有效缓解可塑性损失并提升学习性能。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习由于非平稳性导致严重的可塑性损失，影响持续学习能力。目前对可塑性损失的产生、消散和解决机制的理解主要停留在实证发现，理论层面探索不足。
AI.method: 从网络优化理论角度分析可塑性损失，识别出两个关键因素：数据分布的非平稳性和自举目标诱导的非平稳性。提出样本权重衰减方法，通过恢复梯度幅度来缓解可塑性损失。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo、ALE和DeepMind Control Suite任务中，将方法应用于TD3、Double DQN和SAC等算法，结果表明能有效缓解可塑性损失，在DMC Humanoid任务上达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 从理论角度揭示了可塑性损失的两个机制：NTK Gram矩阵秩崩溃和梯度幅度衰减。提出的样本权重衰减方法能有效解决梯度衰减问题，为深度强化学习的可塑性损失提供通用解决方案。

title: Probabilistic classification from possibilistic data: computing Kullback-Leibler projection with a possibility distribution
summary: We consider learning with possibilistic supervision for multi-class classification. For each training instance, the supervision is a normalized possibility distribution that expresses graded plausibility over the classes. From this possibility distribution, we construct a non-empty closed convex set of admissible probability distributions by combining two requirements: probabilistic compatibility with the possibility and necessity measures induced by the possibility distribution, and linear shape constraints that must be satisfied to preserve the qualitative structure of the possibility distribution. Thus, classes with the same possibility degree receive equal probabilities, and if a class has a strictly larger possibility degree than another class, then it receives a strictly larger probability. Given a strictly positive probability vector output by a model for an instance, we compute its Kullback-Leibler projection onto the admissible set. This projection yields the closest admissible probability distribution in Kullback-Leibler sense. We can then train the model by minimizing the divergence between the prediction and its projection, which quantifies the smallest adjustment needed to satisfy the induced dominance and shape constraints. The projection is computed with Dykstra's algorithm using Bregman projections associated with the negative entropy, and we provide explicit formulas for the projections onto each constraint set. Experiments conducted on synthetic data and on a real-world natural language inference task, based on the ChaosNLI dataset, show that the proposed projection algorithm is efficient enough for practical use, and that the resulting projection-based learning objective can improve predictive performance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于可能性监督的多分类学习方法，通过构造可容许概率分布集并计算KL投影来训练模型，在保持可能性分布定性结构的同时提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 在多分类任务中，传统监督学习通常使用硬标签或概率分布，但现实场景中可能存在更灵活的可能性监督形式。可能性分布能表达不同类别的分级可信度，需要一种方法将这种定性信息有效整合到概率模型中。
AI.method: 1. 从可能性分布构造可容许概率分布集：结合概率兼容性要求和线性形状约束；2. 使用Dykstra算法计算模型输出概率向量到可容许集的KL投影；3. 通过最小化预测与投影之间的散度来训练模型。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实世界自然语言推理任务（基于ChaosNLI数据集）上的实验表明：投影算法计算效率足以满足实际应用需求，基于投影的学习目标能够提升预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的可能性监督学习方法能够有效整合分级可信度信息，通过构造可容许概率集和KL投影机制，在保持可能性分布定性结构的同时改善模型预测能力，为处理不确定性监督提供了有效框架。

title: Prosodic ABX: A Language-Agnostic Method for Measuring Prosodic Contrast in Speech Representations
summary: Speech representations from self-supervised speech models (S3Ms) are known to be sensitive to phonemic contrasts, but their sensitivity to prosodic contrasts has not been directly measured. The ABX discrimination task has been used to measure phonemic contrast in S3M representations via minimal pairs. We introduce prosodic ABX, an extension of this framework to evaluate prosodic contrast with only a handful of examples and no explicit labels. Also, we build and release a dataset of English and Japanese minimal pairs and use it along with a Mandarin dataset to evaluate contrast in English stress, Japanese pitch accent, and Mandarin tone. Finally, we show that model and layer rankings are often preserved across several experimental conditions, making it practical for low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 提出Prosodic ABX方法，扩展ABX判别任务来评估自监督语音模型对韵律对比的敏感性，无需显式标签，并构建英日韵律最小对数据集进行评估。
AI.motivation: 自监督语音模型对音位对比敏感，但其对韵律对比的敏感性尚未直接测量。需要一种无需大量数据或显式标签的方法来评估模型对韵律特征的捕捉能力。
AI.method: 扩展ABX判别任务框架为Prosodic ABX，用于评估韵律对比；构建英语和日语韵律最小对数据集，结合现有普通话数据集，评估英语重音、日语音高重音和普通话声调的对比敏感性。
AI.result: 模型和层级排名在不同实验条件下通常保持一致，这使得该方法在低资源场景下具有实用性。Prosodic ABX能够用少量示例评估韵律对比，无需显式标签。
AI.conclusion: Prosodic ABX为评估自监督语音模型对韵律特征的敏感性提供了有效框架，在低资源环境下具有实用价值，有助于理解模型如何编码韵律信息。

title: Qiana: A First-Order Formalism to Quantify over Contexts and Formulas with Temporality
summary: We introduce Qiana, a logic framework for reasoning on formulas that are true only in specific contexts. In Qiana, it is possible to quantify over both formulas and contexts to express, e.g., that ``everyone knows everything Alice says''. Qiana also permits paraconsistent logics within contexts, so that contexts can contain contradictions. Furthermore, Qiana is based on first-order logic, and is finitely axiomatizable, so that Qiana theories are compatible with pre-existing first-order logic theorem provers. We show how Qiana can be used to represent temporality, event calculus, and modal logic. We also discuss different design alternatives of Qiana.

AI.tldr: Qiana是一个用于在特定上下文中推理的逻辑框架，支持对公式和上下文进行量化，允许上下文内包含矛盾，基于一阶逻辑且可有限公理化。
AI.motivation: 需要一种能够在特定上下文中进行推理的逻辑框架，能够表达复杂的知识关系（如"每个人都知道Alice说的一切"），同时支持上下文内的矛盾处理，并与现有一阶逻辑定理证明器兼容。
AI.method: 基于一阶逻辑构建Qiana框架，支持对公式和上下文进行量化，允许上下文内使用超协调逻辑（paraconsistent logics），确保框架可有限公理化，从而与现有定理证明器兼容。
AI.result: 成功开发了Qiana框架，能够表示时间性、事件演算和模态逻辑，展示了框架在不同设计选择下的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: Qiana提供了一个强大而灵活的逻辑框架，能够在特定上下文中进行复杂推理，支持矛盾处理，并与现有一阶逻辑工具兼容，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Reliable Control-Point Selection for Steering Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Steering vectors offer a training-free mechanism for controlling reasoning behaviors in large language models, but constructing effective vectors requires identifying genuine behavioral signals in the model's hidden states. For behaviors that can be toggled via prompts, this is straightforward. However, many reasoning behaviors -- such as self-reflection -- emerge spontaneously and resist prompt-level control. Current methods detect these behaviors through keyword matching in chain-of-thought traces, implicitly assuming that every detected boundary encodes a genuine behavioral signal. We show that this assumption is overwhelmingly wrong: across 541 keyword-detected boundaries, 93.3\% are behaviorally unstable, failing to reproduce the detected behavior under re-generation from the same prefix. We develop a probabilistic model that formalizes intrinsic reasoning behaviors as stochastic events with context-dependent trigger probabilities, and show that unstable boundaries dilute the steering signal. Guided by this analysis, we propose stability filtering, which retains only boundaries where the model consistently reproduces the target behavior. Combined with a content-subspace projection that removes residual question-specific noise, our method achieves 0.784 accuracy on MATH-500 (+5.0 over the strongest baseline). The resulting steering vectors transfer across models in the same architecture family without re-extraction, improving Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-1.5B (+5.0) and DeepScaleR-1.5B-Preview (+6.0). Code is available at https://github.com/zhmzm/stability-steering.

AI.tldr: 提出稳定性过滤方法，通过筛选行为稳定的边界来构建更有效的引导向量，提升数学推理任务的性能
AI.motivation: 当前基于关键词匹配检测推理行为边界的方法存在严重问题：大多数检测到的边界在重新生成时无法复现目标行为，导致引导信号被稀释
AI.method: 1) 提出概率模型将内在推理行为形式化为具有上下文依赖触发概率的随机事件；2) 开发稳定性过滤方法，仅保留模型能一致复现目标行为的边界；3) 结合内容子空间投影去除残差问题特定噪声
AI.result: 在MATH-500上达到0.784准确率（比最强基线提升5.0%），引导向量可在同架构模型家族中迁移，无需重新提取，提升Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-1.5B（+5.0）和DeepScaleR-1.5B-Preview（+6.0）性能
AI.conclusion: 稳定性过滤能有效识别真正的行为信号，构建更鲁棒的引导向量，显著提升推理任务的性能，且具有良好的跨模型迁移能力

title: annbatch unlocks terabyte-scale training of biological data in anndata
summary: The scale of biological datasets now routinely exceeds system memory, making data access rather than model computation the primary bottleneck in training machine-learning models. This bottleneck is particularly acute in biology, where widely used community data formats must support heterogeneous metadata, sparse and dense assays, and downstream analysis within established computational ecosystems. Here we present annbatch, a mini-batch loader native to anndata that enables out-of-core training directly on disk-backed datasets. Across single-cell transcriptomics, microscopy and whole-genome sequencing benchmarks, annbatch increases loading throughput by up to an order of magnitude and shortens training from days to hours, while remaining fully compatible with the scverse ecosystem. Annbatch establishes a practical data-loading infrastructure for scalable biological AI, allowing increasingly large and diverse datasets to be used without abandoning standard biological data formats. Github: https://github.com/scverse/annbatch

AI.tldr: annbatch是一个针对anndata的mini-batch加载器，支持直接在磁盘数据集上进行out-of-core训练，解决了生物数据规模超过系统内存时的数据访问瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 生物数据集规模已常规超过系统内存，使得数据访问而非模型计算成为训练机器学习模型的主要瓶颈。特别是在生物学领域，广泛使用的社区数据格式需要支持异构元数据、稀疏和密集检测以及现有计算生态系统中的下游分析。
AI.method: 开发了annbatch，这是一个原生支持anndata的mini-batch加载器，能够直接在磁盘数据集上进行out-of-core训练，保持与scverse生态系统的完全兼容性。
AI.result: 在单细胞转录组学、显微镜和全基因组测序基准测试中，annbatch将加载吞吐量提高了最多一个数量级，将训练时间从几天缩短到几小时。
AI.conclusion: annbatch为可扩展的生物AI建立了实用的数据加载基础设施，允许使用越来越大规模和多样化的数据集，同时无需放弃标准的生物数据格式。

title: Abnormal Head Movements in Neurological Conditions: A Knowledge-Based Dataset with Application to Cervical Dystonia
summary: Abnormal head movements (AHMs) manifest across a broad spectrum of neurological disorders; however, the absence of a multi-condition resource integrating kinematic measurements, clinical severity scores, and patient demographics constitutes a persistent barrier to the development of AI-driven diagnostic tools. To address this gap, this study introduces NeuroPose-AHM, a knowledge-based dataset of neurologically induced AHMs constructed through a multi-LLM extraction framework applied to 1,430 peer-reviewed publications. The dataset contains 2,756 patient-group-level records spanning 57 neurological conditions, derived from 846 AHM-relevant papers. Inter-LLM reliability analysis confirms robust extraction performance, with study-level classification achieving strong agreement (kappa = 0.822). To demonstrate the dataset's analytical utility, a four-task framework is applied to cervical dystonia (CD), the condition most directly defined by pathological head movement. First, Task 1 performs multi-label AHM type classification (F1 = 0.856). Task 2 constructs the Head-Neck Severity Index (HNSI), a unified metric that normalizes heterogeneous clinical rating scales. The clinical relevance of this index is then evaluated in Task 3, where HNSI is validated against real-world CD patient data, with aligned severe-band proportions (6.7%) providing a preliminary plausibility indication for index calibration within the high severity range. Finally, Task 4 performs bridge analysis between movement-type probabilities and HNSI scores, producing significant correlations (p less than 0.001). These results demonstrate the analytical utility of NeuroPose-AHM as a structured, knowledge-based resource for neurological AHM research. The NeuroPose-AHM dataset is publicly available on Zenodo (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19386862).

AI.tldr: 该研究创建了NeuroPose-AHM数据集，这是一个基于知识的神经性异常头部运动数据集，包含57种神经疾病的2,756条患者记录，并通过多任务框架验证了其分析效用。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏整合运动学测量、临床严重程度评分和患者人口统计学的多条件资源，这阻碍了AI驱动诊断工具的开发。
AI.method: 使用多LLM提取框架从1,430篇同行评审文献中构建NeuroPose-AHM数据集，包含57种神经疾病的2,756条患者记录。通过四任务框架验证数据集效用，包括异常头部运动类型分类、构建头颈严重程度指数(HNSI)、临床验证和相关性分析。
AI.result: LLM提取可靠性高(kappa=0.822)；异常头部运动类型分类F1=0.856；构建的HNSI指标与真实世界数据验证一致(严重比例6.7%)；运动类型概率与HNSI分数显著相关(p<0.001)。
AI.conclusion: NeuroPose-AHM是一个结构化、基于知识的资源，可用于神经性异常头部运动研究，数据集已在Zenodo公开可用。

title: GaelEval: Benchmarking LLM Performance for Scottish Gaelic
comment: 13 pages, to be published in Proceedings of LLMs4SSH (workshop co-located with LREC 2026; Mallorca, Spain; May 2026)
summary: Multilingual large language models (LLMs) often exhibit emergent 'shadow' capabilities in languages without official support, yet their performance on these languages remains uneven and under-measured. This is particularly acute for morphosyntactically rich minority languages such as Scottish Gaelic, where translation benchmarks fail to capture structural competence. We introduce GaelEval, the first multi-dimensional benchmark for Gaelic, comprising: (i) an expert-authored morphosyntactic MCQA task; (ii) a culturally grounded translation benchmark and (iii) a large-scale cultural knowledge Q&A task. Evaluating 19 LLMs against a fluent-speaker human baseline ($n=30$), we find that Gemini 3 Pro Preview achieves $83.3\%$ accuracy on the linguistic task, surpassing the human baseline ($78.1\%$). Proprietary models consistently outperform open-weight systems, and in-language (Gaelic) prompting yields a small but stable advantage (+$2.4\%$). On the cultural task, leading models exceed $90\%$ accuracy, though most systems perform worse under Gaelic prompting and absolute scores are inflated relative to the manual benchmark. Overall, GaelEval reveals that frontier models achieve above-human performance on several dimensions of Gaelic grammar, demonstrates the effect of Gaelic prompting and shows a consistent performance gap favouring proprietary over open-weight models.

AI.tldr: GaelEval是首个针对苏格兰盖尔语的多维度基准测试，包含形态句法MCQA、文化翻译和文化知识问答三个任务。评估19个LLM后发现，前沿模型在盖尔语语法多个维度上超越人类基线，专有模型优于开源模型，盖尔语提示能带来小幅稳定优势。
AI.motivation: 多语言大语言模型在未官方支持的语言中常表现出"影子"能力，但性能参差不齐且缺乏有效测量。对于苏格兰盖尔语这种形态句法丰富的少数民族语言，现有翻译基准无法捕捉其结构能力，需要更全面的评估框架。
AI.method: 开发GaelEval基准测试，包含三个部分：1)专家编写的形态句法多项选择题任务；2)文化背景翻译基准；3)大规模文化知识问答任务。评估19个LLM，与30名流利说话者的人类基线对比，分析专有模型与开源模型的差异，以及盖尔语提示的效果。
AI.result: Gemini 3 Pro Preview在语言任务上达到83.3%准确率，超越人类基线(78.1%)。专有模型始终优于开源系统，盖尔语提示带来+2.4%的小幅稳定优势。在文化任务上，领先模型超过90%准确率，但大多数系统在盖尔语提示下表现更差，且绝对分数相对于手动基准有所膨胀。
AI.conclusion: GaelEval揭示前沿模型在盖尔语语法的多个维度上达到超人类表现，证明了盖尔语提示的效果，并显示专有模型相对于开源模型存在一致的性能优势。该基准为少数民族语言评估提供了重要工具。

title: Learn by Surprise, Commit by Proof
summary: We propose LSCP, a self-gated post-training framework for autonomous knowledge acquisition: learning only what a model does not already know, verified against what it does know, at a strength proportional to conviction, with no external oracle. When a passage produces anomalously high per-token loss, LSCP flags it, generates a Q&A chain that forces the model to articulate its own knowledge and identify gaps, then adjusts AdamW's $β_2$ proportionally to conviction depth k (the number of self-verification steps the passage survives) via $β_2 = 0.999 \cdot r^k$. The entire learning intensity is governed by a single parameter $r$. Beyond new knowledge, this process sharpens weakly encoded existing knowledge, which is a primary source of hallucination. The framework is self-extinguishing: as the model learns, per-token loss on learned passages decreases toward the surprisal threshold and the system progressively converges to standard AdamW. This models biological memory consolidation: temporary information in the context window is selectively consolidated into parametric weights, the model's long-term memory. Experiments on the reference model (Qwen3-14B) and across six models (8B--32B, four families) show that standard fine-tuning produces rote memorization (perturbation gap (the ratio of paraphrase to original perplexity) of 11.6 +- 0.2 x baseline) while all LSCP conditions learn semantically (2.7--3.0x). The r=1.0 condition (identical optimizer, nearly identical data, only Q&A format differs) confirms that the training data format, not $β_2$ gating, is the primary mechanism preventing memorization; gating instead protects neighboring knowledge from contamination by corrupt content (93 +- 7% accuracy on adjacent questions at r=0.98 vs. 90% baseline).

AI.tldr: LSCP是一个自门控后训练框架，通过检测异常高损失段落、生成问答链让模型自我验证知识缺口，并基于验证深度自适应调整优化器参数，实现自主知识获取和记忆巩固。
AI.motivation: 现有模型容易产生幻觉，主要源于弱编码的现有知识。需要一种方法让模型自主识别知识缺口，避免死记硬背，同时保护已有知识不被污染。
AI.method: 1) 检测异常高损失段落；2) 生成问答链让模型自我验证知识；3) 根据验证深度k自适应调整AdamW的β₂参数（β₂ = 0.999·r^k）；4) 整个学习强度由单一参数r控制。
AI.result: 标准微调产生死记硬背（扰动比11.6±0.2倍基线），而所有LSCP条件都学习语义（2.7-3.0倍）。r=1.0条件证实训练数据格式（而非β₂门控）是防止记忆的主要机制；门控保护相邻知识免受污染（r=0.98时相邻问题准确率93±7% vs 90%基线）。
AI.conclusion: LSCP实现了自主知识获取，模拟生物记忆巩固过程，将上下文中的临时信息选择性地巩固到参数权重中。该框架具有自熄灭特性，随着学习进行逐渐收敛到标准AdamW。

title: SenseMath: Do LLMs Have Number Sense? Evaluating Shortcut Use, Judgment, and Generation
summary: Large language models often default to step-by-step computation even when efficient numerical shortcuts are available. This raises a basic question: do they exhibit number sense in a human-like behavioral sense, i.e., the ability to recognize numerical structure, apply shortcuts when appropriate, and avoid them when they are not? We introduce SenseMath, a controlled benchmark for evaluating structure-sensitive numerical reasoning in LLMs. SenseMath contains 4,800 items spanning eight shortcut categories and four digit scales, with matched strong-shortcut, weak-shortcut, and control variants. It supports three evaluation settings of increasing cognitive demand: Shortcut Use (whether models can apply shortcuts on shortcut-amenable problems); Applicability Judgment (whether they can recognize when a shortcut is appropriate or misleading); and Problem Generation (whether they can generate new problem items that correctly admit a given type of shortcut). Our evaluation across five LLMs, ranging from GPT-4o-mini to Llama-3.1-8B, shows a consistent pattern: when explicitly prompted, models readily adopt shortcut strategies and achieve substantial accuracy gains on shortcut-amenable items (up to 15%), yet under standard chain-of-thought prompting they spontaneously employ such strategies in fewer than 40% of cases, even when they demonstrably possess the requisite capability. Moreover, this competence is confined to the Use level; models systematically over-generalise shortcuts to problems where they do not apply, and fail to generate valid shortcut-bearing problems from scratch. Together, these results suggest that current LLMs exhibit procedural shortcut fluency without the structural understanding of when and why shortcuts work that underlies human number sense.

AI.tldr: SenseMath基准测试评估LLMs的数字结构敏感性推理能力，发现模型能使用计算捷径但缺乏人类数字感的结构性理解
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型即使存在高效数值捷径时也默认逐步计算，需要评估它们是否具有类似人类的数字感——识别数值结构、适当应用捷径、避免不当使用的能力
AI.method: 引入SenseMath基准测试，包含4,800个项目，涵盖8个捷径类别和4个数字规模，匹配强捷径、弱捷径和控制变体。支持三个评估设置：捷径使用、适用性判断和问题生成
AI.result: 评估5个LLMs显示：明确提示时模型能采用捷径策略并获得显著准确率提升（达15%），但标准思维链提示下自发使用率低于40%。模型能力仅限于使用层面，会系统性地过度泛化捷径，且无法从头生成有效的捷径问题
AI.conclusion: 当前LLMs表现出程序性捷径流畅性，但缺乏支撑人类数字感的结构性理解——即理解捷径何时有效及为何有效的深层认知

title: Brief Is Better: Non-Monotonic Chain-of-Thought Budget Effects in Function-Calling Language Agents
summary: How much should a language agent think before taking action? Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning is widely assumed to improve agent performance, but the relationship between reasoning length and accuracy in structured tool-use settings remains poorly understood. We present a systematic study of CoT budget effects on function-calling agents, sweeping six token budgets (0--512) across 200 tasks from the Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard v3 Multiple benchmark. Our central finding is a striking non-monotonic pattern on Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct: brief reasoning (32 tokens) dramatically improves accuracy by 45% relative over direct answers, from 44.0% to 64.0%, while extended reasoning (256 tokens) degrades performance well below the no-CoT baseline, to 25.0% (McNemar p < 0.001). A three-way error decomposition reveals the mechanism. At d = 0, 30.5% of tasks fail because the model selects the wrong function from the candidate set; brief CoT reduces this to 1.5%, effectively acting as a function-routing step, while long CoT reverses the gain, yielding 28.0% wrong selections and 18.0% hallucinated functions at d = 256. Oracle analysis shows that 88.6% of solvable tasks require at most 32 reasoning tokens, with an average of 27.6 tokens, and a finer-grained sweep indicates that the true optimum lies at 8--16 tokens. Motivated by this routing effect, we propose Function-Routing CoT (FR-CoT), a structured brief-CoT method that templates the reasoning phase as "Function: [name] / Key args: [...]," forcing commitment to a valid function name at the start of reasoning. FR-CoT achieves accuracy statistically equivalent to free-form d = 32 CoT while reducing function hallucination to 0.0%, providing a structural reliability guarantee without budget tuning.

AI.tldr: 研究发现思维链长度与函数调用代理性能呈非单调关系：简短推理（32 tokens）显著提升准确率45%，而长推理（256 tokens）反而降低性能。提出结构化简短推理方法FR-CoT，在保持性能的同时消除函数幻觉。
AI.motivation: 当前对思维链推理长度在结构化工具使用场景中的影响缺乏系统理解，需要探究推理预算与准确率之间的关系，以优化语言代理的决策过程。
AI.method: 在Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard v3 Multiple基准的200个任务上，系统研究6种token预算（0-512）对函数调用代理的影响。通过三向错误分解分析机制，提出结构化简短推理方法FR-CoT，将推理阶段模板化为"Function: [name] / Key args: [...]"。
AI.result: 发现Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct模型上存在显著非单调模式：32 tokens推理将准确率从44.0%提升至64.0%，而256 tokens推理降至25.0%。88.6%可解任务最多需要32推理token，最佳范围在8-16 tokens。FR-CoT在保持性能的同时将函数幻觉降至0.0%。
AI.conclusion: 思维链推理长度对函数调用代理性能有重要影响，简短推理主要作为函数路由步骤，而长推理会导致性能下降。结构化简短推理方法FR-CoT能提供可靠性保证，无需预算调优，为语言代理设计提供了实用指导。

title: Generalization Bounds and Statistical Guarantees for Multi-Task and Multiple Operator Learning with MNO Networks
summary: Multiple operator learning concerns learning operator families $\{G[α]:U\to V\}_{α\in W}$ indexed by an operator descriptor $α$. Training data are collected hierarchically by sampling operator instances $α$, then input functions $u$ per instance, and finally evaluation points $x$ per input, yielding noisy observations of $G[α][u](x)$. While recent work has developed expressive multi-task and multiple operator learning architectures and approximation-theoretic scaling laws, quantitative statistical generalization guarantees remain limited. We provide a covering-number-based generalization analysis for separable models, focusing on the Multiple Neural Operator (MNO) architecture: we first derive explicit metric-entropy bounds for hypothesis classes given by linear combinations of products of deep ReLU subnetworks, and then combine these complexity bounds with approximation guarantees for MNO to obtain an explicit approximation-estimation tradeoff for the expected test error on new (unseen) triples $(α,u,x)$. The resulting bound makes the dependence on the hierarchical sampling budgets $(n_α,n_u,n_x)$ transparent and yields an explicit learning-rate statement in the operator-sampling budget $n_α$, providing a sample-complexity characterization for generalization across operator instances. The structure and architecture can also be viewed as a general purpose solver or an example of a "small'' PDE foundation model, where the triples are one form of multi-modality.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了多算子学习框架的泛化分析，针对Multiple Neural Operator (MNO)架构，通过覆盖数方法推导了显式的泛化误差界，揭示了层次采样预算(n_α,n_u,n_x)对泛化性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 多算子学习旨在学习由算子描述符α索引的算子族{G[α]:U→V}，但现有研究缺乏定量的统计泛化保证。虽然已有工作开发了表达性强的多任务和多算子学习架构以及逼近理论尺度律，但定量统计泛化保证仍然有限。
AI.method: 采用覆盖数方法进行泛化分析，针对可分离模型，特别是Multiple Neural Operator (MNO)架构。首先推导了由深度ReLU子网络乘积线性组合构成的假设类的显式度量熵界，然后将这些复杂度界与MNO的逼近保证结合，获得期望测试误差的显式逼近-估计权衡。
AI.result: 获得了显式的泛化误差界，该界透明地展示了层次采样预算(n_α,n_u,n_x)的依赖性，并在算子采样预算n_α上提供了显式的学习率陈述，为跨算子实例的泛化提供了样本复杂度特征。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为多算子学习提供了首个覆盖数基础的泛化分析框架，揭示了层次采样结构对泛化性能的影响。MNO架构可视为通用求解器或"小型"PDE基础模型，其中三元组(α,u,x)是多模态的一种形式。

title: GenGait: A Transformer-Based Model for Human Gait Anomaly Detection and Normative Twin Generation
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures. Preprint submitted to a journal
summary: Gait analysis provides an objective characterization of locomotor function and is widely used to support diagnosis and rehabilitation monitoring across neurological and orthopedic disorders. Deep learning has been increasingly applied to this domain, yet most approaches rely on supervised classifiers trained on disease-labeled data, limiting generalization to heterogeneous pathological presentations. This work proposes a label-free framework for joint-level anomaly detection and kinematic correction based on a Transformer masked autoencoder trained exclusively on normative gait sequences from 150 adults, acquired with a markerless multi-camera motion-capture system. At inference, a two-pass procedure is applied to potentially pathological input sequences, first it estimates joint inconsistency scores by occluding individual joints and measuring deviations from the learned normative prior. Then, it withholds the flagged joints from the encoder input and reconstructs the full skeleton from the remaining spatiotemporal context, yielding corrected kinematic trajectories at the flagged positions. Validation on 10 held-out normative participants, who mimicked seven simulated gait abnormalities, showed accurate localization of biomechanically inconsistent joints, a significant reduction in angular deviation across all analyzed joints with large effect sizes, and preservation of normative kinematics. The proposed approach enables interpretable, subject-specific localization of gait impairments without requiring disease labels. Video is available at https://youtu.be/Rcm3jqR5pN4.

AI.tldr: 提出基于Transformer掩码自编码器的无标签框架，用于关节级步态异常检测和运动学矫正，仅使用正常步态数据训练，无需疾病标签。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法大多依赖有监督分类器和疾病标签数据，难以泛化到异质性病理表现。需要一种无需疾病标签就能检测步态异常并进行矫正的方法。
AI.method: 使用Transformer掩码自编码器，仅用150名成人的正常步态序列训练。推理时采用两阶段流程：先通过遮挡单个关节计算不一致性分数，然后从剩余时空上下文重建完整骨架，矫正异常关节轨迹。
AI.result: 在10名模拟七种步态异常的参与者上验证，能准确定位生物力学不一致关节，显著减少所有分析关节的角度偏差（大效应量），并保持正常运动学特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了无需疾病标签的可解释、个体化步态损伤定位，为步态分析和康复监测提供了新工具。

title: AstroConcepts: A Large-Scale Multi-Label Classification Corpus for Astrophysics
summary: Scientific multi-label text classification suffers from extreme class imbalance, where specialized terminology exhibits severe power-law distributions that challenge standard classification approaches. Existing scientific corpora lack comprehensive controlled vocabularies, focusing instead on broad categories and limiting systematic study of extreme imbalance. We introduce AstroConcepts, a corpus of English abstracts from 21,702 published astrophysics papers, labeled with 2,367 concepts from the Unified Astronomy Thesaurus. The corpus exhibits severe label imbalance, with 76% of concepts having fewer than 50 training examples. By releasing this resource, we enable systematic study of extreme class imbalance in scientific domains and establish strong baselines across traditional, neural, and vocabulary-constrained LLM methods. Our evaluation reveals three key patterns that provide new insights into scientific text classification. First, vocabulary-constrained LLMs achieve competitive performance relative to domain-adapted models in astrophysics classification, suggesting a potential for parameter-efficient approaches. Second, domain adaptation yields relatively larger improvements for rare, specialized terminology, although absolute performance remains limited across all methods. Third, we propose frequency-stratified evaluation to reveal performance patterns that are hidden by aggregate scores, thereby making robustness assessment central to scientific multi-label evaluation. These results offer actionable insights for scientific NLP and establish benchmarks for research on extreme imbalance.

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了AstroConcepts语料库，包含21,702篇天体物理学论文摘要，标注了2,367个天文学概念，用于研究极端类别不平衡问题，并建立了多种方法的基准性能。
AI.motivation: 科学多标签文本分类面临极端类别不平衡问题，特别是专业术语呈现严重的幂律分布，现有科学语料库缺乏全面的受控词汇表，限制了极端不平衡问题的系统性研究。
AI.method: 构建AstroConcepts语料库（21,702篇天体物理学论文摘要，标注2,367个概念），采用传统方法、神经网络方法和词汇约束LLM方法进行比较评估，并提出频率分层评估方法。
AI.result: 1) 词汇约束LLM在性能上可与领域适应模型竞争；2) 领域适应对稀有专业术语改进更大但绝对性能仍有限；3) 频率分层评估能揭示聚合分数隐藏的性能模式。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为科学NLP提供了可操作的见解，建立了极端不平衡研究的基准，强调将鲁棒性评估作为科学多标签评估的核心组成部分。

title: World Action Verifier: Self-Improving World Models via Forward-Inverse Asymmetry
summary: General-purpose world models promise scalable policy evaluation, optimization, and planning, yet achieving the required level of robustness remains challenging. Unlike policy learning, which primarily focuses on optimal actions, a world model must be reliable over a much broader range of suboptimal actions, which are often insufficiently covered by action-labeled interaction data. To address this challenge, we propose World Action Verifier (WAV), a framework that enables world models to identify their own prediction errors and self-improve. The key idea is to decompose action-conditioned state prediction into two factors -- state plausibility and action reachability -- and verify each separately. We show that these verification problems can be substantially easier than predicting future states due to two underlying asymmetries: the broader availability of action-free data and the lower dimensionality of action-relevant features. Leveraging these asymmetries, we augment a world model with (i) a diverse subgoal generator obtained from video corpora and (ii) a sparse inverse model that infers actions from a subset of state features. By enforcing cycle consistency among generated subgoals, inferred actions, and forward rollouts, WAV provides an effective verification mechanism in under-explored regimes, where existing methods typically fail. Across nine tasks spanning MiniGrid, RoboMimic, and ManiSkill, our method achieves 2x higher sample efficiency while improving downstream policy performance by 18%.

AI.tldr: WAV框架通过将状态预测分解为状态合理性和动作可达性两个因素，分别验证，利用无动作数据和低维特征的不对称性，提高世界模型的鲁棒性和样本效率。
AI.motivation: 通用世界模型需要比策略学习更广泛的鲁棒性，必须能可靠预测次优动作的结果，但现有动作标记数据往往覆盖不足，导致在未探索区域预测失败。
AI.method: 将动作条件状态预测分解为状态合理性和动作可达性；利用视频语料库生成多样化子目标；使用稀疏逆模型从状态特征子集推断动作；通过子目标生成、动作推断和前向推演的循环一致性进行验证。
AI.result: 在MiniGrid、RoboMimic和ManiSkill的9个任务中，方法实现了2倍的样本效率提升，下游策略性能提高18%。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解验证和利用数据与特征的不对称性，WAV框架能有效提高世界模型在未探索区域的鲁棒性，为可扩展的策略评估、优化和规划提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: How and why does deep ensemble coupled with transfer learning increase performance in bipolar disorder and schizophrenia classification?
summary: Transfer learning (TL) and deep ensemble learning (DE) have recently been shown to outperform simple machine learning in classifying psychiatric disorders. However, there is still a lack of understanding as to why that is. This paper aims to understand how and why DE and TL reduce the variability of single-subject classification models in bipolar disorder (BD) and schizophrenia (SCZ). To this end, we investigated the training stability of TL and DE models. For the two classification tasks under consideration, we compared the results of multiple trainings with the same backbone but with different initializations. In this way, we take into account the epistemic uncertainty associated with the uncertainty in the estimation of the model parameters. It has been shown that the performance of classifiers can be significantly improved by using TL with DE. Based on these results, we investigate i) how many models are needed to benefit from the performance improvement of DE when classifying BD and SCZ from healthy controls, and ii) how TL induces better generalization, with and without DE. In the first case, we show that DE reaches a plateau when 10 models are included in the ensemble. In the second case, we find that using a pre-trained model constrains TL models with the same pre-training to stay in the same basin of the loss function. This is not the case for DL models with randomly initialized weights.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了迁移学习和深度集成学习如何减少双相情感障碍和精神分裂症分类模型的变异性，发现集成学习在包含10个模型时达到性能平台，而迁移学习通过约束模型在损失函数的同一区域来提升泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 虽然迁移学习和深度集成学习已被证明在精神疾病分类中优于简单机器学习，但对其为何能减少单被试分类模型变异性的机制尚不清楚。本研究旨在理解这两种方法如何以及为何能降低双相情感障碍和精神分裂症分类模型的不稳定性。
AI.method: 研究通过分析训练稳定性来探究迁移学习和深度集成学习的作用机制。对于两个分类任务，比较了相同骨干网络但不同初始化的多次训练结果，考虑了模型参数估计的不确定性（认知不确定性）。具体研究了：1）需要多少模型才能从集成学习中获益；2）迁移学习如何提升泛化能力（无论是否结合集成学习）。
AI.result: 1）集成学习在包含10个模型时达到性能平台；2）使用预训练模型约束迁移学习模型停留在损失函数的同一区域，而随机初始化的深度学习模型则不具备这种特性。这表明迁移学习通过限制模型搜索空间来提升泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习和深度集成学习通过不同机制提升精神疾病分类性能：集成学习通过组合多个模型减少变异性，在10个模型时达到最优；迁移学习则通过预训练约束模型参数空间，使模型停留在损失函数的有利区域，从而提升泛化能力。这些发现为理解复杂机器学习方法在精神疾病分类中的作用机制提供了重要见解。

title: Do Lexical and Contextual Coreference Resolution Systems Degrade Differently under Mention Noise? An Empirical Study on Scientific Software Mentions
summary: We present our participation in the SOMD 2026 shared task on cross-document software mention coreference resolution, where our systems ranked second across all three subtasks. We compare two fine-tuning-free approaches: Fuzzy Matching (FM), a lexical string-similarity method, and Context Aware Representations (CAR), which combines mention-level and document-level embeddings. Both achieve competitive performance across all subtasks (CoNLL F1 of 0.94-0.96), with CAR consistently outperforming FM by 1 point on the official test set, consistent with the high surface regularity of software names, which reduces the need for complex semantic reasoning. A controlled noise-injection study reveals complementary failure modes: as boundary noise increases, CAR loses only 0.07 F1 points from clean to fully corrupted input, compared to 0.20 for FM, whereas under mention substitution, FM degrades more gracefully (0.52 vs. 0.63). Our inference-time analysis shows that FM scales superlinearly with corpus size, whereas CAR scales approximately linearly, making CAR the more efficient choice at large scale. These findings suggest that system selection should be informed by both the noise profile of the upstream mention detector and the scale of the target corpus. We release our code to support future work on this underexplored task.

AI.tldr: 该论文在SOMD 2026软件提及共指消解任务中，比较了两种免微调方法：模糊匹配和上下文感知表示，两者均取得0.94-0.96的F1分数，后者在测试集上始终领先1个百分点。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索跨文档软件提及共指消解任务的有效方法，特别是在软件名称具有高度表面规律性的情况下，评估简单方法与复杂方法的性能差异。
AI.method: 采用两种免微调方法：1) 模糊匹配（FM）-基于词汇字符串相似度的方法；2) 上下文感知表示（CAR）-结合提及级别和文档级别嵌入的方法。
AI.result: 两种方法在所有子任务中都取得竞争性表现（CoNLL F1 0.94-0.96），CAR在官方测试集上始终比FM高1个百分点。噪声注入研究显示互补的失败模式：边界噪声下CAR更稳健，提及替换下FM更稳健。CAR的推理时间随语料规模近似线性增长，而FM呈超线性增长。
AI.conclusion: 系统选择应考虑上游提及检测器的噪声特征和目标语料规模。软件名称的表面规律性降低了复杂语义推理的需求，CAR在大规模场景下是更高效的选择。作者发布了代码以支持这一未充分探索的任务的未来研究。

title: Apriel-Reasoner: RL Post-Training for General-Purpose and Efficient Reasoning
summary: Building general-purpose reasoning models using reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) across diverse domains has been widely adopted by frontier open-weight models. However, their training recipes and domain mixtures are often not disclosed. Joint optimization across domains poses significant challenges: domains vary widely in rollout length, problem difficulty and sample efficiency. Further, models with long chain-of-thought traces increase inference cost and latency, making efficiency critical for practical deployment. We present Apriel-Reasoner, trained with a fully reproducible multi-domain RL post-training recipe on Apriel-Base, a 15B-parameter open-weight LLM, across five domains using public datasets: mathematics, code generation, instruction following, logical puzzles and function calling.
